Friend,
I have spent my career taking on the federal government to protect Wyoming. Liz Cheney, on the other hand, has spent most of her time with the political elites in Washington, DC and Northern Virginia. Her idea of “being from Wyoming” is to buy a house in Wilson in 2012 so that she could run for our Senate seat.

I have worked with Wyoming’s most important industries, the ones that put food on our table, put a roof over our heads, provide energy to heat our homes, produce gasoline for our cars, and build our roads. I am proud of the work that I have done for Wyoming, protecting water rights, property rights and constitutional rights.

I will continue to fight for you and for Wyoming when I am in Congress. I will focus on what is in YOUR best interests.

Liz Cheney, in contrast, is using our lone Congressional seat to wage war against President Trump and the 75 million patriots who voted for him. She doesn’t deserve to represent the great State of Wyoming in Congress; we need to defeat her and reclaim our seat.

clean_body: | | | | The Establishment is nervous. Friend, I have spent my career taking on the federal government to protect Wyoming. Liz Cheney, on the other hand, has spent most of her time with the political elites in Washington, DC and Northern Virginia. Her idea of “being from Wyoming” is to buy a house in Wilson in 2012 so that she could run for our Senate seat. I have worked with Wyoming’s most important industries, the ones that put food on our table, put a roof over our heads, provide energy to heat our homes, produce gasoline for our cars, and build our roads. I am proud of the work that I have done for Wyoming, protecting water rights, property rights and constitutional rights. I will continue to fight for you and for Wyoming when I am in Congress. I will focus on what is in YOUR best interests. Liz Cheney, in contrast, is using our lone Congressional seat to wage war against President Trump and the 75 million patriots who voted for him. She doesn’t deserve to represent the great State of Wyoming in Congress; we need to defeat her and reclaim our seat. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

clean_body: We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. | Peter - my Democrat opponent is on Twitter this week asking his followers for campaign donations. My opponent doesn't understand that his voting record doesn't match the values of Georgians, so I called him out for it! THAT'S why he has been called "the most vulnerable Senate Democrat." We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your immediate help. We need more folks to stand with us and help change the future of our country, so please join our team today. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Team AOC
subject: You have two choices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The pressure to conform began the very night Alexandria was elected in a shock upset, and it hasn’t stopped growing since.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211214-2688-header&t=1&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)
You have two choices entering Congress as an outsider:
You either change the system, or the system changes you.
The pressure to conform began the very night Alexandria was elected in a shock upset, and it hasn’t stopped growing since.
Alexandria is able to represent _us_ in Congress because she doesn’t answer to party leaders, lobbyists, or big donors. She answers to _you_.
[Can you keep our movement strong and independent by making your first $3 donation to AOC’s re-election campaign today? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211214-1?refcode=em20211214-2688-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2688_2526796_oVb489&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211214-1?refcode=em20211214-2688-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2688_2526796_oVb489&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)**
There will always be pressure to accept things the way they are rather than fight for a future that could be. But, Alexandria has demonstrated the ability to stay true to our vision and values. **She can do that because she knows that every step of the way our multi-generational, multi-racial, working-class movement has her back.**
That’s the power of grassroots movement building. And every donation helps us build power behind our shared values. [So today, please consider chipping in before the end of 2022 to help us meet our fundraising goals.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211214-1?refcode=em20211214-2688-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2688_2526796_oVb489&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)
Together we can be proud that we are truly transforming our nation’s politics from the inside out.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211214-1?refcode=em20211214-2688-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&refcode2=2688_2526796_oVb489&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211214-2688-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2688%2E2526796%2EoVb489)

subject: Happy Alabama Day!

body:

[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alabama_day_email&n=1)

| Peter, On December 14, 1819, Alabama became the 22nd state to join the Union. It is on this day each year that we celebrate the birth of this beautiful land, and recognize how fortunate we are to live right here in the Heart of Dixie! 202 years later, and there is no place on God’s green earth that I would rather call my home. __ Alabama is where my heart is. How ‘bout you? __[Donate NOW to help me keep fighting for you and for Alabama!](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RngAZ0YUmC5jYtwD2c7XCu2&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alabama_day_email&n=2)__ For Alabama, Mo Brooks

name: Tom Winter
subject: Busted: Ryan Zinke doesn’t even live in Montana
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
Frankly I can’t believe that this guy has the gall to try and trick voters this way. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSWlqdIYQ0UFgJdfpdp8d-_niUR0UGtAc3WX-3MIwjr93eSwB3lONfGpFfbvB5GkHeb5PV71aDWZ8-u6k-oiNykbuIaM9fER1p0qUk-Q8g5peJmtrwsP_iQcc3HSZaZ1w7HT_RT96f9v_g48dC5zxozwL0khzO2PsFRTty3jJpaTkPdOqhzOnTEujXsnxzSd_UW0eK0igHFAnDJMQmoC84cRViy_Or7M0IIoWgvoGwgb-9xNaYoTh9qdjugRIIW5NDfOMmpl2VmwNXLJ7o-9NYAeQ25h0bL8sNFmmX4JZpgBAbGkuBreMUyakWl9nl3kfkalTPNtzr-8A6URnzWBw6axqXwKnUlQVgGn6goUtJpA8/3hv/4poh_yeqT9-tAm9N_gygMg/h0/mUQ2Afmv2iUVWQ1dTotU-hn8DBbe2lwbey7P-wNGP8k) Friend,

With wealthy elites from states like California buying more and more second homes in Montana, it’s gotten harder and harder for those of us who live here to find a good home.

But living paycheck to paycheck doesn’t explain why my opponent, massively corrupt former Trump aide and California resident Ryan Zinke, can’t claim to live in a real home here.

**You see, the other day, I happened to be in Whitefish, so I stopped by his supposed Montana residence — and get this, it’s a freaking hotel for out of towners.**
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSfI_BxkpqSwRAcbG9HGh8ftY_V0AnS8TQBbGu8A6mkvDSmIzQ8HkeU2oVM-29WNxMYBGkfy1ngZsfkNjseSnMSxCpyuH0bYpAknaNrQAXV54PaIi_51kwzYPZ1dfuUToWnpuhivDMW4-PioyzeX9g8elutpG6RqhNEaft-0GfR5B-osv6LLbmM93EHz1e2QqawakZr3VgSnIFLROUoq0jbo0DMYYNAVTUX4_tDroL8LBdaiU9vokyLvrBtHEEu1xzFTYcxWKg-hPBKXl-zTgcNCay9ToaLWlMRb3LWISaaNMk0FQOrjejYvYVarWqa_49g/3hv/4poh_yeqT9-tAm9N_gygMg/h1/v25ed3dTf0jga_BkzBBqbUzjl8lS-ayyihGaCmjQ-vE) That’s right. Ryan Zinke wants us to believe he "lives" in a hotel in Montana, and now he wants to use us to get back to his donors in Washington as fast as he can. The level of absurdity is off the charts, and frankly, I can’t believe that this guy has the gall to try and trick voters this way.

_[**We need to make sure EVERY Montana voter knows that Ryan Zinke is trying to take advantage of them again. But we need the resources to organize people — which is why we’re trying to raise $10,000 from grassroots supporters like you TODAY. Can you chip in $3?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSWzKaTQMO92BVosAB78HeE69Jf38nWruEBGtLBO0q2pGO-C8BfMiiwfBIQfy-SThIbrQ-fANSVjqAUAa0LplgWx8sO0aXBu39j1t2dalCXAZnWUGvRJB9tXkNiX49ddfv9i_dUmdcDhFd29me5gURrb5DEK-qO39sSMOGSBO2P-Zd9Uf1RzZMDOX75cdTi60v1NEHyP3zG6YXWEqUH74Lawrlrdl36H9R_PwJAv-Xdu7dmSxrfdulKku2yh8BCJccRZ-X8eDrPytpAgWaCiQooKCGfsjYwvIZxOLdb1ozZTNG0JVZBlq40v8rYdg_ZGIMw/3hv/4poh_yeqT9-tAm9N_gygMg/h2/pI-VuRYFjxZQCgo5zVrfD4T-jV2Ay9shuZUqH3SNyPw)_ | [CONTRIBUTE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSQ5dIdhft02dtjSueeSwGwCB9xlkTBjPmmoebvewXweCdQg8o5W-iwz0gsRCEGY041WAgBq2CD94lcNg1ENacv4kje79_XHKLHM-tCRWqJjxeddgXHNBD4WTjczV-xRw0bvp_Hzr66xgDLytxk-x4HfoAQ7orMT3EGziQD6OAR9fLPA2ON9BZ3iwn6YeGHaKCjEf4hpgmeiSXtYbdMZUMw06RN_0KZL0RkDBHRwhFn0YVFkE05xX_uHpplUjBWt1RP4CP6HGJGhwNAjGAqc9LOTL0mQ-6Zc4gSmHA4aALzRzH5CNleO2GYNmrOy6kzTzOQ/3hv/4poh_yeqT9-tAm9N_gygMg/h3/PijIL5ODMl9aaVBg-T6Ds8zZSVjTu7N1pMobUKo1o9Q)
---
This is yet another example of just how out of touch Ryan Zinke is with Montana values. You probably remember Zinke was forced to resign as Donald Trump’s Interior Secretary in a cloud of controversy stemming from an investigation into his real estate dealings and ethics violations.

**And since leaving the Trump Administration, Zinke has made himself rich by lobbying for the oil, gas, and mining industries. Just this year alone, he’s made almost $1 million from doing their dirty work.**

Montanans NEVER want an extremist in office — no matter what party is next to a candidate’s name. So if we are able to let voters know just how extreme Ryan Zinke is, we have a real shot to win this race *and* keep the House in Democratic control in the midterms.

**_[So please, rush a donation today of $5 to help us reach our $10,000 grassroots fundraising goal!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSQpBy_S-M8xH5EGwTmwXsE_hlvpYJxhv7p4rpaR79XUyRrZMgN3phmyTT5_f6xRBMrYxVD5QVRgxzHV5ayPIbtjAR8zaAtVolMQ9TMemIN68sV7V2IwXdUO3LcpyD5nKEX5oM88hlvE7Ld-x417e6d0bNGxPIDtGvpiNTY-1MDv0erQSve9G7dsuZ9U0COJUDLPq70PfH3exLNfA9IUYmdTNUDr7qvsJaOdY6fk4m939xguJGmNa5RjeWXGAvka9qaVHPE-nV4538THMmSH8xVvj7eKIledU6sXMOeWccI75JHTZp0XI2qnwQ4bc8fpgww/3hv/4poh_yeqT9-tAm9N_gygMg/h4/lEkbxK9UffYjpc8AgTJ3L7RJKocquxOi0JC0VcWwzH4)_**

Life in Montana feels like it’s getting more and more precarious thanks in large part to people like Ryan Zinke. Someone who’s causing the problem isn’t going to create the solution.

Warmly,
Tom

name: Cassie Henry, Beto for Texas
subject: re: one month on the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Early and consistent support from grassroots donors is the key to winning this race.
#
Tomorrow marks an important day for this people-powered movement — **one month since we launched this campaign to elect Beto as Texas' next governor.**
Here's why this is important: Early and consistent support from grassroots donors is the key to winning this race, and a donation in this campaign's first month will have the biggest impact. Compared to a donation next November, we'll be able to invest your $3 donation today over and over again until Election Day.
**We're up against Greg Abbott's $55 million war chest, so we've set a goal to raise an additional $50,000 in online grassroots donations before December 15th at midnight.** Our Month 1 fundraising will determine the size of our campaign staff and the reach of our organizing programs, so we can't risk falling short.
[Please, rush a donation right now to hit this goal, defeat Greg Abbott, and elect Beto to be a governor for ALL Texans →](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50468?refcode=ema20211214-166969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=166969%2E444211%2EzSUaKh)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50468?refcode=ema20211214-166969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=166969%2E444211%2EzSUaKh)**
This campaign started with one big decision: to push past Abbott's divisive policies and work toward a future where all Texans are represented by their governor.
But this campaign will be won by thousands of small decisions folks like you will make between now and Election Day: to take an afternoon to phone bank, to register new voters in your community, or to chip in as often as you can to keep our campaign on the road.
**This will be one of the closest elections in Texas history, and small grassroots donations could make all the difference in turning out the voters we'll need to flip Texas blue.**
[So can we count on you to chip in $3 or more ahead of tomorrow's deadline? We only have one chance to end our first month with a major grassroots push.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50468?refcode=ema20211214-166969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=166969%2E444211%2EzSUaKh)
Thank you for being a part of this,
Cassie Henry
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211214-166969-footer&t=22&refcode2=166969_444211_zSUaKh&akid=166969%2E444211%2EzSUaKh)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=166969%2E444211%2EzSUaKh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=166969%2E444211%2EzSUaKh)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

clean_body: Friends, TONIGHT I was ATTACKED and SMEARED by House Democrats for defending President Trump and his administration on the House floor. Now Democrats are saying I fear the TRUTH. I don’t fear the truth. I fear Democrats abusing this process to smear Republicans and prevent us from defending ourselves against false accusations and outright lies. You’re one of my top supporters, friend, so I need to know you’re still with me fighting for conservative principles and standing by President Trump. Will you stand with me now and fight back against the Democrats' lies? Take a stand: The radical left will attack anyone and everyone who stands by President Trump and the policy victories from his administration. I’m counting on your support to show President Trump that we have his back! Thank you, Jim Banks PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC.

subject: Democrats bet big on workers and families. They were right.

| | | Americans are seeing historic economic gains as a result of the policies Democrats have delivered so far this year.
Jobs are growing and wages are up because of the American Rescue Plan and targeted federal stimulus.
We must continue to push forward and continue helping the millions of Americans who are finally seeing economic relief. **
** [**The economy is working for working Americans. Tell the U.S. Senate to build on historic economic gains by passing the Build Back Better Act now!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn5tIAtXMIm8YA6qxmic1TKDabvWGjtfywyJLxuZP8jYI0hTc0chU3w2xFroF472enkGOPARuw-v7a020vPIRpScP4DQRerGVgotiZ8wQHBgHFaMD-GOXYqFnLGyFetxPTs6UrQZN4GOnUxH9ltWbRJD5LX-vGFPKC-HTFw7-D0U9VL8vyWcgMLhnVeXR5t5ReP4AqskzTwpudAQhkBkvCOgfL5_eqDb1cl9GFZzyiL7Thqxt_e1zxEnkyRtHHl1tc9O1NclTpNLqMQpw0N1VZRd7zJKz0APKkILvS00GyLnwSpx458v2ayYb98vSooCJtoapBcZIFZ1Vu-zy7vI481KplXs676uN10WHeopnsp4nrmo_s6QYSF9wXZmp9_smdGWt6jhJbWK25IWVks4FdPaN4pTywClVV6IHGr6mSdopA6ry194-NWOhRLI9oOdviqeSLCyfscDGpVbWduyPKj73WZMxfwCxvaTBv0b0vMoMyva1Xf9OvyZiUEkqA4ViPNkvyYjU6YRK1yckFdCgRcHLroKRxMJrAPnnSDi6NpI9VhYnicd7S105Wq6ZZzK8Majbjr5jNpQygS6AiYa3PW1R9JMEiEdQt-0PxbHK1TDJSxzXf-LXApxgN9dbds83ZlSLsE-rDAegGABmk9XXz5uQEHhv8IyDyRJ64E1SdJuwP8bcb6b11xCmBENvCnCWaHUKuWhgcA5a1Z9gUkk6QdyrNz0_cAQywLcC2G6j9u6Q/3hv/44MYcT_GRcmu8IQZHtGn8w/h0/Nukeu3Lr-p9-_bgDeQ4MYMpGEnfJN7J_uRybY7GuLcU)
Democrats fought hard for the American Rescue Plan — and it’s working.
This year, the U.S. has added an average of 582,000 jobs per month, a total of 5.8 million new jobs.
As of September, wages and salaries have increased 4.6%, increasing especially for those who’ve historically been left behind.
Plus, the bottom 50% of households now have more than $3 trillion in wealth. That’s up roughly 55% from pre-pandemic levels.
**Passing the Build Back Better Act will keep the economic momentum going. It would be the largest expansion of the social safety net in 50 years and it would expand and strengthen the policies that have led to these historic economic gains.**
[**The critical programs in Build Back Better will continue to empower workers and families. After losing the White House and Senate, Republicans are desperate to take revenge.

But you know Marcy, Team. _**She is not backing down**_**, and neither will we.** If the GOP wants a fight, we will deliver one.

Marcy can win this tough race. She has always had our back in Congress. Now it is time to show her we have her back.

body:
Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d343cec8518a45ad8bb9064cb01457a9&_e=zva8OXtqxvOCUNX0HoXDoFcHiWFITMJrq14KuN4e5zF3Lo_O3sRtIVGkpKR4jmp8Sh3DwNfhaR5340O_D5GgVgRnaQvFkFbO63PsBIB5CE8ljgmm047FncNdNQFVkB7AQr3aT8S2Tr5K-HzQ7esDapbFFf12wxdN2MRAotHDjD_0BU6OeCToJMopSwwF9PrbN6ldN8I42vXJy4HIggOkCRvqXEUK0OiY6fnaO3kP8kxupNO-8jK_gx8P4PKloV4mcv1pwVyLMSyZIU9oh40l67u9B35qzN2edSIIuixisrS3Ss1Et6QHabf-cS29EFXeB8G1lRzxdqFeaFhAtgilGgcl8K3ht8nsCTT7zWRPmRuRVoJ9n5TnKYOAlmHLiJ9FhpEhHnkkKoGWY3OpqbyqzCPMbOIH5idVs0AaohGqL8oZ24Twf1v4itWOCguurEr06mAYI-b-9j34nUYkBMcSHwOXFKitBx5KDF2bNvWkZ7Q%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Arizona can be the state that gives control of the Senate back to Republicans. **Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses.**

As time goes on, more and more Arizonans are changing their minds about Mark Kelly.

His approval rating is under water, and our race was recently upgraded from _"leans Democrat"_ to _"toss-up."_ **Kelly is feeling the pressure, and panic has started to set in. Just look at this email he sent out:**

[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d343cec8518a45ad8bb9064cb01457a9&_e=zva8OXtqxvOCUNX0HoXDoFcHiWFITMJrq14KuN4e5zF3Lo_O3sRtIVGkpKR4jmp8Sh3DwNfhaR5340O_D5GgVgRnaQvFkFbO63PsBIB5CE8ljgmm047FncNdNQFVkB7AQr3aT8S2Tr5K-HzQ7esDapbFFf12wxdN2MRAotHDjD_0BU6OeCToJMopSwwF9PrbN6ldN8I42vXJy4HIggOkCRvqXEUK0OiY6fnaO3kP8kxupNO-8jK_gx8P4PKloV4mcv1pwVyLMSyZIU9oh40l69EGisWiJvi8J9UPXwTzK6eltLQ5Ozp_5UANVI6Z7oKSeDdRZg2ILTSzieD9lHGQi6WWnIv9IV7GDHFG3WMmpJsocgTrl6FxDJVqFCZBZlNgxhUnjqjJQ1p3NLSrripUIZeJR-qpU_bWIRKRVpd68-1H1nVM13v7wxCzU4f5PpdPORagJD6NFcXgZ6yOmYNQ9bAouu9lj81EaRCMm4B-jZ8%3D)

Mark Kelly is one of the Left's biggest fundraisers, and he has already raised over $10 million. He and his supporters know what's at stake and will do whatever they can to keep Chuck Schumer in power.

Our campaign has had to set some lofty goals to be able to keep up, and right now, we have some ground to make up for our December goal. [**I know we're still a little less than one year away from Election Day,_but if we want to retire Mark Kelly_ , we need to meet or beat every monthly goal for the next 11 months.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d343cec8518a45ad8bb9064cb01457a9&_e=zva8OXtqxvOCUNX0HoXDoFcHiWFITMJrq14KuN4e5zF3Lo_O3sRtIVGkpKR4jmp8Sh3DwNfhaR5340O_D5GgVgRnaQvFkFbO63PsBIB5CE8ljgmm047FncNdNQFVkB7AQr3aT8S2Tr5K-HzQ7esDapbFFf12wxdN2MRAotHDjD_0BU6OeCToJMopSwwF9PrbN6ldN8I42vXJy4HIggOkCRvqXEUK0OiY6fnaO3kP8kxupNO-8jK_gx8P4PKloV4mcv1pwVyLMSyZIU9oh40l6z3MtydyBgqk3MK-klBS22Pnw-guk0IH4NR_hRWbIzV4n40_LdWzs0xZTZ_Z8aS4b-DFHMJjlJ3bW2u1oZcLhXn2PS2CP-ETFIRdsQ_GLVOCglSC81yHf2ihWQdrnLqEyvbTqwVMVLPk82aujUKQ1G3IDs9PfwXaBjZwTFVj8FA1YDbzYkSqhXjcFVi7Y4Vmzlkdb9-6RkRWqOJ7v6iIAfw%3D)

clean_body: Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses. | Fellow Conservative, Arizona can be the state that gives control of the Senate back to Republicans. Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses. As time goes on, more and more Arizonans are changing their minds about Mark Kelly. His approval rating is under water, and our race was recently upgraded from "leans Democrat" to "toss-up." Kelly is feeling the pressure, and panic has started to set in. Just look at this email he sent out: Mark Kelly is one of the Left's biggest fundraisers, and he has already raised over $10 million. He and his supporters know what's at stake and will do whatever they can to keep Chuck Schumer in power. Our campaign has had to set some lofty goals to be able to keep up, and right now, we have some ground to make up for our December goal. So here's how you can help, Fellow Conservative. We need 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more right now. Even after the Republican victories in Virginia, our victory in 2022 isn't guaranteed. It just put the Democrats on high alert, and they will fight day and night to maintain their majority. Thank you, Fellow Conservative! name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Van=20Taylor?=
subject: Thank you, Texas Right to Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2a79727d24fa/icymi-dallas-morning-news-endorses-van-taylor-in-tx-13421770?e=9920087750)
---
| | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=501f5b72b3&e=9920087750)
---
| Peter,

The Radical Left is pushing unthinkable policies like destroying the Hyde Amendment - which prevents taxpayer funding of abortions - and even allowing for the murder of newborns who survive abortions. The pro-abortion policies and rhetoric from Democrats in Washington are tragic and heartbreaking and I will continue fighting to protect innocent human life. From the Texas Legislature to Washington, I have been an unrelenting fighter for the pro-life movement. _That's why D.C. pro-abortion groups like EMILY's List have targeted me for defeat in 2022 - which is something I consider to be a compliment._

**I am honored to have earned lifetime "A" ratings from organizations like the Susan B. Anthony List and National Right to Life. Just recently, I was endorsed for re-election by Texas Right to Life...**
---
| [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=297728ecd4&e=9920087750)
---
| I am proud of my pro-life record, and you can rest assured that I will never back down.

Standing strong,
---
| | Congressman Van Taylor

---

#
# **Meet & Greet**
# For
**Ed Thelander
Candidate for Congress
District 1**

Meet Ed and hear why a retired Navy SEAL of 21 years
continues to work for Maine and the American people.

**Th****ursday, Dece****mber 16, 2021**
**4:00 p.m.**
**Brady’s Restaurant**
**(At the head of the Harbor)**
**25 Union Street**
**Boothbay Harbor**

(Abundance of in-town parking and limited parking across the street)

subject: Rare Giveaway on Ankle Holsters (12 hours to get yours)
body:
Grab your Complimentary Ankle Holster now, before they’re gone...
---
Yes... Joe Biden Voted To Legally Steal Money From Retirees (Twice) | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans and hope you stick around - remember you can [Unsubscribe](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/a89f90a2aee8f759fe5b2130a43809b194424c2c/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf) here at any time. | [](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/bb02b7d19ea4cb1c5df7a956b6f68d890d176c7f/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf)
---
[](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/bb02b7d19ea4cb1c5df7a956b6f68d890d176c7f/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf)
Patriots, please check out the message from our sponsor. The message below is brought to you by an advertising sponsor. This list does not explicitly support the views or stances on our advertising sponsors. Thank you for your support.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | Exciting news,

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ have some big changes in store for their company...

Which is why they’re running a **[RARE Giveaway on their best selling “invisible” Ankle Holsters.](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/29ad2ed954fa59f1f0189fce5211d44f01876f7d/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf)**

Normally, these holsters cost $30...

But to clear room for new products, **[they’re giving you one today for nothing but the cost of stamps.](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/29ad2ed954fa59f1f0189fce5211d44f01876f7d/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf)**

[](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/29ad2ed954fa59f1f0189fce5211d44f01876f7d/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf)

You want this holster.

It’s incredibly comfortable...

Has an ambidextrous design (right or left-handed)...

It fits 99% of modern handguns...

And it’s so good at concealing firearms... ** _it’ll make even large frame pistols disappear in plain sight._**

Plus, the fact [you can get one for $0.00](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/29ad2ed954fa59f1f0189fce5211d44f01876f7d/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf) is another big selling point. ;)

Like I said...

This holster is Free for you today.

You just need to act before this liquidation giveaway closes... which I’m told could be in 12 hours (or sooner, if they run out before then).

[So grab your FREE Ankle Holster now](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/72/56327/29ad2ed954fa59f1f0189fce5211d44f01876f7d/990e8abd1459a05613b178e0a4ffddcfd7c891cf), before they’re gone.

**Thank You.**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn't matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015144:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)
---
Peter,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015144:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)
---
**I knew full well the price I 'd have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn't matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015144:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015145:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015146:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015147:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015148:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015149:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59015144:6toojpENN:m:1:3253819041:4731DAAE646DDA5B8FDEAA7CF6C30E14:r)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren't many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don 't regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8295%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qB42uqudd899pvQAWRMSNA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10750%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MlJr8Mg4yfi%2fbKUD2LBkeg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10751%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6sfuMMHhhan5ZUPyVRIv%2bw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10751%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6sfuMMHhhan5ZUPyVRIv%2bw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8295%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qB42uqudd899pvQAWRMSNA&sysid=1)_

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztdgvchou0ci8scunstu08suvd1c1mv8usdo6qg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp75dllc9h78ttgegpn6tlgmjg64tdmmmorcd1jespj2tti69oradpjchqn6ojnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbad1nm9omcs9kmmq3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpieaor4sdimaoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqmgpccekmv9ffaeht3hov01ac2lptsk2cj42re8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slhm9or5clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zldcitppb1mrbhkmqkkq22md3mlbjkpc2ctfbs6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slhm9or5clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z252mrcd1ivltp3or2j4ibdjemhmcvnkhs9omu10_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slhm9or5clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zucbl9f0se7vl8nhr2fir94hqa7hti632ghl9oho_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sljm8ob6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z216omc01u9d9t3mh8f470mu5l7be8cjin4rvc90_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sljm8ob6c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z344jp2jg96pbfegcddchv2jgp87kgcrnp8mq7i8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sljm8ob6c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2z7n4gaoafl8mb5610su63fk9ssa7c9olb88jn8u8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7dj6hnhh3e4p9jen2knc1cs8e0v4tfhm0p44o1g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjimep31cpgm49fg)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I didn’t want to believe it…but now I do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I know you’re busy with your holiday festivities and to be honest, I really really don’t like sending messages like this so I’ll keep it short. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?32rt0--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative I know you’re busy with your holiday festivities and to be honest, I really really don’t like sending messages like this, so I’ll keep it short.

We are only a few days away from OUR LAST DEADLINE before our End of Year fundraising deadline...and our numbers are not looking good. This is our last deadline before the quarter, month, and year expire and we can't afford to fail.

When I was named one of the most vulnerable Republican Senators up for reelection, I didn’t want to believe it. But now I do. Democrats are just pummeling Florida with their radical cash and we are having a hard time keeping up. I knew my opponent and I were virtually tied, and I knew this was going to be a tough and expensive race, but we are really in the thick of it right now.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-32rt0-1pcwp-4qqlpo5/)
---

**[ I’m not asking for much. I actually just need $18 from you today to know that you are a part of this team. Do you think you’re able to donate that in the next hour so my team and I are able to fight back against the MILLIONS my opponent is raising?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-32rt0-1pcwq-4qqlpo6/ "I’m not asking for much. I actually just need $18 from you today to know that you are a part of this team. Do you think you’re able to donate that in the next hour so my team and I are able to fight back against the MILLIONS my opponent is raising? ")**
---
| | | [DONATE $18 >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-32rt0-1pcwr-4qqlpo7/ "DONATE $18")
---
Thanks so much,
Marco

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-32rt0-1pcws-4qqlpo8/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Fellow Conservative, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-32rt0-1pcwt-4qqlpo9/ "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

body:
This couldn't be more important, friend:
| | |
---
| | This couldn't be more important, friend: I'm statistically tied with Marco Rubio in recent polling as we near election year, but my fundraising is dangerously behind.

**I'll need the help of every single person reading this email if I'm going to hit my $100,000 Mid Month goal, surge ahead in the polls and flip this seat blue – so I'm asking you personally to chip in before midnight:**

name: Bridie Farrell
subject: The Child Victims Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39687532/320983311/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213bipart_bf_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI1YmY1Yi1iMzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nq3LBuvnFS_UFqOOkJiXlmRYFPp1oXTxJuK0pJ8vsys=)
---
Friend, Last month I spoke at a conference about the Child Victims Act (CVA), a law I helped pass in New York, Arizona and other states across the country. By passing this law, we proved that protecting children is a bipartisan movement and a value we all share. We also demonstrated something else: that when we think about helping others first, we can break through the dysfunction of government to get real things done. I came to my work on the Child Victims Act through a very personal and traumatic experience, having been assaulted as a minor by an Olympian who was my speed skating teammate on the U.S. National Team. But my work to pass CVA wasn’t about me. It was about keeping the next generation of young athletes safe so they can compete without the burden and pain I had to endure. **_I quit my job, started a nonprofit, and spent years traveling the state of New York to build a grassroots movement to change the law._** Five years after disclosing my story, I testified in front of the New York State Assembly, and in 2019 the Governor signed the Child Victims Act. **Since then, more than 11,000 survivors in New York, and many more across the country, have come forward to hold their abusers accountable under the Child Victims Act and laws like it.** _In New York, Arizona, New Jersey and California, Republicans and Democrats came together to pass CVA because protecting children and standing up for victims of crime is the right thing to do._ When Elise Stefanik moved from Washington, DC to the North Country to run for Congress, she told us she’d be a bipartisan leader and do the right thing for our communities. We now know she wasn’t telling us the truth. _I grew up here. I’ve actually worked with both Democrats and Republicans to pass legislation. I’ll do the same in Congress and my values will not change when I get there._ [**Can you pitch in $20 right now to help me show Elise the door and elect a real bipartisan leader in the North Country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39687533/320983312/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213bipart_bf_full_xx_l1&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI1YmY1Yi1iMzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nq3LBuvnFS_UFqOOkJiXlmRYFPp1oXTxJuK0pJ8vsys=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39687534/320983313/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213bipart_bf_full_xx_btn&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI1YmY1Yi1iMzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nq3LBuvnFS_UFqOOkJiXlmRYFPp1oXTxJuK0pJ8vsys=)
---
Thanks,

clean_body: | = Friend, Last month I spoke at a conference about the Child Victims Act (CVA), a law I helped pass in New York, Arizona and other states across the country. By passing this law, we proved that protecting children is a bipartisan movement and a value we all share. We also demonstrated something else: that when we think about helping others first, we can break through the dysfunction of government to get real things done. I came to my work on the Child Victims Act through a very personal and traumatic experience, having been assaulted as a minor by an Olympian who was my speed skating teammate on the U.S. National Team. But my work to pass CVA wasn’t about me. It was about keeping the next generation of young athletes safe so they can compete without the burden and pain I had to endure. I quit my job, started a nonprofit, and spent years traveling the state of New York to build a grassroots movement to change the law. Five years after disclosing my story, I testified in front of the New York State Assembly, and in 2019 the Governor signed the Child Victims Act. Since then, more than 11,000 survivors in New York, and many more across the country, have come forward to hold their abusers accountable under the Child Victims Act and laws like it. In New York, Arizona, New Jersey and California, Republicans and Democrats came together to pass CVA because protecting children and standing up for victims of crime is the right thing to do. When Elise Stefanik moved from Washington, DC to the North Country to run for Congress, she told us she’d be a bipartisan leader and do the right thing for our communities. We now know she wasn’t telling us the truth. I grew up here. I’ve actually worked with both Democrats and Republicans to pass legislation. I’ll do the same in Congress and my values will not change when I get there. = | = Thanks, Bridie Farrell Bridie Farrell is a crime victims advocate and former U.S. National Speed Skater running against far-right Rep. Elise Stefanik in her home district of NY-21. = | Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US Bridie Farrell for US PO Box 166 North River, NY 12856 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: UPDATE: New map would shift VA-10 significantly to the right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/o8XWLbm2MwtCNdncznHrJR2KED5SioSGCZV94jJrmU4=/EXNJrkWZNogPvhvTgfgCo5Ox4PwbqZ8NT8TM46f2_XI=?refcode=20211215_RN_JW)
---
Friends, the special masters approved by the Virginia Supreme Court to redraw our Commonwealth's Congressional districts recently released a draft map. **Under this proposal -- which has a very good chance of resembling the final map -- my district would become _ten points_ redder than in 2020.** This means VA-10 would be a toss-up district and a top priority for House Republicans. They were already targeting my seat, and they'll be sure to double their efforts in anticipation of the proposed map becoming a reality. I'm not backing down from working for the people of my district -- whatever the new lines look like. But I could be facing my most competitive election ever next year, and I need grassroots supporters like you by my side. [**We need to quickly scale up our campaign in advance of the new year, and every grassroots contribution will make a difference. Will you stand with me a split a donation of $25 or whatever you can between my campaign and The Way Ahead today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/o8XWLbm2MwtCNdncznHrJR2KED5SioSGCZV94jJrmU4=/ffjmS_rbp5k-rjyqc-QS_pwsVFO6oQOyMLGHm7TdlXA=?refcode=20211215_RN_JW) I'm going to keep working to pass legislation that creates jobs, rebuilds our roads, and improves Virginia families' lives. I'm going to keep fighting to protect women's rights and advance equality. But I'm going to be facing _a lot_ more attacks in the days and weeks ahead. If we don't build up a budget now for rapid-response and expanded voter outreach, these attacks will leave a mark. [**I plan to keep fighting for Northern Virginia, and I need you with me. Please donate any amount today to help us counter the GOP 's coming attacks and secure VA-10.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/o8XWLbm2MwtCNdncznHrJR2KED5SioSGCZV94jJrmU4=/ffjmS_rbp5k-rjyqc-QS_pwsVFO6oQOyMLGHm7TdlXA=?refcode=20211215_RN_JW) Thank you, Jennifer

Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/o8XWLbm2MwtCNdncznHrJR2KED5SioSGCZV94jJrmU4=/6r5nVkE4Qz-Oq-xBqG53psCNsag4HX-GMc6aVrMB-dE=) |
clean_body: | | | Friends, the special masters approved by the Virginia Supreme Court to redraw our Commonwealth's Congressional districts recently released a draft map. Under this proposal -- which has a very good chance of resembling the final map -- my district would become ten points redder than in 2020. This means VA-10 would be a toss-up district and a top priority for House Republicans. They were already targeting my seat, and they'll be sure to double their efforts in anticipation of the proposed map becoming a reality. I'm not backing down from working for the people of my district -- whatever the new lines look like. But I could be facing my most competitive election ever next year, and I need grassroots supporters like you by my side. I'm going to keep working to pass legislation that creates jobs, rebuilds our roads, and improves Virginia families' lives. I'm going to keep fighting to protect women's rights and advance equality. But I'm going to be facing a lot more attacks in the days and weeks ahead. If we don't build up a budget now for rapid-response and expanded voter outreach, these attacks will leave a mark. Thank you, Jennifer | Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597 Richmond VA 23218 = |

As a Life Leader, I filed the HIGHEST profile amicus brief in the nation by recruiting HUNDREDS of America's top Conservative State Legislators to officially DEMAND that SCOTUS takes action to protect the unborn. I also co-sponsored HB 5097 to BAN Critical Race Theory in Michigan and keep the RADICAL socialist left's racist curriculum out of our public schools. We can Drain the Swamp and Make America FIRST again in 2022 but I need your help. I have an important deadline coming up. Before Thanksgiving Nancy Pelosi led House Democrats in passing Joe Biden’s Build Back Broke agenda. This massive spending plan would pump trillions of dollars of wasteful spending into the economy.

We can’t afford another four years of Joe Biden. In 2022, we will take back the House. I hope that you will join me.

For Freedom,

Rich Moon

name: Jessica Mason
subject: South Dallas raised me, and Washington will never change that.
body:
I didn’t leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little girl. So now, I’m running for Congress to represent TX-30.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39691140/321000180/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODgxYjIwNC1iOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xqN887Z6qi5Af5xoWYq63nU25Yn4BTg3esi67AeXGU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39691142/321000183/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODgxYjIwNC1iOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xqN887Z6qi5Af5xoWYq63nU25Yn4BTg3esi67AeXGU=)
---
Hello Friends! **_My name is Jessica Mason, and I'm running for Congress to represent the people of Texas' 30th District!_**

From growing up housing insecure and not being able to afford preventative medication to enlisting in the Navy to complete my degree, my story is not unique to working-class people. I grew up in a community that was set up to fail by design. **I am not just another politician or political operative; I’m a daughter of Dallas — running to represent the community I grew up in and the people I love.**

Raised with my sister by my mother and grandmother, my family barely had enough for ourselves, but if my grandmother knew someone needed food, she would bring them something. Once, a neighbor offered to braid my hair for free. She knew picture day was coming, and my family couldn't afford to get my hair done. My neighbor was looking out for me — that type of compassion and understanding are inherent to Dallas. ******[**South Dallas raised me, and Washington will never change that. I'm sick of seeing my community left behind and tired of watching the people I care about ignored by corrupt politicians. TX-30 deserves a leader who will fight for them and put the needs of working families above special interests. CHIP IN NOW to help me bring this fight to Capitol Hill >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39691143/321000184/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODgxYjIwNC1iOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xqN887Z6qi5Af5xoWYq63nU25Yn4BTg3esi67AeXGU=)****** **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39691146/321000185/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODgxYjIwNC1iOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xqN887Z6qi5Af5xoWYq63nU25Yn4BTg3esi67AeXGU=)** In Dallas, when things get tough, the only thing we can do is work harder. For five years, I worked as a Navy medic while making sure to pursue my bachelor's degree. I counseled service members ailing with the mental tolls of war, sexual harassment and sexual violence, and substance abuse. After completing my military contract, I decided to pursue my Master of Public Administration while working as a legislative aide in the Virginia State Legislature.

Working in public policy, I saw how corporate money worked to influence policies that destroy Black and Brown communities across the nation. I didn't leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little Black girl. So as soon as I completed my master's, I returned to Dallas.

_Returning home, I was astonished to see things were exactly the same as they were when I left, if not worse._ I started working as an affordable housing administrator to deliver life-sustaining resources, such as rental assistance, adequate nutrition, and healthcare, to families and individuals. I began volunteering at various food pantries, and as the holidays came around, I organized toy and coat drives for my community because I was once that little girl with no presents under the tree and holes in her coat. But truthfully, charity can only do so much.

**It's hard to see my community in pain. The people of this district aren't just constituents. These are my friends and neighbors. And they are suffering. We are hungry; we are scared. And no one seems to care.**

TX-30 needs policies that are designed for our success. And that starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. That's why I'm in this fight -- to give back to my community and lift up the voices of TX-30. ******[**But this isn't going to be easy. I'm running a fully people-powered campaign, fueled and funded by grassroots donations and ground support from everyday people like you. So today, I'm asking for your help to lay the foundation we need to take this fight all the way to Congress. Will you pitch in anything you can right now to help me finally give TX-30 the representation we deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39691147/321000187/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODgxYjIwNC1iOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xqN887Z6qi5Af5xoWYq63nU25Yn4BTg3esi67AeXGU=)****** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ********[**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39691148/321000188/-1288899752?refcode=21xx_FR_welcome1introjm_EL10&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODgxYjIwNC1iOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xqN887Z6qi5Af5xoWYq63nU25Yn4BTg3esi67AeXGU=)********

clean_body: I didn’t leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little girl. So now, I’m running for Congress to represent TX-30. | | | = = Hello Friends! My name is Jessica Mason, and I'm running for Congress to represent the people of Texas' 30th District! From growing up housing insecure and not being able to afford preventative medication to enlisting in the Navy to complete my degree, my story is not unique to working-class people. I grew up in a community that was set up to fail by design. I am not just another politician or political operative; I’m a daughter of Dallas — running to represent the community I grew up in and the people I love. Raised with my sister by my mother and grandmother, my family barely had enough for ourselves, but if my grandmother knew someone needed food, she would bring them something. Once, a neighbor offered to braid my hair for free. She knew picture day was coming, and my family couldn't afford to get my hair done. My neighbor was looking out for me — that type of compassion and understanding are inherent to Dallas. ****=** __= In Dallas, when things get tough, the only thing we can do is work harder. For five years, I worked as a Navy medic while making sure to pursue my bachelor's degree. I counseled service members ailing with the mental tolls of war, sexual harassment and sexual violence, and substance abuse. After completing my military contract, I decided to pursue my Master of Public Administration while working as a legislative aide in the Virginia State Legislature. Working in public policy, I saw how corporate money worked to influence policies that destroy Black and Brown communities across the nation. I didn't leave Dallas to make this world worse for another little Black girl. So as soon as I completed my master's, I returned to Dallas. Returning home, I was astonished to see things were exactly the same as they were when I left, if not worse. I started working as an affordable housing administrator to deliver life-sustaining resources, such as rental assistance, adequate nutrition, and healthcare, to families and individuals. I began volunteering at various food pantries, and as the holidays came around, I organized toy and coat drives for my community because I was once that little girl with no presents under the tree and holes in her coat. But truthfully, charity can only do so much. It's hard to see my community in pain. The people of this district aren't just constituents. These are my friends and neighbors. And they are suffering. We are hungry; we are scared. And no one seems to care. TX-30 needs policies that are designed for our success. And that starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. That's why I'm in this fight -- to give back to my community and lift up the voices of TX-30. **=** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** **** **** Thank you for standing with me. I can't do this without you. Jessica = ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | | Paid for Friends of Jessica Mason

| Peter,

When I worked in the Obama administration, I saw firsthand what could happen when building a strong team. When you’re surrounded by people who share your motivation for progress, collaboration blossoms and positive results follow.

The same lessons are evident in the classrooms in which I’ve taught. When a group of students feels enthusiastic about what they’re learning, there is a vibrant, contagious energy. Together, students can learn more efficiently and effectively than they could have if they kept their ideas to themselves.

**I feel the same way about this campaign.** Together, I know we can build a movement for real change here in Maryland, but for us to be on this path towards success as a team we need the critical infrastructure to get through this marathon ahead of us.

clean_body: I’m personally asking if you can make your first contribution before tonight’s mid-month deadline | = | Peter, When I worked in the Obama administration, I saw firsthand what could happen when building a strong team. When you’re surrounded by people who share your motivation for progress, collaboration blossoms and positive results follow. The same lessons are evident in the classrooms in which I’ve taught. When a group of students feels enthusiastic about what they’re learning, there is a vibrant, contagious energy. Together, students can learn more efficiently and effectively than they could have if they kept their ideas to themselves. I feel the same way about this campaign. Together, I know we can build a movement for real change here in Maryland, but for us to be on this path towards success as a team we need the critical infrastructure to get through this marathon ahead of us. = | = We all know that this race will undoubtedly be a challenge. But if we all unite around a shared goal — of building a brighter future for every Marylander — I do not doubt that we can do this. By making your first contribution to our campaign today, you’ll help us build the strongest team possible to stand out in this crowded race. You’ll be investing in our future by allowing us to plan ahead better. By doing so, you’ll become an essential partner in our shared movement. = | | | = | = Thank you so much for your generosity and support, John B. | | Folks, Charles knows what it’s like to not be given a seat at the table, so he’s dedicated his life to helping folks get the representation they deserve. Whether it’s empowering the special needs students with whom he worked to have a say in their education or fighting for Lumbee recognition and rights in the North Carolina General Assembly, Charles has been a voice for everyone in our district. But North Carolina Republicans’ shameless gerrymander is trying to rob us of the representation our communities deserve. That’s why Charles is running for Congress – because our communities won’t be silenced. [**Will you chip into Charles' mid-month fundraising goal today to send Charles to Congress and give Native Americans and rural folks the representation they deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39693871/321013134/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211215_FR_MM3SeatattheTable_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTU4MzcxOC1jMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rsxqj2pdj3xMowHhkAQgZX5z_TmyNYmBwW1k-nfdw-0=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39693874/321013140/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211215_FR_MM3SeatattheTable_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTU4MzcxOC1jMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rsxqj2pdj3xMowHhkAQgZX5z_TmyNYmBwW1k-nfdw-0=)

But Charles is in for a tough race – as it stands, North Carolina is gerrymandered in favor of Republicans, and Charles’ current opponents aren’t above blatantly lying to get donations and votes.
So Charles needs your help.[**If you’re with him and want to have your voice finally heard in Congress, will you chip in today to make sure he hits his mid-month fundraising goal? name: Rand Paul
subject: They want you scared and compliant.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59017814:JeomypENB:m:1:3253819041:6EE6E7CD876E6A4ECE627B444A1EE83C:r)** __ | |
---
Peter,

Here's something Washington won't want you to hear: even the scientist who discovered the omicron variant has called the Biden/Fauci travel ban a "hysterical overreach."

**_The doctor who discovered the new variant wrote an op-ed this week that said that so far, no one's been hospitalized in South Africa. So far, no one's died from this disease. _**

_That 's what I just talked about on Fox News. [**WATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59017814:JeomypENB:m:1:3253819041:6EE6E7CD876E6A4ECE627B444A1EE83C:r)_[** _ >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59017814:JeomypENB:m:1:3253819041:6EE6E7CD876E6A4ECE627B444A1EE83C:r)
__
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59017814:JeomypENB:m:1:3253819041:6EE6E7CD876E6A4ECE627B444A1EE83C:r)
The truth is that the hysterical power-hungry bureaucrats in charge of public health - like Dr. Fauci - don't want you to know what's really happening. They want you scared. They want you to be compliant. And apparently, they want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.

They want to create fear. They want to indulge hysteria. They want to destroy the economy while they're doing it. These are the last people we need in charge. That's why I'm leading the effort to FIRE FAUCI and restore common sense. Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59017815:JeomypENB:m:1:3253819041:6EE6E7CD876E6A4ECE627B444A1EE83C:r)

[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59017818:JeomypENB:m:1:3253819041:6EE6E7CD876E6A4ECE627B444A1EE83C:r)
The so-called experts have proven too many times that they have no idea what they're doing.

They don't care about COVID - they care about power!

And it's about time we say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

It's time for Fauci TO GO before we lose any more time or freedom listening to his hysterical lies.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

**I hope you'll chip in now to join the fight:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3357636/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59017814:JeomypENB:m:1:3253819041:6EE6E7CD876E6A4ECE627B444A1EE83C:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
