name: RasForIowa.com
subject: Why I'm endorsing Ras Smith.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
he'll be a great governor and help the hard-working people of Iowa. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39694718/321017501/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWI3ZDFkYy1jMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YgFld3kusBItNnj2pqpHdJToEax5jZh9J3I4_wYYSoI=)
Hi friend,

My name is Randy Bryce, but you might also know me as "Iron Stache." I'm the iron worker who took on former House Speaker Paul Ryan in Wisconsin in 2018. We came close to flipping that district, and then I launched an organization called IRON PAC to support working class candidates running for office across the country.

**Today, I'm thrilled to announce I'm endorsing Ras Smith for governor in Iowa.**

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

clean_body: Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | Friends, It’s still early, but my campaign is already gaining huge traction. People are really showing up for a new vision for Kansas, and I couldn’t be more excited. = During my time as Kansas City Mayor, I focused on uplifting our city through economic development, creating healthy communities, and welcoming new innovation. I’m passionate about creating creative solutions to real-life problems. Yet the current Senator is committed to dividing us by painting everyday issues as left or right. That's why I’m running for US Senate, friends. Kansas needs someone with the experience and common sense to get the job done. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m in this fight for the long haul. I mean it when I say: Our current leadership is failing us, and it’s time Kansans have a voice in Washington ready to fight for every one of us. = Your support means the world, Mark Holland | | | = Meet Mark: Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years. ** Paid for by Holland for Kansas Holland for Kansas PO Box 171236 Kansas City, KS 66117 United States

Peter, today is Holly’s birthday and we want to make it a special one!

Holly never likes asking for money, but the reason she does it is because she knows that **our funds go directly back into GA-14**. So today, **[everyone at Team Holly is setting a goal of $10,000 raised by tonight to surprise Holly.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39695504/321020536/535038997?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjVlZDM0YS1jMzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Usm-FrL79_VCzJaFcueMa2VXhM213JJ6HPsYQdDTTt4=)** This money will go directly into our voter registration efforts so that we can turn GA-14 Blue!

Holly isn’t shy about what she’s running for. She knows that GA-14 was blindsided by a representative - _from outside of our district_ \- who has never cared about us. Holly lives these struggles and she knows what we deserve. We need high speed broadband internet, we need resilient storm infrastructure, and we need to bring jobs back to Northwest Georgia.

There would be no better gift than kicking Marjorie Taylor Greene out of Congress in 2022. With your help, we can make this her best birthday yet. Northwest Georgia and America deserve better. **[If you agree, chip in today to wish Holly a Happy Birthday and to show Marjorie the exit.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39695506/321020538/535038997?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjVlZDM0YS1jMzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Usm-FrL79_VCzJaFcueMa2VXhM213JJ6HPsYQdDTTt4=) **

Thanks so much,
Team Holly.

# **Friend — When Joe Biden said veterans who refuse the vaccine were going to be dishonorably discharged like felons, I took immediate action to fight back.**

---
And I’m proud to share with you that we’re on the verge of winning the fight: _**_My bill to BAN our nation’s heroes from being dishonorably discharged for refusing a vaccine has been added to this year’s
National Defense Authorization Act!_**_ Friend, this is a major victory in the fight against Biden’s tyrannical overreach. For more than two months, it's been an uphill fight to even get a hearing on this bill. **But thanks to you — your petition signatures, phone calls, texts, and donations — we’re on the verge of stopping Joe Biden from treating our nation’s heroes like criminals. ** **Will you help us keep the momentum?[Chip in now to help us send Biden a message that we’re just getting started.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/c366a2cc42f0895f/fd008914189f0be4c3d6b838967d376c/37973) **

clean_body: | | | Friend — When Joe Biden said veterans who refuse the vaccine were going to be dishonorably discharged like felons, I took immediate action to fight back. And I’m proud to share with you that we’re on the verge of winning the fight: My bill to BAN our nation’s heroes from being dishonorably discharged for refusing a vaccine has been added to this year’s National Defense Authorization Act! Friend, this is a major victory in the fight against Biden’s tyrannical overreach. For more than two months, it's been an uphill fight to even get a hearing on this bill. But thanks to you — your petition signatures, phone calls, texts, and donations — we’re on the verge of stopping Joe Biden from treating our nation’s heroes like criminals. Will you help us keep the momentum? It’s despicable and anti-American to think our veterans would be dishonorably discharged over a personal health decision. This is a major victory, but the fight is far from over. Now, we’ve got to get this bill out of the U.S. Senate and give Joe Biden a choice: Support our military or slap our heroes in the face again. Senator Roger Marshall | | | Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. name: Ben Downing
subject: Today marks 18 years since my Dad died
disclaimer_text: Paid for By the Downing Committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39696631/321025988/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20211215_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDg1ODM2MS1jNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXRgzsbi09nFyMpRXvh8ZPPMFDg8NaeMnAG51QJ1v9I=)
Today marks 18 years since my Dad died. The genetic heart disease that took his father’s life and would later take my brother, Nate’s, took him at 52 and shattered our world. I remember that day and the days that followed in flashes — the piercing blue of the morning sky in Washington, DC, the snowy scenes along the Turnpike from Boston to Pittsfield, a kitchen filled to the brim with food, family, friends and tears, face after face at the wake and funeral. And then, the most awful part — the rest of the world returning to normal. When I was running for the State Senate, two and a half years after my Dad died, I knocked on a door in Pittsfield. After listening to my neighbor share what she thought about a few topics, she said, “Do you think you’d be running if your Dad was still alive?” It was the best and toughest question I ever got in that campaign or during my 10 years in the Senate. And the answer was obvious — No. Losing my Dad taught me more than I’ll ever know. It deepened my empathy and fueled my urgency. It showed me, painfully, that tomorrow is not a given and that there is a cost to every time we say “I’ll get around to that later.” My Dad’s death taught me that a life well lived is not about headlines or awards, it’s measured by what we do when the bright lights aren’t shining. The stories that stayed with me from his wake, funeral and over the years aren’t about some great speech, or trial or campaign. Rather, they are about connecting someone with the treatment they need instead of prosecuting them, helping a kid learn how to shoot a jump shot on a Saturday morning at the Catholic Youth Center or any number of little kindnesses that were the hallmark of his every day. I’d give up every last bit of anything I learned from my Dad’s death just to have the chance to say goodbye, for him to spend time with Mac and Eamon, and to meet Micaelah. Since that's not possible, I’ve dedicated myself, as I would later do with Nate, to honor his memory with the life I lead. I’ve thought often about pain and loss during this pandemic. Odds are, you have too. Too many of us have lost friends and loved ones. If you are suffering, know you are not alone. The holidays can be tough, so don’t hesitate to reach out — to friends, to family, to professionals, to me. Loss is unique and universal. I am not here today because I healed from my father and brother’s deaths, I’m here because so many held me up. Don’t be afraid to say you need to be held up too. [**And if you are in a position to help hold up others, I’d ask that you consider supporting the incredible work of the American Heart Association as they work to reduce heart deaths and make sure as few families as possible deal with loss like we remember today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39696632/321025989/-1524598031?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20211215_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDg1ODM2MS1jNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXRgzsbi09nFyMpRXvh8ZPPMFDg8NaeMnAG51QJ1v9I=&emci=d85b8a11-b95d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=84858361-c65d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23957496) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39696633/321025990/-1524598031?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20211215_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDg1ODM2MS1jNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXRgzsbi09nFyMpRXvh8ZPPMFDg8NaeMnAG51QJ1v9I=&emci=d85b8a11-b95d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=84858361-c65d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23957496)

It’s that time of year again, friends: _Campaign finance deadline season!_
**Our next Federal Elections Commission deadline is midnight on December 31, which means that this campaign is approaching what could be a make-or-break moment.**
[**Will you donate whatever you’re able to help us hit our goal and show the strength behind our grassroots campaign to flip this House seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39696759/321026773/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215midmonth1_EGweb_main_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmY4YjBhMy1jNzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHoKdOBLKKnA1xLFMb0Zj_aFCeND9UA444JuBR3X_Fg=)
Every three months, campaigns have to report quarterly fundraising numbers to the FEC for everyone to see. Those numbers are _crucial_ indicators of a campaign’s strength, and will set the tone as we enter the new year.
And let’s not forget: **The stakes in this race are incredibly high**. With partisan gerrymandering tilting control of the House in the GOP’s favor, flipping districts like this one — especially when held by extreme, out-of-touch candidates like Scott Franklin — could be crucial in Democrats’ efforts to hold the House and deliver on an agenda that provides help to the people who need it most.
We need to raise **_$15,000_** from online grassroots donors before the end of the year to keep pace with our corporate-backed, insurrectionist opponent and give ourselves the best shot possible to flip this seat.
[**Can you chip in $15 to support Eddie’s campaign to restore honest leadership to FL-15 and help us reach our goal by the end of the year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39696760/321026774/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215midmonth1_EGweb_main_SLA_l2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmY4YjBhMy1jNzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHoKdOBLKKnA1xLFMb0Zj_aFCeND9UA444JuBR3X_Fg=)
[Chip in $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39696761/321026775/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215midmonth1_EGweb_main_SLA_btn&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmY4YjBhMy1jNzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHoKdOBLKKnA1xLFMb0Zj_aFCeND9UA444JuBR3X_Fg=)

clean_body: | | = It’s that time of year again, friends: Campaign finance deadline season! Our next Federal Elections Commission deadline is midnight on December 31, which means that this campaign is approaching what could be a make-or-break moment. = Every three months, campaigns have to report quarterly fundraising numbers to the FEC for everyone to see. Those numbers are crucial indicators of a campaign’s strength, and will set the tone as we enter the new year. And let’s not forget: The stakes in this race are incredibly high. With partisan gerrymandering tilting control of the House in the GOP’s favor, flipping districts like this one — especially when held by extreme, out-of-touch candidates like Scott Franklin — could be crucial in Democrats’ efforts to hold the House and deliver on an agenda that provides help to the people who need it most. We need to raise $15,000 from online grassroots donors before the end of the year to keep pace with our corporate-backed, insurrectionist opponent and give ourselves the best shot possible to flip this seat. = = — Team Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. The end of the month marks my first official FEC deadline as a candidate in Texas' brand-new 37th Congressional District.

This is the first time local political analysts and local press will assess the strength and viability of our campaign. We need your help putting up the biggest number possible to show that we have what it takes to win.

It's imperative to not only win this Democratic-leaning district -- _we must win it big._ We ran the numbers, and if we turn out enough Democrats here -- we can play a key role in flipping Texas blue in statewide races.

That's why this race is so important, and it's why I'm asking:

body:

If we haven't met yet, I'm Nell -- Cora's finance director.

I know our team has been emailing quite a bit -- sorry about that. We have an important mid-month fundraising deadline tonight that we're hoping you can help with.

As finance director, it's my job to make sure we meet our fundraising goals. It can be stressful at times, but thanks to you, we've managed to hit *every* goal we've set so far. **Except right now, we're $7,014 short of tonight's goal and time is running out.**

**[We're going to need a strong wave of contributions before midnight if we're going to meet this mark and keep pace with Ryan Zinke. Can you chip in $3 to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39697142/321029243/102973118?refcode=em-12.15.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjM3MzI3NS1jODVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mSUicY43GWGJ7yxWNZfpTTg-LZ_ycax_SNLS6CUouFk=)**

More and more eyes are on this race -- both in Montana and across the country. Not only are we running in a brand new district, we're up against one of the worst insiders that Washington has to offer.

We think voters will see through Zinke's horrible record -- especially when it comes to our public lands. But we still have to contend with the special interest cash flooding into his coffers. That's why this deadline is so important:

**[So what do you say, will you make a donation to show what we can do?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39697150/321029254/102973118?refcode=em-12.15.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjM3MzI3NS1jODVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mSUicY43GWGJ7yxWNZfpTTg-LZ_ycax_SNLS6CUouFk=)**

I really appreciate it, and I know Cora will too!

Nell Vanden Brook
Finance Director

name: Karen Bass Finance Team
subject: We want you to donate just $3.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hi team --

In a few moments, we're going to ask you to chip in just $3 to support Karen's historic campaign for L.A. mayor. We mean it when we say your $3 contribution today could make a huge impact.

With the primary only months away, this is still anyone's race. We need to make sure Karen comes out on top in the new year, but **December is a slow fundraising month so we 're reaching out to our top supporters. **

Thursday at midnight is the final mid-month deadline of the year. We set a goal of raising $8,000 before then to keep our fundraising on track. **[We're counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in just $3 to help us reach our goal -- click here to donate if you're ready to invest in L.A.'s future with Karen.](https://act.myngp.com/el/U6wOPLI9-Uy2OzS7PoNFHStV35qNiDeFE80aesItk1I=/LpnPsogSgsN430_n1m71u-RV37hyzMrfV9iKCXkrCRU=?ms=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&am=3)**

A $3 donation is powerful. If 200 people reading this email chip in $3, that's $600 that will go directly toward campaign outreach, volunteer supplies, and gas money to help Karen travel the city. And if you're an L.A. resident, individual contributions may be matched by the city 6-to-1 -- meaning your $3 contribution could go even further.

**Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can, before Thursday 's mid-month deadline to help us reach our goal?**

[CHIP IN $3](https://act.myngp.com/el/U6wOPLI9-Uy2OzS7PoNFHStV35qNiDeFE80aesItk1I=/LpnPsogSgsN430_n1m71u-RV37hyzMrfV9iKCXkrCRU=?ms=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&am=3)
---
[CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.myngp.com/el/U6wOPLI9-Uy2OzS7PoNFHStV35qNiDeFE80aesItk1I=/LpnPsogSgsN430_n1m71u-RV37hyzMrfV9iKCXkrCRU=?ms=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

Karen got started in community work at a young age. She learned first-hand that the power is with the people, and that we are strongest when we work together.

Since day one of this campaign, Karen promised to build a movement that is by and for the people of L.A. We have faith in this coalition of grassroots activists. We're asking you to donate **just $3** because that's how movements are built: one small step at a time.

**[Reaching Thursday's mid-month goal will put our campaign in a strong position, but to do that, we need folks like you to contribute. Will you chip in $3 right now to support Karen's historic campaign for mayor? If you're an L.A. resident, your donation could be matched 6-to-1 by the city.](https://act.myngp.com/el/U6wOPLI9-Uy2OzS7PoNFHStV35qNiDeFE80aesItk1I=/LpnPsogSgsN430_n1m71u-RV37hyzMrfV9iKCXkrCRU=?ms=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&am=3)**

Thank you,

Karen Bass Finance Team

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/U6wOPLI9-Uy2OzS7PoNFHStV35qNiDeFE80aesItk1I=/LpnPsogSgsN430_n1m71u-RV37hyzMrfV9iKCXkrCRU=?ms=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&source=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_medium=email)

clean_body: Hi team -- In a few moments, we're going to ask you to chip in just $3 to support Karen's historic campaign for L.A. mayor. We mean it when we say your $3 contribution today could make a huge impact. With the primary only months away, this is still anyone's race. We need to make sure Karen comes out on top in the new year, but December is a slow fundraising month so we 're reaching out to our top supporters. Thursday at midnight is the final mid-month deadline of the year. We set a goal of raising $8,000 before then to keep our fundraising on track. A $3 donation is powerful. If 200 people reading this email chip in $3, that's $600 that will go directly toward campaign outreach, volunteer supplies, and gas money to help Karen travel the city. And if you're an L.A. resident, individual contributions may be matched by the city 6-to-1 -- meaning your $3 contribution could go even further. Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can, before Thursday 's mid-month deadline to help us reach our goal? Karen got started in community work at a young age. She learned first-hand that the power is with the people, and that we are strongest when we work together. Since day one of this campaign, Karen promised to build a movement that is by and for the people of L.A. We have faith in this coalition of grassroots activists. We're asking you to donate just $3 because that's how movements are built: one small step at a time. Thank you, Karen Bass Finance Team Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at =. = | = | = ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsgrd3rg9vuba5jrrpb3f58ppup273sj7ll29i3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slge6ob4sph2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8usg7sg6c7jgq2u21f0rp4ua62ofid98upa721o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slge6ob4sph2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9dbp8jp8go6jhpi2u2s8hc3g62nk6u18r1vc0j8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slge6ob4sph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoq65hrtdo4j9a93iga8q5e2samr4526ku1b99to_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slge6ob4sph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Eli Bremer
subject: They’re Making the Crime Wave Worse...
body:
Visit our website [https://eliforsenate.com/]

Hello,

Make no mistake - the left doesn’t care about your safety.

They’ve allowed drugs to pour in at our border, and refused to enforce laws - and even gone so far as to make some laws more lenient - for certain crimes.

Things are getting out of hand. We need to make 2022 our return to normalcy. Are you with me? [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...]

Many on the left support a bill to empty prisons within the next 10 years. If Michael Bennet bows to the left - like always - and brings these policies to Colorado - will you feel safe?

As the home to a SUPERMAX prison and many other prisons, do you want to see these prisons empited and criminals on our streets?

We need to return law and order safety to our communities. Colorado has already seen a spike in crime this year. When will it finally become enough?

Michael Bennet has experienced comfortable job security, and that has hurt Colorado. It is time for a change.

I will be the one to restore law and order. I will ensure our first responders have the funds and support they need. [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...]

If you want to restore law and order - donate today! Can you contribute $10, $25 or $50 right now? [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...]

I appreciate your support. Let’s make safety a priority again.

Signed,

Eli Bremer

P.S. Michael Bennet has voted in lock step with Biden and with Bernie Sanders 97% of the time. With bills up for discussion that would empty prisons within the next 10 years, CO needs a new vote in the Senate ... needs a common sense Conservative vote ... are you with me? [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...]

$10 [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?amount=10&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...] $25 [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?amount=25&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...] $50 [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?amount=50&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...] $100 [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?amount=100&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=They%E2%80%99re+Making+the+Crime+Wave+Worse...]

Unsubscribe https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ckjjjdk-ykykmujid-x/

name: Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: BTE Candidate Spotlight!
body:
New Politics endorses Jessica Mason (TX-30)!

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39697816/321032152/1300596418?refcode=211215_FR_jessicamasonnewpolitics_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYzRhMDI4LWM5NWQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dtHfXSzx2_8l1Lbsu-IFldnEWb7XnRjvoR6kd0zuYV8=)
---
Peter,

When our candidates shine, our Party shines.

**We are so proud to lift up our Barrier To Entry PAC candidate Jesssica Mason (TX-30) as she just received this incredible endorsement from New Politics!** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39697817/321032153/214728439?refcode=211215_FR_jessicamasonnewpolitics_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYzRhMDI4LWM5NWQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dtHfXSzx2_8l1Lbsu-IFldnEWb7XnRjvoR6kd0zuYV8=) New Politics aims to revitalize American Democracy by backing military veterans and national service leaders who have demonstrated the will to put community and country over self.

As you may know, Jessica is a US Navy Veteran and if elected, would be the first female Black veteran in the chamber halls. We were not surprised that New Politics saw what we saw in Jessica. Her long track record of public service, legislative aide, and experience as an affordable housing administrator truly shows the commitment Jessica has made to her community and will make to the rest of our country.

Endorsements are so important to campaigns because they shed national light on candidates who have a fighting chance. When we give a voice to the young and powerful, we have the impact to create notable change that our country desperately needs.

Barrier To Entry PAC endorsed Jessica because she reflects working-class people and brings a special voice to veterans. Veterans remind us of their selfless interest to put their community and country first.

If Jessica is going to make it through her primary and be elected to congress, we need to continue to support her with a grassroots movement. We know from experience that when we lift up candidates' voices, help them break socioeconomic barriers, and provide them with the resources every campaign needs, progressives can win. **[Help keep the momentum going and donate to Jessica Mason’s campaign and help her win in TX-21. Donate today!>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39697819/321032166/214728439?refcode=211215_FR_jessicamasonnewpolitics_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYzRhMDI4LWM5NWQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dtHfXSzx2_8l1Lbsu-IFldnEWb7XnRjvoR6kd0zuYV8=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE To JESSICA MASON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39697820/321032182/214728439?refcode=211215_FR_jessicamasonnewpolitics_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYzRhMDI4LWM5NWQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dtHfXSzx2_8l1Lbsu-IFldnEWb7XnRjvoR6kd0zuYV8=)** You are the reason progressives make history.
Thank you for your contributions! **_Barrier To Entry PAC_**

clean_body: New Politics endorses Jessica Mason (TX-30)! | | | = Peter, When our candidates shine, our Party shines. We are so proud to lift up our Barrier To Entry PAC candidate Jesssica Mason (TX-30) as she just received this incredible endorsement from New Politics! = New Politics aims to revitalize American Democracy by backing military veterans and national service leaders who have demonstrated the will to put community and country over self. As you may know, Jessica is a US Navy Veteran and if elected, would be the first female Black veteran in the chamber halls. We were not surprised that New Politics saw what we saw in Jessica. Her long track record of public service, legislative aide, and experience as an affordable housing administrator truly shows the commitment Jessica has made to her community and will make to the rest of our country. Endorsements are so important to campaigns because they shed national light on candidates who have a fighting chance. When we give a voice to the young and powerful, we have the impact to create notable change that our country desperately needs. Barrier To Entry PAC endorsed Jessica because she reflects working-class people and brings a special voice to veterans. Veterans remind us of their selfless interest to put their community and country first. If Jessica is going to make it through her primary and be elected to congress, we need to continue to support her with a grassroots movement. We know from experience that when we lift up candidates' voices, help them break socioeconomic barriers, and provide them with the resources every campaign needs, progressives can win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= You are the reason progressives make history. name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Peter, a Patriotic Potluck Christmas Party
body:
| | | | |
---
| | Howdy Peter,

I'm overwhelmed by the grassroots support we have, and it's an honor and a privilege to have yours.

We counted between 250-300 people in attendance on Saturday at Liberty On The Lake, and it's become very evident that the Texas grassroots movement that we are building together is mobilizing around our mission to fire Dan Crenshaw from DC!

I wanted to also invite you to a Christmas celebration this Saturday, 12/18 from 7pm - 10pm...

And it would be my pleasure for you to join our grassroots campaign team for a Patriotic Potluck Christmas Party!

* Food
* Music
* Games
* Hot Cocoa
* FREE

Location:
GPI Defense HQ
2455 FM 2920 Ste A
Spring, TX 77388

It is a potluck, so all we ask is that you bring something to contribute.

Simply reply back to this email with what you'd like to bring, and then click the button below to RSVP on Facebook.

Looking forward to seeing you there!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Nothing changes unless we have you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
The year is winding down and we need you to join in | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c93f390c56d3/nothing-changes-unless-we-have-you?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Nothing is going to change in this state unless we run a different kind of campaign. As the year winds down, we are facing the prospect of Tim Walz and the far-left machine being fully funded against us! **Let me tell you what we're not going to do and not going to be:** we're _NOT_ going to be the pick of the old guard; we're _NOT_ going to play by the conventional playbook that others play by; we're _NOT_ going to back down from having hard conversations and bringing new people into the fold of our movement. I may not fit in the bubble political pundits want me to, but I'm laser focused on beating Tim Walz and the Democrat Machine. [**_We are the campaign that can WIN_**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e732644626&e=33b11688c1).
_Make no mistake, this is a threat to the power brokers in this state and across the country._ We are running a campaign detached from them and wholeheartedly devoted to the people of Minnesota!
[We need you](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7d81bc7756&e=33b11688c1) to fuel this movement and propel us to our end-of-year goal. Help us raise $15,000 between now and January 1st to reach our stretch goal! With these funds, we can go into next year with a war chest that will propel us to victory. [Give $25, $50, $75 or more](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=71ec6f6a9e&e=33b11688c1) to help us accomplish this goal! Any amount helps. [Will you join us](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7e35a2c744&e=33b11688c1) and send a powerful message that the PEOPLE of Minnesota are ready to take their state back?

Join us and let's chart a different path to actually win this state. I put my career on the line against the strong arm of government bureaucracy. I've seen the depth of corruption and will be focused on FIXING IT it in St. Paul. I am a strong advocate for my patients and will be a strong advocate for Minnesotans. It's time to do something different.

The stakes are high and we must break the cycle of defeat! Let's WIN!

In Freedom,
Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
|
---
---

name: Van Hollen HQ
subject: Our end-of-year priorities survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
As we head into the 2022 midterm election year, and with so much going on right now, Chris reached out yesterday to ask your opinion on what matters most to you. [If you haven’t had a chance yet, please take a moment to share your thoughts here by taking our year-end priorities survey!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699129/321037539/-1346739065?refcode=CVH_EM_SV_3MO_211215_2_1&refcode2=b069b97f-cd5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&contactdata=wKqFMQEtqosREJa30nY18QfvGxYuugO%2FjqIcD4g3ERpzRYJ4fVb35nPKNcau%2BvuW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDY5Yjk3Zi1jZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdzzukxDWshKxCIJpL6K8kGb3h5XOQCPqOYnwR32YLY=&emci=802b95d5-c15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b069b97f-cd5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2216363) **_—-Begin Forwarded Message—-_** From: **Chris Van Hollen**
Date: Tue, Dec 14, 2021 at 1:52 PM
Subject: (HTML VERSION): your input matters to me The final weeks of this year will be extremely contentious — and consequential — in the U.S. Senate. Democrats still need the votes to pass the Build Back Better package and make it law before the end of the year when the monthly child tax credit program will expire, affecting millions of families. And without an agreement on a filibuster work-around, we will not be able to pass voting rights protections between now and the end of the year. I know where I stand on that — we can never give up on making progress for the American people — we must take bold action now to break this deadlock, protect voting rights, and deliver for hardworking American families. As we head into the 2022 midterm election year, I want to make sure your voice is being heard. [Will you please take a few minutes today to complete our short priorities survey? Your input is important to me >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699130/321037540/-1346739065?refcode=CVH_EM_SV_3MO_211215_2_1&refcode2=b069b97f-cd5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&contactdata=wKqFMQEtqosREJa30nY18QfvGxYuugO%2FjqIcD4g3ERpzRYJ4fVb35nPKNcau%2BvuW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDY5Yjk3Zi1jZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdzzukxDWshKxCIJpL6K8kGb3h5XOQCPqOYnwR32YLY=&emci=802b95d5-c15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b069b97f-cd5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2216363) | [ADD YOUR INPUT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699131/321037541/-1346739065?refcode=CVH_EM_SV_3MO_211215_2_1&refcode2=b069b97f-cd5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&contactdata=wKqFMQEtqosREJa30nY18QfvGxYuugO%2FjqIcD4g3ERpzRYJ4fVb35nPKNcau%2BvuW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDY5Yjk3Zi1jZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdzzukxDWshKxCIJpL6K8kGb3h5XOQCPqOYnwR32YLY=&emci=802b95d5-c15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b069b97f-cd5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2216363)
---
Thank you for sharing your opinion.
Onwards,
Chris

clean_body: | | As we head into the 2022 midterm election year, and with so much going on right now, Chris reached out yesterday to ask your opinion on what matters most to you. —-Begin Forwarded Message—- From: Chris Van Hollen Date: Tue, Dec 14, 2021 at 1:52 PM Subject: (HTML VERSION): your input matters to me The final weeks of this year will be extremely contentious — and consequential — in the U.S. Senate. Democrats still need the votes to pass the Build Back Better package and make it law before the end of the year when the monthly child tax credit program will expire, affecting millions of families. And without an agreement on a filibuster work-around, we will not be able to pass voting rights protections between now and the end of the year. I know where I stand on that — we can never give up on making progress for the American people — we must take bold action now to break this deadlock, protect voting rights, and deliver for hardworking American families. As we head into the 2022 midterm election year, I want to make sure your voice is being heard. | Thank you for sharing your opinion. Onwards, Chris * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

The Democrats know if they have any chance to maintain their one-party rule in Washington, they MUST flip this Senate seat blue. Peter, don’t wait one more minute. Time’s almost up – please ACT NOW! Thanks for staying in the battle, Mark Walker | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Walker4NC | |

name: Marisa Wood
subject: “Expert” advice
body:
I'm not a politician, and that's exactly why I'm the right person to take on Kevin McCarthy. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699258/321038080/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2MyZjZjMi1jZTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXcOCTLlQhLdgRdlRIwIi8fTh30SFmzUwh0CBCK730c=)
I'll state the obvious, friend:

I'm not a politician, and that's _exactly_ why I'm the right person to take on Kevin McCarthy. I'm a teacher who spent the past two decades serving students and their families here in the Central Valley. That means I've interacted with thousands of voters in the community.

I've heard a lot from my kiddos about the issues that face our families, from good-paying jobs, to access to affordable health care.

**We're not writing off anyone because they're "too Republican" or vote infrequently.** We have to talk to everyone. So right now, we're working with organizers to begin mobilizing voters in every corner of this district. That's where you come in, friend:

**[We need to raise about $9,811 before the end of the day to expand our team and reach more Democrats and undecided voters to DEFEAT Kevin McCarthy. Since I announced my campaign, I received a ton of advice from so-called political "experts'' who seem to know what's best. And it's always the same story: raise as much as possible, stay away from tough questions, and buy TV ads as we get closer to the election.

**I can tell you right now that's not how I'm running this campaign.**

I'm going back to basics -- talking to my future constituents and uplifting their issues. I've seen what this community can do when we come together, and that's exactly what it's going to take to beat him.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I want to know your thoughts on the expanded Child Tax Credit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699378/321038644/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ4Mzg5OC1jZjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mzap7OO-HHzySUQIOXEF-VU6G9zdd2FKJAq3zSl0qLw=)
Working parents have been receiving monthly payments as part of the expanded Child Tax Credit that I passed earlier this year. I’ve been fighting to extend this program that’s already helped 1 million Colorado kids and kept 3 million kids out of poverty nationwide. **If we don’t extend this program, parents will receive their last monthly payment today.** Food insecurity dropped by 24% for families because of this tax credit. 3.3 million fewer people with kids went hungry after we implemented the program; adults with children who reported not having enough to eat fell by about 1/3. As one Colorado Springs parent told us: “We have stopped living paycheck to paycheck.” I’ve secured a one-year extension of this tax cut in the Build Back Better Act, which we’re now trying to pass in the Senate. **As I work to get this done, I have to ask, will you take a moment to sign your name in support of further extending Child Tax Credit monthly payments?** | | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699379/321038645/1901557928?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211215_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ4Mzg5OC1jZjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mzap7OO-HHzySUQIOXEF-VU6G9zdd2FKJAq3zSl0qLw=&emci=9c695b5a-b159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=48d83898-cf5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1295540)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Jim Jordan Tells All
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative:

I'm writing today to tell you about the best new
conservative book: Jim Jordan's Do What You Said You Would Do.

It's a no-holds-barred exposé of modern Washington,
told from behind enemy lines. Jordan gives us a bracing account
of exactly what the Swamp is, how it corrupts our nation, and how
to defeat it.

At the House Freedom Fund, we think it's so
important to get this book in conservatives' hands this Christmas
that we are GIVING AWAY ONE FREE COPY to everyone who contributes
$25 right now.

Get your copy of Do What You Said You Would Do now!

Jim Jordan was one of President Donald Trump's
closest allies and fiercest defenders throughout his presidency.

He exposed the lies of the media, the Russia-gate
conspiracy, the rigging of the 2020 election, and he has kept
fighting to make America great again under the flailing regime of
Joe Biden's Democrats.

He's fought for the truth - now he's telling it all.

Donate $25 or more now and claim your copy of Jim
Jordan's must-read book!

But make no mistake: Do What You Said You Would Do
is not some tabloid tell-all. Every detail, every story, every
page has a purpose: to teach conservatives around the country how
to slay the dragon of woke, socialist, establishment elitism.

✓ Want to know why Washington missed the train on
Trump?

✓ Want to know how congressional leaders work with
lobbyists to push globalism and leave working Americans holding
the bag?

✓ Want to know how Wall Street and Silicon Valley
really pull the strings in Washington?

✓ Want to know exactly how the Establishment
tempts, bullies, and marginalizes men and women of principle?

It's all in there. And so are Jordan's strategies
for fighting back.
Of course, one of those strategies is the House
Freedom Fund itself. Jordan was one of our founders because, in
his time in Congress, he saw how hard it was for conservatives to
fight alone and for conservatives to win elections against the
liberal establishment.

HFF answers both problems - it gives conservative
candidates the resources to win and it gives the House Freedom
Caucus much-needed reinforcements.

Please support HFF and our priority candidates with
a donation of $25 or more and we will send you Jim Jordan's new
book.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to support conservative leadership in Congress.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

FREEDOM CAUCUS
CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates
get the financial support they need to compete with establishment
candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington,
DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate
political action committee that helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only
supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and
limited government, and who support policies that promote
liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by
House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY
ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

Every detail, every story, every page has a purpose: to teach conservatives around the country how to slay the dragon of woke, socialist, establishment elitism. ✓ Want to know why Washington missed the train on Trump? ✓ Want to know how congressional leaders work with lobbyists to push globalism and leave working Americans holding the bag? ✓ Want to know how Wall Street and Silicon Valley really pull the strings in Washington? ✓ Want to know exactly how the Establishment tempts, bullies, and marginalizes men and women of principle? It's all in there. And so are Jordan's strategies for fighting back. Of course, one of those strategies is the House Freedom Fund itself. Jordan was one of our founders because, in his time in Congress, he saw how hard it was for conservatives to fight alone and for conservatives to win elections against the liberal establishment. HFF answers both problems - it gives conservative candidates the resources to win and it gives the House Freedom Caucus much-needed reinforcements. Please support HFF and our priority candidates with a donation of $25 or more and we will send you Jim Jordan's new book. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support conservative leadership in Congress. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund FREEDOM CAUCUS CANDIDATES END OF THE MONTH COUNTDOWN DONATE "The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Friends, My opponent really said this about young people – Where he sees deficient youth, I see deficient leadership.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Good morning, Friends . Have you read this? The majority of young Americans believe our democracy is ‘in trouble’ or ‘failing’. We need to show young voters a better future. **Young people believe Democracy is “failing” – We must re-engage the youth vote by giving them hope** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699718/321040809/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=) **_“According to a new Harvard study, the majority of young Americans believe our democracy is ‘in trouble’ or ‘failing’. We need to show youth voters a better future.” – Dr. Bob Lorinser_** _**If you agree, c**_ _**an you pitch in?**_ [HELP ME IGNITE THE YOUTH VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699719/321040810/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699720/321040811/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699721/321040812/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=) Good morning, Friends. For over 20 years, the Harvard Public Opinion Project has provided the most comprehensive look at the political opinions, voting trends, and views on public service held by young Americans. A [**Fall 2021 survey**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699722/321040813/664617513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=&emci=d137366a-c35d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d96de9d2-d05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) of 2,109 young Americans between 18- and 29-years-old, includes young Americans’ concerns on their mental health, COVID-19, climate change, and foreign policy. The results are alarming. This needs our urgent attention.
* Only 7% of young Americans view the United States as a “healthy democracy”; 27% described the nation as a “somewhat functioning democracy,” 39% a “democracy in trouble,” and 13% went so far as to declare the nation a “failed democracy.”
* Young Americans place the chances that they will see a second civil war in their lifetime at 35%; chances that at least one state secedes at 25%.
* More than half of young Americans believe the Federal government is not doing enough to address climate change. A majority (56%) of young Americans expect climate change to impact their future decisions – and nearly half (45%) already see its local effects.
* More than half (51%) of young Americans report having felt down, depressed, and hopeless – and 25% have had thoughts of self-harm – at least several times in the last two weeks.
* **_By a margin of more than two-to-one, young Americans value compromise over confrontation._**
* Less than one-third believe that “America is the greatest country in the world”.
* Strengthening the economy, uniting the country, and improving healthcare are the keys to a successful presidency in the eyes of young Americans.
* Other top issues include:

* * Addressing climate change.
* Reducing economic inequality.
* Improving our public education system.
* Ensuring social justice.
* Improving America’s standing on the international stage

As a Democratic candidate for Congress, we need this to change. We need our youth to believe in our future and trust our government and its leaders. I will work hard to make this a reality. There are fundamental differences when I compare our campaign, vision, and policies to Jack Bergman’s.
* We believe it is possible to unite our country while strengthening our economy.
* We believe improving our health and education system is fundamental, and that is why I support social programs making their way through Congress.
* We believe it is possible to represent all members of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula by compromise rather than confrontation.
* We believe we can mitigate the ravages of climate change to give our children a brighter future.
* We will strive to be the greatest country in the world – including recognizing our deficits, learning from them, and addressing them to strengthen and grow.
* We can stand tall on the international stage by showing our compassion and principles, not just our military strength.

Last year, according to the Marquette Mining Journal, Jack Bergman expressed special concern about 18-year-olds, who in his mind have no concept of civics, American history, and constitutional government.” “Our middle schools and high schools do not teach American history,” [**he said**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699723/321040814/-704656780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=&emci=d137366a-c35d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d96de9d2-d05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427). He called the situation “disturbing.” **Where Jack sees deficient youth, I see deficient leadership.** So often we hear “our youth are our future,” but the reality is, our youth are our now. We **_all_** can have an immediate impact on shaping democracy, and all generations deserve leadership they can trust. When dishonesty is the norm in politics, how are we to blame them for becoming disengaged? We have let them down and now is the time for a change. I would be honored to have the support of all generations of this great district, so I can advance policies that give young people hope. Thank you, friends. Hope everything in your neck of the woods is going well. – Dr. Bob Lorinser [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699724/321040815/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=) # # # If you’re interested in getting involved with Dr. Bob Lorinser's grassroots campaign, let’s build a movement together. Register for Dr. Bob's fellowship program or sign up for volunteer opportunities. [**JOIN OUR FELLOWSHIP PROGRAM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699726/321040837/381894659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=&emci=d137366a-c35d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d96de9d2-d05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) [**SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699733/321040849/-232506344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=&emci=d137366a-c35d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d96de9d2-d05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) While we work to prove how we can positively influence the government for the benefit of young people in Northern Michigan and the U.P., it’s important to register to vote. College students can register in the precinct in which they live while attending school. [**Learn more at vote411.org/register.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699747/321040859/211040118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=&emci=d137366a-c35d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d96de9d2-d05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699754/321040874/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTZkZTlkMi1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P67CxbGwgWW_hUFmuxqdM98c0G2er-3mAwUnnVz7TeI=) name: Derek Marshall
subject: It’s a Republican takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
There’s a disturbing trend growing across the United States, and you aren’t going to like it. More and more Republicans are mobilizing behind the myth that President Biden stole an election that Trump truly won. According to a Propublica investigation, **[ringleaders like Steve Bannon are encouraging everyday Republicans to run for local election positions and win more power in the party “village by village” and “precinct by precinct.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699938/321041098/586840758?campaign_id=9&emc=edit_nn_20211213&instance_id=47676&nl=the-morning®i_id=69636040&segment_id=76841&te=1&user_id=5e98adf75330dc86b4f75f0997eb020f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2VmMWFkOS1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKTDYxRPMBbwu6pDF2BO0EMi_yj8P5iwU50XxH403sc=&emci=97015c2b-385d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=acef1ad9-d05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21617867)** The problem is, they’re winning. And their momentum isn’t likely to slow down any time soon.

A story in The Atlantic sheds light on the number of elected Republicans in major swing states across the country**[who are identifying where they “failed” to overthrow the 2020 election process during the certification process, and creating new procedures to ensure they’ll be successful next time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699943/321041102/1401431040?campaign_id=9&emc=edit_nn_20211213&instance_id=47676&nl=the-morning®i_id=69636040&segment_id=76841&te=1&user_id=5e98adf75330dc86b4f75f0997eb020f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2VmMWFkOS1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKTDYxRPMBbwu6pDF2BO0EMi_yj8P5iwU50XxH403sc=&emci=97015c2b-385d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=acef1ad9-d05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21617867) **The Republican Party is effectively setting the stage for the next American coup; one where a Republican Presidential candidate could attempt to steal an election, and actually get away with it.

If this trend scared you, you’re not alone. I, too, am concerned about the wave of Republican victories; not just these local ones, but one we expect to come in the race for House of Representatives in 2022. **[Insurgent campaigns like mine give us a shot of maintaining our House majority by flipping one more seat blue, and we can’t take any chances. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39699949/321041109/-1797803947?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2VmMWFkOS1kMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKTDYxRPMBbwu6pDF2BO0EMi_yj8P5iwU50XxH403sc=)**

The more cash on hand that a campaign has early on in the cycle, the easier it is to lay a strong foundation of volunteers, staff, and supporters. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Emily Emily Sherron Finance Director Elaine Luria for Congress | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support Elaine for Congress, click below to make a donation! | | = Paid for by Elaine for Congress PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466 United States Elaine Luria is a retired member of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: hate to bring you bad news (VPP)
subject: Biden and Trump TIED?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO)
---
Look, we hate to bring you bad news, but we need you to see this: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Biden_Trump?refcode=VPP_20211215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO) **Biden and Trump are T-I-E-D in favorability, team! This can’t be right, so we’re coming to our grassroots team to hear definitively:**

[DO YOU FAVOR JOE BIDEN OR DONALD TRUMP?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Biden_Trump?refcode=VPP_20211215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO) | [BIDEN](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Biden_Trump?refcode=VPP_20211215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO) | [TRUMP](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Biden_Trump?refcode=VPP_20211215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO)
---|---
[You are one of just three local Democrats chosen for this poll. Please, select your response to immediately contribute to this urgent poll]
**We cannot believe this...**

_DESPITE_ Joe Biden leading us out of the mess Trump made...
_DESPITE_ unprecedented job growth...
_DESPITE_ finally having an adult back in the office of the president...

_Donald Trump and Joe Biden are statistically tied in favorability...._

Something has to be wrong here – **that’s why we need YOU to submit your answer to our brand new poll before MIDNIGHT!**
[DO YOU FAVOR JOE BIDEN OR DONALD TRUMP? ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Biden_Trump?refcode=VPP_20211215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO)
[BIDEN](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Biden_Trump?refcode=VPP_20211215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO) | [TRUMP](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Biden_Trump?refcode=VPP_20211215_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO)
---|---
Thank you,

Team VPP
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=6&akid=1016%2E878179%2ENdOqbO)

name: Josh Harder
subject: Laura Ingraham and Sean Hannity texts
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, Late last night, I voted to hold Trump's former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows in contempt of Congress. This isn't something I enjoy doing on a regular basis (I mean... we just had to do this with Steven Bannon for crying out loud), but I know this is about standing up for our democracy and protecting the rule of law. These dangerous GOP extremists are a huge threat to our democracy, and yet they will hold all the power in Washington if we lose this race and Kevin McCarthy becomes the next Speaker of the House. [**We need your help to make sure that doesn 't happen! Please send in a donation right now before our critical end-of-year deadline to help us protect the most competitive seat in the country.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**
---
| **[$22](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**
---
| **[$50](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50)**
---
| **[$100](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=100)**
---
| **[$200](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=200)**
---
| **[Other](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA)**
---
By now, you've probably heard about the texts from FOX News anchors like Sean Hannity and Laura Ingraham to Mark Meadows pleading to Trump to stop the insurrection. Yet hours went by without a word from him or the President. Congress has some serious questions for Mark Meadows about what happened and when - he will not get away with skirting our authority, and he knows that.
**It also isn 't lost on me that privately these FOX news anchors knew how bad the insurrection was, but publicly spent the next hours and days downplaying it.**
GOP extremists took our democracy to the brink of collapse, and they're willing to do whatever it takes to win back control of Congress so they can continue pushing Donald Trump's dangerous agenda.
As a swing-seat Democrat in one of the closest races in the country, I know how to beat back a Trump Republican and win a tough race when everything is on the line. That means we need to start fighting back now because there is no more time to wait! [**Ahead of our most important FEC fundraising deadline of the year, can I count on you to please rush in a donation now to help us save our democracy?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
We're going to win this fight!
\- Josh
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/P6k3SENTH0n4VJUJy6fVve0UhxDKRzItFE_ox4aEs1E=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/KXYbmSdjQBRnAtOU_4PSJ3KdGUHxMsi_hnZu69s0ZeA=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/doz0jnv3SkYB5t3hfbztZ1l4nIIl6wts1a3i8zW7pJg=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/p8bZ0XtD8HD_uadCasKcwny9O92c20TrhS9i6Y8kYm8=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-footer-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-footer-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ua4Z8PDEXDCDalniknCV4xK-sW7XlRi9qlTRX-xvAEc=/sGUHvIuHa8Xz6NgALQCZ5RosbBfaB3mFC4uPC9bzGts=?refcode=E12952-20211215-MeadowsVote-footer-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

Modesto CA 95352 United States

name: Ric Grenell
subject: CENSORED
body:
I will not be silenced for exposing voter fraud.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59022892:JRAL2pENL:m:1:3298722022:7FBB02D081039409C79B4C3CB260B220:r)
---
Peter,
---
This is outrageous.
---
**_Facebook is censoring my paid ads that expose election irregularities and voter fraud in California._**
---
And when we tried to appeal their decision, they DISABLED our account.
---
I refuse to let these left-wing tech oligarchs silence us.
---
That's why I'm now going to DOUBLE my ad budget to get our message out twice as far through alternative outlets.
---
**[Please make a contribution to our Ad Fund as we continue to alert the public about voter fraud despite Facebook's censorship. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59022892:JRAL2pENL:m:1:3298722022:7FBB02D081039409C79B4C3CB260B220:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59022892:JRAL2pENL:m:1:3298722022:7FBB02D081039409C79B4C3CB260B220:r)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59022894:JRAL2pENL:m:1:3298722022:7FBB02D081039409C79B4C3CB260B220:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59022895:JRAL2pENL:m:1:3298722022:7FBB02D081039409C79B4C3CB260B220:r)**

---
A recent public opinion survey conducted by Fix California found that election security is the NUMBER-ONE concern for conservative-leaning California voters.
---
_**But Facebook is now trying to sweep your top concern under the rug.**_
---
Believe me: these fascist tactics are going to backfire.
---
_The more these progressives cover up the issue of voter fraud, the more that middle-of-the-road voters will begin to wonder why they have so much to hide..._
---
But that requires us getting our message out to voters through alternative means, which is why I'll need your help doubling our ad budget at this critical moment.
---
**[So please, make a contribution to our Ad Fund as we continue to alert the public about voter fraud despite Facebook's censorship. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59022892:JRAL2pENL:m:1:3298722022:7FBB02D081039409C79B4C3CB260B220:r)**

Did you see the news, team?
