I'm so proud and excited to have Nancy Pelosi's support.

Nancy and I worked closely together during my time in President Obama's Labor Department, the Justice Department's Civil Rights Division, and the Democratic National Committee. We know the promising future Maryland can have, and are determined to see it through.

She's absolutely right that our battle to get to Annapolis won't be easy. Our race is rated a "TOSS-UP," and Republicans have won three out of the last five gubernatorial elections.

**So, I have to ask: Can I count on you to join Nancy Pelosi and support our campaign?**

**_[Will you chip in $7 or whatever you can to support my campaign and flip Maryland from red to blue? We need grassroots supporters like you, who won us the House, the Senate, and the White House, to make the difference in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39702123/321048966/-1798052515?refcode=bpi-em-20211215-nancyendorsekick-ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmNjMDViNi1kNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnEMWc-25jVYauE3x5j3WIs-A_pMIWZcjx9UE2-QUXU=)_**

Thank you,

Tom

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Nancy Pelosi
Date: December 13, 2021
Subject: Tom will deliver
Peter,

I value your time, so I’ll make this quick. Republicans across the country are pulling out all the stops to reclaim what they lost in 2020 – introducing a record 400 voter suppression bills to silence the people and spending millions to spread misinformation and threaten our Majority.

We’re facing tough battles in 2022, and the truth is: If we want to expand our Majority and ensure our progressive values are protected from Republican attacks, we need your help to flip governor’s offices. **We have a huge opportunity to do that in Maryland – if we can elect Tom Perez.**

**[Tom is a tireless fighter for the people, and I’m proud to endorse him. I worked closely with Tom when he led President Obama’s Labor Department, the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division and the Democratic National Committee, so trust me when I say that he will be the leader Maryland needs to push for progressive change and deliver. Nancy and I worked closely together during my time in President Obama's Labor Department, the Justice Department's Civil Rights Division, and the Democratic National Committee. We know the promising future Maryland can have, and are determined to see it through. She's absolutely right that our battle to get to Annapolis won't be easy. Our race is rated a "TOSS-UP," and Republicans have won three out of the last five gubernatorial elections. So, I have to ask: Can I count on you to join Nancy Pelosi and support our campaign? = Thank you, Tom \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Nancy Pelosi Date: December 13, 2021 Subject: Tom will deliver Peter, I value your time, so I’ll make this quick. Republicans across the country are pulling out all the stops to reclaim what they lost in 2020 – introducing a record 400 voter suppression bills to silence the people and spending millions to spread misinformation and threaten our Majority. We’re facing tough battles in 2022, and the truth is: If we want to expand our Majority and ensure our progressive values are protected from Republican attacks, we need your help to flip governor’s offices. We have a huge opportunity to do that in Maryland – if we can elect Tom Perez. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I worked closely with Tom when he led President Obama’s Labor Department, the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division and the Democratic National Committee, so trust me when I say that he will be the leader Maryland needs to push for progressive change and deliver. Tom is a compassionate leader, a great listener, and someone who isn’t afraid to do the hard work governing requires. I know that if Marylanders elect Tom, he’ll uphold our shared values – ensuring health care is affordable, workers have a voice, justice is equal under the law, and education is accessible for Maryland’s kids regardless of ZIP code. Unfortunately, sending Tom to Annapolis won’t be easy. His race is a “TOSS-UP”, and Marylanders have elected Republicans to the governor’s office in three out of the last five elections. = Thank you for your support, Speaker Nancy Pelosi = Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I have good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I have some good news and some bad news for you today.

Here's the good news: People across Wisconsin are fired up about taking down Ron Johnson, flipping this Senate seat blue, and expanding our 50/50 Democratic Senate majority – and they're also excited about the campaign we're building!

As I travel around the state, meeting folks where they're at and having important conversations, I know our message is resonating. And I'll tell you why...

Wisconsinites are tired of having a senator like Ron Johnson who puts conspiracy theories and Trumpism ahead of their best interests every single time. While he's busy spreading misinformation to keep us locked in this pandemic, I'm putting Wisconsin families first and focusing on the kitchen table issues we all care about.

Now, here's the bad news: I just talked to my finance director, and we're 14% short of our mid-month fundraising projections. These goals are not arbitrary — they are what we need to reach in order to stay on track for our final FEC deadline of the year. With your help, I know we can do it. So, I'm asking:

Will you use this personal link to add a donation today and help us get back on track for our most important fundraising deadline of the year?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-december21&refcode2=personal

Our campaign isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, the vast majority of our donations come from messages like this one. This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, and I believe we can do it again and continue to put ourselves in a strong position to defeat Ron Johnson.

Thanks for stepping up!

— Sarah Godlewski

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are the best way for us to stay in touch, but if you need to go, please unsubscribe here: [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e068ec3d-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/e168ec3d-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTY4ZWMzZC1kNzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-xPnob60Fu_5P8pCidYCA4y6jJAmoBqORqPwB03JbQ=&id=121241219] If you only wish to receive our most important updates, submit this form for fewer emails [https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/less-email]. If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

Have a question? Reply to this email.

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Mid-December Deadline
body:
This is Joe here reaching out with today being our campaign’s mid-December deadline.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xVtVx_InTw7Q9LgUSS2GYQrI7RtW3-tWSYaSiZf0pXjlh7Ru12VmgjzluoyDkYqAu5v8Cer28BL2eeg6p7aiCYlpCqUjA2QA2xCHl9YzoofYi0NfmT3h6CdlmC118u6aYIU3gIcw4CQ1cIEcdt_pF3ENMz4RlxYubMmInKf1feha0gH41kabwY2D_qvF_005hErsLmwWS5HP8MHi_y5NNA==&c=1IWOQ3wDd5LnSS1x8IoUYjleHMUXVPRi0Jxf4drfEzluIYYIeATdSw==&ch=vodifCmcoKQLsjLFNaWJNqe0aMl7K_-Q2JlbsDLLYW2C2EO261AHnA==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
This is Joe here reaching out with today being our campaign's mid-December deadline.
On days like today, my team needs your support more than ever - we're working around the clock on the ground here in Nevada, traveling all over the state and spreading our message of safety and sound leadership everywhere we go.
I'd be lying to you if I said we could make this mission a success without solid support at the grassroots level. So, on deadlines like the one we're facing today, I hope you'll seriously consider pitching in to take Nevada back in 2022.

**[Hi Peter, I have an important message today, so I hope you’ll read to the end. But first, I need you to know that my team and I are hard at work to elect NC Democrats to our legislature and Congress in 2022, and we need your help. Please, chip in $30 right now to support our efforts>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39702282/321049604/435245919?amount=30&refcode=ea.c59c1cc1-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c59c1cc1-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTljMWNjMS1kNzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJKg7yebCd72gpxW6BrQnXgwAmhUM2QnQHVB5xNNK2Y=)** **So much is on the line in 2022, and the future of our country is at stake.** One party tries to win elections by delivering on the issues voters care about and standing up for the people — and is willing to accept electoral defeat when it comes. The other is chock full of members who care only about holding onto power however they can — including by making it harder for some voters to have a say in our government. Peter, Democrats here in North Carolina and in Washington, D.C. are standing up for voting rights, for health care access, for defending our environment, and so much more. But if GOP **voter suppression attempts** and **partisan gerrymandering** succeed in shutting Democrats out of power in next year’s midterms, we’ll be prevented from further delivering the progress Americans deserve. **Peter, I know there’s more work to do to achieve the future North Carolinians deserve, and I know I can’t do it all alone.** I need Democratic partners in the NC legislature and in Congress to help achieve our shared priorities — and right now, I need YOUR help to support them in next year’s crucial midterm elections. **[Please, chip in $30 right now to power our efforts to elect Democrats next year, and thank you so much.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39702284/321049606/435245919?amount=30&refcode=ea.c59c1cc1-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c59c1cc1-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTljMWNjMS1kNzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJKg7yebCd72gpxW6BrQnXgwAmhUM2QnQHVB5xNNK2Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39702285/321049608/435245919?amount=10&refcode=ea.c59c1cc1-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c59c1cc1-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTljMWNjMS1kNzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJKg7yebCd72gpxW6BrQnXgwAmhUM2QnQHVB5xNNK2Y=)

clean_body: Please, support our efforts to elect Democrats in 2022. | = So much is on the line in 2022, and the future of our country is at stake. One party tries to win elections by delivering on the issues voters care about and standing up for the people — and is willing to accept electoral defeat when it comes. The other is chock full of members who care only about holding onto power however they can — including by making it harder for some voters to have a say in our government. Peter, Democrats here in North Carolina and in Washington, D.C. are standing up for voting rights, for health care access, for defending our environment, and so much more. But if GOP voter suppression attempts and partisan gerrymandering succeed in shutting Democrats out of power in next year’s midterms, we’ll be prevented from further delivering the progress Americans deserve. Peter, I know there’s more work to do to achieve the future North Carolinians deserve, and I know I can’t do it all alone. I need Democratic partners in the NC legislature and in Congress to help achieve our shared priorities — and right now, I need YOUR help to support them in next year’s crucial midterm elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Together, we can achieve anything. \- Roy = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. * **Gas prices: UP 67.5%**

**It’s obvious: Floridians can’t afford the irresponsible tax and spend policies of the Biden administration and Congressional Democrats. It’s unsustainable and must be stopped in 2022!**

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Protecting Abortion Rights in Maryland
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Like many of you, I’ve been closely following the Supreme Court as it considers Mississippi’s restrictive abortion law. Though we may not hear the final ruling for some time, the conservative justices on the Court seem poised to uphold the law which restricts abortions after 15 weeks of pregnancy, in direct contradiction to the rights guaranteed by Roe v. Wade. If the Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade completely, then millions of women around the nation will lose access to their right to choose.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/BzcM2shYm0qUZj1mJCTmag2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BzcM2shYm0qUZj1mJCTmag2]As Governor, I will oppose ANY attempts to restrict a woman’s right to choose, and I believe we need to go further to prevent anti-abortion extremists from rolling back the clock on progress. That’s why I am calling on the Maryland legislature to pass the constitutional amendment bill to enshrine the right to abortion in the state’s constitution.
I am once again asking you to join me in the fight to protect and expand reproductive rights. Will you add your name to my petition urging the Maryland legislature to pass the abortion rights amendment bill? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BzcM2shYm0qUZj1mJCTmag2]
In addition to passing this constitutional amendment, we also need to ensure that healthcare providers include abortions and related services in their coverage, and undocumented Marylanders have true access to safe, full care. Abortion is healthcare, and the right to choose shouldn’t just be for the rich, the wealthy, and the powerful.
The stakes are simply too high to sit out on the sidelines in this fight. With the next Legislative Session only a few weeks away, now is the time to make our voices heard that we need an abortion rights amendment for Maryland.
SIGN YOUR NAME IF YOU AGREE: The Maryland legislature should pass the abortion rights amendment bill. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BzcM2shYm0qUZj1mJCTmag2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em121521&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2496cab0-f05c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/5e3b9639-d95d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNiOTYzOS1kOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyoATb03VwUOi_IYFWbQ48PapzzwMLQVWVtymzhqJIc=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

clean_body: Peter—The campaign just got word a few more spots opened up at our Atlanta fundraiser TODAY! If you were thinking about attending and supporting Patrick Witt for Congress and meeting Steve Cortes, now is your chance! Here are the details you need to know: When: Wednesday, December 15, 2021, 6:00 p.m. Where: Millennium Gate Museum, 395 17th St NW, Atlanta, GA 30363 Who: Patrick Witt and** special guest Steve Cortes You can RSVP by contacting Olivia Mitrovich at olivia@mitrovichfinancial.com. We would be honored if you would join us in person, but please keep in mind that this isn’t the only way you can support Patrick’s campaign. If you are able, please donate whatever you can No matter the amount you give, each donation helps Patrick build his campaign and meet our critical end-of-year goals. We know Patrick would love to see you and is so grateful for your continued support. Best, Team Witt | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Our opponent is the most vulnerable Senate Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. |
---

Fellow American - my Democrat opponent is on Twitter this week asking his followers for campaign donations.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8b1c38d4a49b481f956a6be79bb4dab1&_e=Hz3KeryTeM-ZUN81hlbeSzfkUGPlYu8CA7S_8ayieOPeKcv9y37ZUrWN-8-RMpZwr3_-1ZGYu9mohBqVGbnTndJZtanmpzdkB3FE0NyHJQp3y_C59HFk6VJ_2nRDIr2Up3jsBWK0nSRRb62fxkgmgNXvQoksG8cCq-D66VZ8v8f3_T0C5chzKwkgxJo9O6M61I1w7tUMibOxni9PfNrxqwIEXA1WNvxZnJdQU603Q69AYhxntfsk8B_H8qoFpNvCIfkZaBur72BI1NRbp7kbqPj4O1Jhj1o-r-J7IIVNuIXh_fLxV40pppNrMWX4leO2SZ9xqHmskp7BE-uar6kR_zK1Bbu5rjFXKbjcM6ZDKjDZKCF4YvQoMc55brVenAZ8yCOCaGgSA5-cVrV4375HPjCFFCSTImR36bmOTLPitjmFyO9mvbVzevo6a1lEhgGlsACRiIwZs0-HBGpGZHnyjg%3D%3D)

name: Gary Black
subject: What I stand for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c18ae1b01f4cb7a8/0462f75bcc47c8e1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — Every week, I want to share with you why I’m running for the U.S. Senate and why electing me means changing direction from Raphael Warnock’s failure. **

---
This week, I want to talk about energy and gas prices. The first thing Joe Biden did when he took office was dismantle the Keystone XL pipeline. Then, he shuttered additional pipeline projects and cut U.S. oil production. He loaded his Cabinet with out of touch bureaucrats who want to dismantle America’s energy independence. And he’s introduced new regulations to drive up the cost of drilling on federal lands. **Raphael Warnock hasn’t said a word about any of this and he’s signed off on each of Biden’s anti-energy nominees. ** [**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to put a stop to this — and we could use your help. Donate here if you haven't already.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c18ae1b01f4cb7a8/f3ec7986f4695817c3d6b838967d376c/37793) I’ll support the Keystone pipeline, additional American pipeline projects, and fight to cut onerous regulations that drive up costs. And I’ll oppose Biden nominees who oppose American energy. Energy independence is a winner for our economy, and it’s vital to our national security. **And it’s one of the reasons why I’m running for the Senate. ** **[If you agree that we must restore America’s energy independence, help us win here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c18ae1b01f4cb7a8/459933664a5e7f71c3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c18ae1b01f4cb7a8/5d0ba57590b5c981c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c18ae1b01f4cb7a8/93e8d9c3f726c3e8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c18ae1b01f4cb7a8/42b78c8b3e5ba020c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=c18ae1b01f4cb7a8&d=366365b93c41c6a3c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=c18ae1b01f4cb7a8).

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Never Trump RINOS in Missouri Scared of President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Never Trump RINOS in Missouri Scared of President Trump
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri Governor and leading candidate for U.S. Senate Eric Greitens is widely known as the strongest MAGA candidate who has pledged to defend President Donald Trump's America First agenda. That frightens the Missouri RINO establishment and Never Trumpers who are scared to death of the movement and President Trump's influence in Missouri. An article in [The Hill published Monday](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XO4Nt_l2A2CZV0WbXC3rHxceCJzbLBqPBMWJSPG6rsKnRK1VuBD2L3eS0meW13Q1IRY_txD3X_umgpsr4HfCSB1j8RKUlv1aaiHimoofpv4jvopZ4-oGsPpRtAWJVsBkCm7MtBhzVIuvGIFewYnw8qn_7oK2KHKpOwhIU3y5h7ODI_RmOBg5hdCvS_qqt_KUfBi3Ez8dJHI8GALsSMwJI-r081tAuvVoA8zttW4OZpaL2JnzskhxDE3U0pcrLyrd_2bb1Dmy_9s=&c=S2HTDK_2xoXWfjnLsoGnu-7Z4uq6869iZNwcjKXKLSdkm7KvvmHvbQ==&ch=p35abftYZabnc7sKQxHXHo1hoZy3zS6TDuwi9aFXqF7Y0bf-KXMUrQ==) quotes Never Trumpers in Missouri crying about President Trump's involvement in the Missouri Senate race. The RINO establishment--consisting of consultant grifters and fake conservatives--know that Governor Eric Greitens is the true MAGA candidate in the race and will completely expose their hypocrisy. Appearing on the Hugh Hewitt Show last week, President Trump said Governor Greitens is "leading by a quite a bit." In an effort to push back on President Trump, Missouri-based political consultant Gregg Keller told The Hill yesterday: "I think that, yes, seeing comments like this from the president really does put people on edge..." Greitens campaign manager Dylan Johnson pushed back on that ridiculous assertion and eviscerated the Never Trump consultants and grifters quoted in the article: "It's abundantly clear that Governor Greitens is dominating in the polls. Governor Greitens is 30 points ahead in the GOP primary and is set to beat any Democrat by the largest margin in recent Missouri history. The RINOs and their grifter consultants, including those quoted in this story, are terrified of an America First fighter evicting them from the people's house." Governor Greitens is leading by more than [30 points in the primary](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XO4Nt_l2A2CZV0WbXC3rHxceCJzbLBqPBMWJSPG6rsKnRK1VuBD2L-_JeKWim5veO5yzYcPDA2iuwBNl0nRHBLKdqp0LB_od9Yd3I8WBCa5h1CuJznjKsP-08XgetT0ieueDGh5KAmpFGX4Ov6cZ3ty-MnsbIJ2RE2DpPLSIa8hYC9P0vrKedwjyJu4H2lHAv9Zzb0rU50ChYuk0_Dm3tzfrqGkz_ALRXh_3tyiAVZHhlEr-Iw2CIpt8EbJtOLvbJRznHVs5Sainr1VETDH2tg==&c=S2HTDK_2xoXWfjnLsoGnu-7Z4uq6869iZNwcjKXKLSdkm7KvvmHvbQ==&ch=p35abftYZabnc7sKQxHXHo1hoZy3zS6TDuwi9aFXqF7Y0bf-KXMUrQ==), according to President Trump's pollster Fabrizio & Lee and Associates. In another separate independent poll by WPA, he is also leading the Democrats by [13 points in the general election](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XO4Nt_l2A2CZV0WbXC3rHxceCJzbLBqPBMWJSPG6rsKnRK1VuBD2L3eS0meW13Q1h6McKM83GcMlKQbB9UiFA-Y9CXakkrqp42ZRh4ZRvLdlqiKJ9nvZmQihaz_7s05iMoBK_XqS1rbFaPhn83_oM0krkzLkxl5kfe5rolX6H4CmPaDLTDwE1Dr0olbDdPxfK6LNiKz1w1upjqr4ZS5DNP-l3bbAfWZ_UX6e2QuoXMyyrH1bOdA1WkqFLu-eX8iyXxiO2v6vhR3YVaRJUUkVcobj5Viov3mC&c=S2HTDK_2xoXWfjnLsoGnu-7Z4uq6869iZNwcjKXKLSdkm7KvvmHvbQ==&ch=p35abftYZabnc7sKQxHXHo1hoZy3zS6TDuwi9aFXqF7Y0bf-KXMUrQ==).

body:
I know my team and I often ask for donations, so I want to personally tell you about how your donation will continue to have a critical impact on my campaign.
Hi Peter,

I know my team and I often ask for donations, so I want to personally tell you about how [**your support will continue to have a critical impact on my campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39706970/321057119/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.15_b1_lm_all-b&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAyNDA5NS1kYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmkDxgwafoIyNUr4Aga3d7iLe70Hf81Sx_RetQap0l4=)

name: Aaron Jacobs
subject: question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

Team – if you could have done one thing differently ahead of the 2020 elections, what would it have been? How about 2016? I would’ve made one more early donation to Democrats fighting tough races. Here’s why: As Senator Hassan’s campaign manager, I know that election strategy hinges almost entirely on fundraising projections. This means that a donation made now is more valuable than one made a week before the election because it allows us to execute a more thoughtful plan to talk to voters and get them to the polls. That’s why I’m emailing. **Pundits say that Maggie Hassan’s reelection in New Hampshire could be the closest race of the cycle** and, according to my math, we’ve got a fundraising gap we need to fill in order to win. I’m hoping to post an additional $5,000 before tonight. **[Could you please chip in $5 or more to help us hit it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39708180/321059246/-913685435?refcode=e20211215_aj-different&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxODhiMS1kZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqoka_fgba3cZD9viQfa-XK4BhSDbFJPn8leXj3R4dU=)** Maggie won her last race by an extremely narrow margin of 1,017 votes. Republicans have already spent $7 million to make sure she doesn’t win. And to top it off, our internal polling shows that this race is going to come down to the wire. I’d be MUCH more comfortable with our campaign plan if we had the early funds to support it. Like I said, we’re frankly just not there yet. You’re one of the Senator’s most valued supporters, so I’m hoping you can come through today. **[Please donate $5 or more to help us hit our $5,000 goal today to win in New Hampshire and protect the Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39708181/321059247/-913685435?refcode=e20211215_aj-different&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxODhiMS1kZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqoka_fgba3cZD9viQfa-XK4BhSDbFJPn8leXj3R4dU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39708182/321059248/-913685435?refcode=e20211215_aj-different&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxODhiMS1kZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqoka_fgba3cZD9viQfa-XK4BhSDbFJPn8leXj3R4dU=)

I’m hoping to post an additional $5,000 before tonight. = Maggie won her last race by an extremely narrow margin of 1,017 votes. Republicans have already spent $7 million to make sure she doesn’t win. And to top it off, our internal polling shows that this race is going to come down to the wire. I’d be MUCH more comfortable with our campaign plan if we had the early funds to support it. Like I said, we’re frankly just not there yet. You’re one of the Senator’s most valued supporters, so I’m hoping you can come through today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thanks so much, Aaron Aaron Jacobs Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

Peter – it's Abby. Can I have just one minute of your time to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign tonight?
There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now:
This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley.
**This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating.**
This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.
This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody –_ will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Because of your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Because of you, we're going to _defeat_ Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.
But I don't want to sugarcoat things here: We're still up against a lot ahead of our biggest public FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign. So, if you share in my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now?

subject: We are going to keep people housed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39709143/321060879/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWU4YjQzNy1kZjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aduHKAqlZSMA8qBCcVK3-ruu07NzPGA2-R1Hgsj1XCU=&emci=7ebea498-cb5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=15e8b437-df5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15353729)

Peter, I've been really busy over the last few weeks. On Monday, we had an emergency special session that was held to address the ongoing housing crisis and other urgent issues.

I called for the special session because we needed to prevent evictions as the pandemic restrictions expired. Thankfully, we got it all done. **We're going to be able to keep more people housed through the winter months.**

This session was an emergency and one that I knew needed to happen. We needed to help Oregonians immediately. And this is the kind of work I want to be able to do as Governor.

This special session happened because I knew that this pandemic and coming winter demanded action _now_. My focus is on making sure that people will be housed through this ongoing national crisis.

I'm the type of leader who will always put people first. I will never be afraid of calling for what needs to happen. body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Join us!
Let's Talk About Climate
Tickets available today!
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Let%27s%20Talk%20About%20Climate.jpg]

Hi Peter,
It would be great to see you at our first climate-focused event! Join me, Dr. William Schlesinger and Susannah Tuttle for a Q&A and conversation on how climate is impacting our communities. Afterward, hang around to get to know me or chat further about your district concerns.

I look forward to seeing you! Limited space and tickets available, so get yours soon!

Who:
Dr. Ashley Ward, Climate-Health Expert
Candidate for U.S. Congress NC-06
Moderated by:
Dr. William Schlesinger, Emeritus Dean Nicholas School for the Environment
Susannah Tuttle, Faith Leader and Environmental Justice Advocate

When:
January 11, 2022 6pm-8pm

Where:
Fullsteam Brewery, Boxcar, RTP
900 Park Offices Drive
Research Triangle Park, NC 27709

Buy Tickets [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clim11122]

name: Nikki Fried
subject: BREAKING — 6 Florida leaders just endorsed my campaign
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

I began my campaign for Governor with a promise — a promise to end decades of bad policy and bad governance. Because I know that our state needs something new.

Something’s got to give, Peter. Our state needs a change, and who knows more about what’s best for our state than the public servants working every day to uplift our communities?

That’s why I’m proud to announce that six current and former members of the Florida House of Representatives have endorsed my campaign for Governor. Join these incredible local leaders and help us keep up our momentum by making a contribution to my campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-dec-2021?refcode=1214endorsements]

I’m honored to have the backing of these leaders. In their communities and in Tallahassee, they fought for a Florida where working people come first, not the corporate special interests and well-connected donors.

I’m proud to stand with them in building something new for our state. Join them — and me — in our fight to bring something new to Florida. Click here to chip in $20 today and help us build on our momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-dec-2021?refcode=1214endorsements]

Thank you for being on my team.
Nikki

Miami, FL 33143

body:
| Hey there amiguis, The other day I sent an email on how my mom inspired me to run. Thank you to everyone who reached out with kind thoughts and shared similar stories with your loved ones. The stories you all have shared with me so far, is exactly why I’m running for Congress. Fighting for life-changing policies like Medicare For All would make such a huge impact on the working-class families of district 46 **—** **we can no longer wait for Lou Correa to get with the program.** Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is fast approaching, [**could you chip in $10 or $25 before the day ends?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39710432/321062343/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215midmonth2mymom_MO_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWRhZDU5Mi1lMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Wuibq5PWcUjRYqJU0CVhN1gxehPa0HcrJo1sBKP13M=) | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39710433/321062344/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215midmonth2mymom_MO_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWRhZDU5Mi1lMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Wuibq5PWcUjRYqJU0CVhN1gxehPa0HcrJo1sBKP13M=)

\------Forwarded message------
From: Mike Ortega
Subject: This one goes out to all the moms
Date: Wednesday, December 8, 2021
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2021ort_email_q4?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215midmonth2mymom_MO_full_xx_hdr)
---
Friend,
It’s funny how people are really quick to say that you’ll succeed by “pulling yourself up by your bootstraps,” especially when it comes to immigrants and migrant workers.
The concept of The American Dream is one that my own parents clung to when they came to the United States — however that looked like.
**Unfortunately, that’s just not reality.** Take it from me, I was born to a mom who “did everything right.” She’d been told that if she did everything by the books and stayed out of trouble, she’d be rewarded with prosperity and success.
Instead, she got a lifetime of hardship due to the current systems in place here.
No matter how much she tried to climb the ladder, capitalism, racism, and xenophobia were right around the corner to kick the ladder and knock her down. At the end of it all, she lost her vision, her teeth, and her agency.
It doesn’t have to be this way. My mom’s story is hardly unique by any means — if anything, I’m only one of thousands, if not millions, of first-generation Americans with stories like this one.
But it’s this way because of the people elected into office who hold incredible power over the lives of so many. And yet, so many of them refuse to pass life-saving legislation like Medicare For All.
Imagine a world where my mom didn’t have to lose her vision or teeth if she was able to have access to quality, affordable healthcare. Or maybe you, or someone you know, avoided going to the doctor so many times because of the exuberant costs of an office visit.
[**That’s why as soon as I’m elected into office, I’m going to do everything I can to pass Medicare For All so that we never have to hear stories like this ever again. Friend****, I’ll need your help to get there — can you rush in a $10 or $25 donation before the day ends?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39710435/321062345/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215midmonth2mymom_MO_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWRhZDU5Mi1lMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Wuibq5PWcUjRYqJU0CVhN1gxehPa0HcrJo1sBKP13M=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: The UN Fears New 'Killer' Robots
body:
American Defense News And China’s Hypersonic Spaceplane Nuke Based on
Old Chinese American’s Design for NASA

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I'm proud of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

I'm happy to say that the Protecting Our Democracy Act passed the House last week! I've worked hard to get this legislation across the finish line, and I'm proud to have co-sponsored and voted for this legislation to restore our government's system of checks and balances and strengthen accountability and transparency.

President Trump exposed the flaws in our current system and repeatedly exploited the office of the presidency. The Protecting Our Democracy Act will work to prevent future corruption by restoring the guardrails of our democratic systems.

I'm also incredibly proud that the Honest Ads Act that I introduced is included in this legislation. This aims to stop bad actors from using dark money through online ads to influence our democracy and silence the voices of voters - something we should all be able to get behind!

The Protecting Our Democracy Act is an essential step toward rebuilding public trust in our nation's highest office and safeguarding our democracy for future generations. I hope the Senate will soon follow in the House's footsteps and send this legislation to President Biden's desk for a signature.

I'm committed to continuing the fight to protect our democracy, and your support is what keeps me working in Congress every day. **[The final Federal Election Commission deadline of the year is coming up fast, and what we raise now will put our campaign in a strong position heading into the midterms. Peter, if you're able, can I count on you to contribute today to help us get a head start on our end-of-year fundraising?](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eixJ-MloR95PHnrrXtDICI_H9lOysqaKR4zwsNEV3U=/49UbS5MGIDg8D5HWEIu4xqddAJoGOYDP8YrLh4hiVwQ=?refcode=em21_211215_MMPDem_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211215_MMPDem_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eixJ-MloR95PHnrrXtDICI_H9lOysqaKR4zwsNEV3U=/49UbS5MGIDg8D5HWEIu4xqddAJoGOYDP8YrLh4hiVwQ=?refcode=em21_211215_MMPDem_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211215_MMPDem_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

I'm also incredibly proud that the Honest Ads Act that I introduced is included in this legislation. This aims to stop bad actors from using dark money through online ads to influence our democracy and silence the voices of voters - something we should all be able to get behind! The Protecting Our Democracy Act is an essential step toward rebuilding public trust in our nation's highest office and safeguarding our democracy for future generations. I hope the Senate will soon follow in the House's footsteps and send this legislation to President Biden's desk for a signature. I'm committed to continuing the fight to protect our democracy, and your support is what keeps me working in Congress every day. It's an honor to represent you, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: Mike Collier
subject: Re: our grassroots campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hi folks, I’ve been so energized by the excitement and support we’ve seen on the trail already (_7,000+ miles and counting_!). From Lubbock to Dallas to Laredo, we’re seeing events full of people who are fired up and ready for change. As we prepare for the end of the fundraising quarter and the new year, my team and I are crunching our numbers (y’all already know 🤓), and we noticed that we’re falling behind our December goal. Look, I get it. A budget gap this time of the year isn’t too unexpected with folks spending more time offline celebrating the holiday season with family, friends, and loved ones — as they should be! But, it’s pretty important for our campaign to stay on track. The other side is flush with millions of dollars from dark money special interest groups. Some days, it feels like it’s going to take a herculean effort to level the playing field. But here’s the thing: I also have no doubt that this grassroots team can do it. We _can_ win by building a broad, diverse coalition of people all across Texas. And even though the amount of money we raise is important, the number I _really_ care about is how many folks have pitched in to fuel our movement. [**That’s why I’m asking you personally today to chip in toward our mid-month goal and join our grassroots movement by contributing just $1.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39711695/321065608/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=) | [CHIP IN $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39711699/321065613/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=)
---
Here’s what I am hearing most on the road — Texans do not feel their values are represented. Since I’m not taking corporate PAC money, I will be keeping _only_ you in mind as I work to improve healthcare costs, our education system, and bring jobs to our communities. But this means our campaign is fueled by everyone chipping in a little bit.
In order for us to win and defeat Dan Patrick, we have to spread our message to as many Texans as possible. [**Your $1 contribution shows me you’re invested in this race and what this campaign stands for.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39711700/321065616/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=)
[CHIP IN $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39711701/321065617/1189302780?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=)
---
Thanks for joining us. I’m so humbled to have your support.
Mike
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States **[www.collierfortexas.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39711702/321065618/-391745509?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=&emci=ff2ceecf-f85c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=015af799-e15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7689298) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39711703/321065619/-37390472?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=&emci=ff2ceecf-f85c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=015af799-e15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7689298)** | Paid for by the Collier Committee
---
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. We believe that emails are the best way to connect with our supporters and keep you up-to-date. However, if you’d still like to receive fewer emails, fill out this form [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39711704/321065620/-769397610?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=&emci=ff2ceecf-f85c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=015af799-e15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7689298). If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ff2ceecf-f85c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/015af799-e15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTVhZjc5OS1lMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpdTsimjsh9-HkyzmROj04CusSpKOs1ilhslIg_MLeI=&id=109059170)

name: Chuck Schumer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/4698?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2294%2E9716520%2E6JSR7C)
---
If you knew that $5 could change the course of political history for a generation, would you make that contribution?

If you knew $5 could guarantee we **hold our Senate majority so we can pass President Biden’s bold agenda, prevent Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress, and keep America on the right track forward** , would you take that leap?

[**Now’s your chance: we’re running behind today’s $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and we need support from folks like you. Will you donate $5 now to help make up the difference and defend Democrats’ Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4698?t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2294%2E9716520%2E6JSR7C)

Here’s what I mean when I talk about $5, friend: President Biden's critical agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate, and Mitch McConnell only needs ONE seat to regain power. **That’s a single seat preventing McConnell from completely blocking President Biden’s transformative agenda -- and a single seat could be decided by a single vote.**

Democratic champions like Mark Kelly, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, and Catherine Cortez Masto are all up for re-election next year -- and we’re looking at four _extremely close_ races. _One loss_ could be _devastating._

**I’m not exaggerating when I tell you that $5 from supporters like you could decide our political future.** But right now, we’re still waiting on a contribution from you today, and I know you wouldn’t miss out on a chance like this to be a real difference-maker.

**[If everyone reading this message contributed right now, we’d hit tonight’s mid-month goal in no time. But as it stands right now, Republicans are threatening to out-raise us AGAIN. We can’t let that happen -- and it all starts with $5. Please, contribute now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/4698?t=6&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2294%2E9716520%2E6JSR7C)**
We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/4698?t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2294%2E9716520%2E6JSR7C)
---

---

Republicans _will_ outraise us again if we don’t rise up and challenge them. And they could take back the Senate -- maybe by a margin so thin that meeting today’s $125,000 goal would be enough to stop them.

But we’ll never know unless folks across the country band together and pitch in $5 to protect our Senate majority.

I know that $5 doesn’t sound like a lot in the face of the GOP megadonor machine, but think of it this way: **we have strength in numbers, and if we learned anything in 2020, it’s that our numbers are greater -- as long as everyone steps up to do their part.**

[**Friend, control of the Senate is in our hands, and I’m counting on YOU to keep it there. $5 just might make the difference -- so please chip in now.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4698?t=11&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2294%2E9716520%2E6JSR7C)

I'm so grateful to have you on our team,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/4698?t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211215-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=2294%2E9716520%2E6JSR7C)

name: Val Demings (iPhone)
subject: my mom taught me this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
"Never tire of doing good"

---
| |
---
Friend – I served in the Orlando Police Department for 27 years, when it wasn't ordinary to see a woman on the force – let alone a Black woman.

**But my mom taught me as a kid: "Never tire of doing good,"** so I persisted and became the first woman to lead as chief of police.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39712185/321068430/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1864-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjRmZDM1MC1lMjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBAjsiFWUcxcpkJyx6StG4ySDSKdxz9UAo8kFfT7ueY=)
Today, I’m running for the U.S. Senate with the same persistence that has driven me since I was young: _Never tire_. **I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and the GOP is spending millions to defeat me, but I'll never tire of putting the work in for Floridians.**

This isn't going to be an easy race: Senate races in Florida never are. But with Senate control and our democracy on the line, we have to go all in and compete everywhere.

body:
Since the three outside spending groups started running attack ads against Mark, our fundraising has picked up...
#

**Good News:** Since the three outside spending groups started running attack ads against Mark, our fundraising has picked up. That’s important, because it’s the only way we’ll have the resources to fight back against these attacks.
**Bad News:** But as more people are pitching in to this campaign, our average online contribution is dropping — by almost $5 a donation. And we need to get that number back up if we’re going to meet our goals.
So, we have two choices. Either we need A LOT more donations before our midnight mid-month deadline ends, or we need people to chip in a few more bucks than they normally would.
Normally when we ask people to make their first online donations, we ask them to start at just $3, because it all adds up. But with time running out, we need to ask you to dig a bit deeper. We’re asking for $10 today. It would go a long way toward helping us reach our goals and withstand these attacks.
So please. The timing is not great and we need your help:
[**Can you please make your first $10 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before our midnight fundraising deadline comes to an end? Help us fight back against these outside attacks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211215-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1798_6688874_59EAjZ&akid=1798%2E6688874%2E59EAjZ)

clean_body: Since the three outside spending groups started running attack ads against Mark, our fundraising has picked up... Good News: Since the three outside spending groups started running attack ads against Mark, our fundraising has picked up. That’s important, because it’s the only way we’ll have the resources to fight back against these attacks. Bad News: But as more people are pitching in to this campaign, our average online contribution is dropping — by almost $5 a donation. And we need to get that number back up if we’re going to meet our goals. So, we have two choices. Either we need A LOT more donations before our midnight mid-month deadline ends, or we need people to chip in a few more bucks than they normally would. Normally when we ask people to make their first online donations, we ask them to start at just $3, because it all adds up. But with time running out, we need to ask you to dig a bit deeper. We’re asking for $10 today. It would go a long way toward helping us reach our goals and withstand these attacks. So please. The timing is not great and we need your help: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot. Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Team Schiff
subject: This is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — it’s not going to be easy to defend our 5-seat Democratic majority in the House in 2022. But we have to get it done. And we can do this. And it sure as hell couldn’t be any more important that we do. Let us explain why. Election night in 2018 was a pivotal moment for Democrats and our democracy. Voters showed Donald Trump and the GOP that the American people demand better from our elected officials. We flipped 41 House seats from Red-to-Blue and put a stop to the unified Republican government that passed Trump’s tax scam, attempted to repeal the _Affordable Care Act_ , and looked the other way as Trump abused his office. We brought accountability. But in 2020, House Democrats lost 13 seats. Despite the fact that President Biden defeated Donald Trump by over 7 million votes nationwide. We just barely managed to maintain our Democratic majority in the House and secure the Senate. But because we did earn a majority in both houses, we passed bills that lifted half of America’s impoverished children out of poverty, sped up the vaccine, helped small businesses stay alive, and made the most massive investment in our nation’s infrastructure since Eisenhower. To preserve those gains and build on them, we need to start preparing for next November. It’s no secret the president’s party typically loses seats in the midterms. But that’s because the president’s party typically gained seats when he was elected. That didn’t happen. We’ve already had our correction. And we cannot hand the House Majority over to Kevin McCarthy. Not now. Not ever. **Derek, can you pitch in $10 right now to fuel our work protecting and expanding our Democratic majority? Your support right now can help out massively when the House races begin to heat up.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39713098/321071754/-1966934778?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211215_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZhMTE5Zi1lNTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9IvrvzDrHMThjEYf4hjRl1m6_9xCxCUa63FZxKpyuCs=)

clean_body: | Derek — it’s not going to be easy to defend our 5-seat Democratic majority in the House in 2022. But we have to get it done. And we can do this. And it sure as hell couldn’t be any more important that we do. Let us explain why. Election night in 2018 was a pivotal moment for Democrats and our democracy. Voters showed Donald Trump and the GOP that the American people demand better from our elected officials. We flipped 41 House seats from Red-to-Blue and put a stop to the unified Republican government that passed Trump’s tax scam, attempted to repeal the Affordable Care Act , and looked the other way as Trump abused his office. We brought accountability. But in 2020, House Democrats lost 13 seats. Despite the fact that President Biden defeated Donald Trump by over 7 million votes nationwide. We just barely managed to maintain our Democratic majority in the House and secure the Senate. But because we did earn a majority in both houses, we passed bills that lifted half of America’s impoverished children out of poverty, sped up the vaccine, helped small businesses stay alive, and made the most massive investment in our nation’s infrastructure since Eisenhower. To preserve those gains and build on them, we need to start preparing for next November. It’s no secret the president’s party typically loses seats in the midterms. But that’s because the president’s party typically gained seats when he was elected. That didn’t happen. We’ve already had our correction. And we cannot hand the House Majority over to Kevin McCarthy. Not now. Not ever. Derek, can you pitch in $10 right now to fuel our work protecting and expanding our Democratic majority? Your support right now can help out massively when the House races begin to heat up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being a part of this incredible grassroots movement. Regardless of whether it’s an election or an off year, Adam knows he can always count on you to stand up and fight for our democracy. Your support today can make a huge difference in the difficult months ahead. We’re so grateful you’re a part of this team. — Team Schiff Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: Wade Herring
subject: I believe in the power of education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringeducation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringeducation]
Friend,
My grandmother, mother, and my wife were all teachers. My wife’s parents were both educators.
I am the product of the public school system in Macon, Georgia where I grew up. After quite a few years of schooling myself, I know first-hand the transformative power of education.
To hear a little more about how improving education is an important part of my campaign, click below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringeducation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringeducation]Our world keeps changing in the midst of COVID – and we need to respond with more support for our teachers and educators, expand affordable childcare, and invest in early childhood education.
In Congress, I pledge to keep the needs of Georgia’s families and children at the front of my actions and decisions.
In Service,
Wade
Contribute Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringeducation]Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.
Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.

clean_body: = Hello friends, I hope your day has been going well. So sorry if I'm interrupting you, but this email cannot wait. We will be reaching the end of our mid-month fundraising period in just a few hours, and this is such a crucial time for my campaign. In just a couple weeks, my finance team will have to compile all our fundraising information from the past few months, submit it to the FEC, and make it available for everyone to see. Then, our opponents will pore over our reports to figure out how much money they need to spend to defeat us. We need to show our strength now, more than ever before. If we have any hope of deterring our opponents and building a winning team, we need to make sure that we keep hitting our fundraising goals. So I am asking if you can chip into my campaign using the link below: = I am so grateful for you and the rest of my grassroots team, Tom O'Halleran **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

subject: new look, new year, same fight for change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Notice anything different? | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39713356/321072957/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzAxNGIzZS1lODVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58A8dEmuqZThG8cd8UIlzXu9ep6uIRTFXLINxxz0tvc=&emci=fe2da9f8-d343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=8c014b3e-e85d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=561582) | Hey team — _notice anything different? _ **We’re SO excited to announce the launch of our new branding. What do you think? ** Since our founding in 2016, we’ve fought hard alongside voters to enact powerful ballot measures that put **$22 billion into the hands of workers,** helped **875,000 Americans receive life-saving health care,** and changed the lives of **18 million people across the country.** _How?_ Because when we run a ballot measure campaign we use every tool at our disposal. That means solving problems with dynamic solutions, building movements from diverse coalitions, and supercharging these issue campaigns with energizing ideas. _And team, we wanted a new look to match. _ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39713357/321072958/879860793?refcode=E12936-20211215-RebrandLaunchEM1-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzAxNGIzZS1lODVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58A8dEmuqZThG8cd8UIlzXu9ep6uIRTFXLINxxz0tvc=) **While our look might be different, our core mission of putting progressive measures on the ballot, and bringing change to millions of Americans, is exactly the same. ** To complement our bold new look, we’ve set an _ambitious_ end-of-year fundraising goal to raise **$8,500 before December 31.** _AND a generous donor has agreed to match all donations up to $5,000!_ _**([which means that if you donate _now_ , your gift will be clean_body: Notice anything different? | | Hey team — notice anything different? We’re SO excited to announce the launch of our new branding. What do you think? Since our founding in 2016, we’ve fought hard alongside voters to enact powerful ballot measures that put $22 billion into the hands of workers, helped 875,000 Americans receive life-saving health care, and changed the lives of 18 million people across the country. How? Because when we run a ballot measure campaign we use every tool at our disposal. That means solving problems with dynamic solutions, building movements from diverse coalitions, and supercharging these issue campaigns with energizing ideas. And team, we wanted a new look to match. = While our look might be different, our core mission of putting progressive measures on the ballot, and bringing change to millions of Americans, is exactly the same. To complement our bold new look, we’ve set an ambitious end-of-year fundraising goal to raise $8,500 before December 31. AND a generous donor has agreed to match all donations up to $5,000! (=) = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We have a lot in store for 2022, and our new branding is just one small part of that. We’re readying a full slate of ballot measures ahead of next year’s midterms. If we’re going to enact life-changing policies for millions more Americans, we need your help today to get us over the finish line to our end-of-year fundraising goal. = = Thanks, team. Friend, We’re now halfway through the month, and that means our campaign is **just a couple weeks away from our FINAL fundraising deadline of the year on December 31.** Not only that, but it’s another crucial FEC deadline, meaning our numbers for this past quarter will go public for everyone (including Brian Fitzpatrick and the GOP machine) to see. Look, I always knew this would be a tough battle going up against an incumbent with a massive war chest. But with enough grassroots support from people like you pitching in $5, $10, or more at a time, I _know_ we can overcome the odds and give PA-01 a true representative who will fight for them in Congress. **I’ve got to admit, we’re a little short from where we thought we’d be at this point in December. So, we’re setting a mid-month goal of raising $5,000 by tomorrow at midnight.** **[Can you chip in a contribution of $10 or more right now to help ensure we hit our goal and get back on track, so we can defeat Fitzpatrick and flip this seat from red to blue next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39713617/321073962/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211215Midmonth1_ae_full_b_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzQxOGRjYy1lOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cjSRn8Aruq8nKKjpWrZds1pgg2NT_7Xl1RFfeD4PJ0=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Not only that, but it’s another crucial FEC deadline, meaning our numbers for this past quarter will go public for everyone (including Brian Fitzpatrick and the GOP machine) to see. Look, I always knew this would be a tough battle going up against an incumbent with a massive war chest. But with enough grassroots support from people like you pitching in $5, $10, or more at a time, I know we can overcome the odds and give PA-01 a true representative who will fight for them in Congress. I’ve got to admit, we’re a little short from where we thought we’d be at this point in December. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The newest Justice Democrat
body:
Greg Casar is running for Congress to fight for the working-class folks left behind by establishment politicians
#
Peter,
**We just announced our endorsement of Greg Casar in the Democratic primary for the 35th Congressional District in Texas (TX-35).**

“Now more than ever, Texas needs progressive champions in Congress to defend against the state-level attacks on reproductive rights, voting rights, healthcare, and so much more.”
— Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director of Justice Democrats
---
[Join Justice Democrats today and donate directly to Greg Casar’s campaign.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87501?refcode=em20211215-20988&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=20988%2E1203867%2E563OFL) **_We can only add more Justice Democrats to Congress with your help._
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87501?refcode=em20211215-20988&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20988%2E1203867%2E563OFL)**
As a member of the Austin City Council, Greg fought tirelessly on behalf of working people — leading on issues of labor rights, reproductive justice, civil rights, and more. He successfully raised wages for thousands of workers, ended all personal marijuana arrests in his city, and closed inexcusable tax loopholes for the wealthiest.
Greg is ready to join the fight for working people in Congress, but he needs your help. Early voting starts in less than two months, and we need to reach as many voters as possible before election day.
Justice Democrats don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money, which means your direct contribution to Greg’s campaign can make a huge difference. [Can Greg count on you to chip in $5, $10, $27 — or whatever you can afford — today?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87501?refcode=em20211215-20988&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20988%2E1203867%2E563OFL)
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87501?t=22&akid=20988%2E1203867%2E563OFL)
We can only do this together.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=20988%2E1203867%2E563OFL) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=20988%2E1203867%2E563OFL) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211215-20988-footer&t=25&refcode2=20988_1203867_563OFL&akid=20988%2E1203867%2E563OFL)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

And since our opponent has already raised over $1,000,000, we know he won’t be facing the same problems. We can’t let that happen. = Thank you so much, Brad Pfaff HQ | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

Normally, we’d rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is when a candidate calls through a list of reliable Democratic donors and asks them to contribute.
But because Dr. Martin is spending every spare moment of his time off the campaign trail treating COVID-19 patients at the hospital (with a dangerous variant on the rise making this even more urgent), he simply doesn’t have the time to make the number of calls needed to close the gap between us and our opponent. **That’s why we set this $16,000 grassroots goal — if we can reach that before the end of the year, we’ll be in a good position to take on Bill Lee and the corrupt GOP money machine.**

| | Lori Saine is at it again, Peter.

Her latest? She tweeted #FireFauci after he went on the news and suggested that people ask their friends to be vaccinated before coming over for the holidays. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39694063/321013888/1424041718?amount=25&refcode=ea.69583718-c05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.69583718-c05d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTU4MzcxOC1jMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rnX7pa_KSb2-OA70PxDx42H0xceorafZNY9SVh2nVSo=) Throughout this public health crisis, we’ve counted on Dr. Fauci — as an expert — for reliable and sound public health advice.

Meanwhile, Lori Saine and her friends like Marjorie Taylor Greene are committed to spreading dangerous conspiracy theories.

Saine even went on a conservative talk show and suggested Coloradans research vaccine adverse reactions. She said, “People have different reactions to the same vaccine, including, well, including death.”

Let us be perfectly clear: COVID-19 causes death. The vaccine saves lives. And by encouraging people not to get vaccinated, she’s putting our communities, our children, and our neighbors at risk. And prolonging this pandemic.

**[We think it’s about time we send someone to Washington who will prioritize science, not MAGA messaging. clean_body: Let’s send Colorado’s first doctor to Congress. | | Lori Saine is at it again, Peter. Her latest? She tweeted #FireFauci after he went on the news and suggested that people ask their friends to be vaccinated before coming over for the holidays. = Throughout this public health crisis, we’ve counted on Dr. Fauci — as an expert — for reliable and sound public health advice. Meanwhile, Lori Saine and her friends like Marjorie Taylor Greene are committed to spreading dangerous conspiracy theories. Saine even went on a conservative talk show and suggested Coloradans research vaccine adverse reactions. She said, “People have different reactions to the same vaccine, including, well, including death.” Let us be perfectly clear: COVID-19 causes death. The vaccine saves lives. And by encouraging people not to get vaccinated, she’s putting our communities, our children, and our neighbors at risk. And prolonging this pandemic. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you, Team Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Have you seen the most recent email below from Congressman Kelly? Our _MOST IMPORTANT_ deadline in the fight to **KEEP MISSISSIPPI RED **is almost here and we need you to chip in NOW.

Our mid-month goal is only hours away, and we’re still $324 away from our goal. **As 2021 comes to an end, it is CRUCIAL that we reach our fundraising target.**

The corrupt Dems up in Washington are doing _everything they can_ to take away our freedom, and if we don’t meet this critical goal, **Mississippi’s future could be at risk. **

**Help us keep Mississippi RED** and ensure the future of our state and nation remain in the hands of American patriots, _like you_ , who understand that “freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”
[**Help us Keep Mississippi RED!**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=1e2162770a1b424dbeff5ad97297ffe1&_e=wbJDDNXUv91dMp1-Zau-vojxCjvc4XE3ts3maNjorJj5fr3cNFW0kL3vkVp89wfUiQ-EEfyGx-5dbjyXnwUWjCAIZ2ELijzPH4oTHlMMbTdXANLO-wOX1bTjJN7y0DLgV5fu45AFH5cN_EHQekhh9t_dUJCkGFpJYr9VITiFG9WZ8Axs2W_2AlhXHkDRWsvAsvJORCcfIF8mldOqmnVmyiu65htasKHqCzKbaxvnd3YofhOMLsvE433d4uKN1kIdwPFF36TrCx24UdjYh2qAf1WYN1B3gQnAAcl0GDNkaQ6KgxZLBH8GdQ69N-Jt4xMVsbiY7T8qWV8C57BqJMR9QCI-N5bY6FIGBtiSmfG2mnKlBV29fsqN8xsPtKSBzDnQO5HR_xxzFpEDbPrGMi6_YA%3D%3D)
