name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: We cannot stop until Trump is held accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ybeHG0SxvLOQNtq46NZnbryIHJQuq0v5&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend: Donald Trump's corruption extends far beyond his tumultuous years in the White House. His business dealings are also rife with wrongdoing, which is why the Manhattan District Attorney AND New York Attorney General have been actively investigating the Trump Organization - including whether the former president lied about his assets to avoid paying millions in taxes.
The walls may be closing in on the former president. His one-time "fixer" and lawyer, Michael Cohen - who admitted to violating campaign laws at the direction of Trump to influence the 2016 election - has said that **" I can assure you that Donald Trump is guilty of his own crimes" and that prosecutors in New York could "indict Donald Trump tomorrow if they really wanted."**
In addition to having likely manipulated his assets for the purpose of cheating our nation's tax system, more evidence comes out by the week about how Trump, his family, and associates were instrumental in inciting the deadly insurrection on our Capitol. Whether he occupies a corporate board room or the Oval Office, everything Donald Trump does is designed to help one person at any cost: himself.
Even so, the Republican Party continues to consolidate around Trump. They are paying homage to him at his Mar-a-Lago resort, with some auditioning as his potential running mate for 2024. They are making threats in Congress to prevent the full truth about Jan. 6 from coming out. And we must never forget: A majority of Republicans in the House of Representatives - including many of my counterparts in the Senate - _objected_ to certifying our free and fair election results for Joe Biden.
**That 's why it's incumbent upon concerned Democrats like us to ensure Donald Trump is held accountable and never steps foot near the Oval Office again. So before 11:59 p.m. tonight, I need 728 more of you to make your voices heard and let me know where you stand:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump if investigators find evidence of wrongdoing?](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-2024-poll?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1108-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick

clean_body: Friend: Donald Trump's corruption extends far beyond his tumultuous years in the White House. His business dealings are also rife with wrongdoing, which is why the Manhattan District Attorney AND New York Attorney General have been actively investigating the Trump Organization - including whether the former president lied about his assets to avoid paying millions in taxes. The walls may be closing in on the former president. His one-time "fixer" and lawyer, Michael Cohen - who admitted to violating campaign laws at the direction of Trump to influence the 2016 election - has said that " I can assure you that Donald Trump is guilty of his own crimes" and that prosecutors in New York could "indict Donald Trump tomorrow if they really wanted." In addition to having likely manipulated his assets for the purpose of cheating our nation's tax system, more evidence comes out by the week about how Trump, his family, and associates were instrumental in inciting the deadly insurrection on our Capitol. Whether he occupies a corporate board room or the Oval Office, everything Donald Trump does is designed to help one person at any cost: himself. | | True story:

Government isn’t the answer, it’s the problem...

This is why the government has ZERO business indoctrinating Idaho toddlers in Critical Race Theory and "wokeism."

Yet... it's happening.

This is why I'm hosting an event in Nampa, with Anna Miller from the Idaho Freedom Foundation and a very prominent special guest from Boise State University.

It happens in January and you're invited.

_Because kids from BIRTH through college don’t need radical leftist non-profits, activist teachers, and the Idaho State Board of Education to teach them Critical Race Theory._

This event will give you all the info you need to detect and DEFEAT Critical Race Theory in Idaho classrooms (from preschool to college).

Stay frosty,

Brian

We don’t have much time, so I’ll make this quick: We’re less than 36 hours away from our 500 grassroots donors goal, but we’re pacing behind. 392 donors behind, to be exact. If you don’t think your donation matters, think again — Matt takes $0 from corporate PACs and special interest groups and relies solely on grassroots donations to power our campaign. That’s why our average contribution this month is $13.23. = Hitting our fundraising goals means a lot for Matt. It proves to all of Oregon that our grassroots movement is here to win. Most of all, it sends a clear message to the GOP mega-money machine that they’ve got another thing coming if they think they’re going to come into our new district and take it. Science needs a new voice. name: Patty Murray
subject: One thing I know for sure
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We can’t afford to lose a single Democratic seat in 2022.
#
Peter,
When I was first elected to the Senate in 1992, just six Democratic women serving in the Senate was historic. Now, I’m honored to serve alongside 15 other trail-blazing Democratic women, including Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada and Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire.
Democratic women have been leading important fights in the Senate -- and we’ll keep at it as long as it takes to end the child care crisis, guarantee paid leave, and defend abortion rights.
And that’s _**exactly**_ why Mitch McConnell and the GOP want to defeat us in the midterms. I’m joining together with my friends Catherine and Maggie to make sure we end 2021 in the best position possible to defend and expand our Democratic majority -- and agenda -- in 2022.
**[We’ve set a $25,000 flash fundraising goal so we can finish 2021 in the strongest possible position to reelect Democratic women and defend our Senate majority. Please split $5 right now to Maggie Hassan, Catherine Cortez Masto, and my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39714664/321078319/-82313335?refcode=pm_em_211215_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTgyMjA3Zi1lZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3huDfXKGthPxKUultXf9XZKCZKQ-f3b2ClGFv7aibQ0=)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39714665/321078320/-82313335?refcode=pm_em_211215_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTgyMjA3Zi1lZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3huDfXKGthPxKUultXf9XZKCZKQ-f3b2ClGFv7aibQ0=)**
Are you ready to send Mitch McConnell a message, Peter? If we meet this $25,000 goal, we’ll be showing the GOP that we aren’t backing down from the fight to support working families and create an economy that works for everyone.
If there’s one thing I know for sure, it’s how powerful our voices can be when we join together. So I’m asking each of you to stand with us and ensure Democrats can keep working toward a stronger, fairer country.
**[Will you go on the record and support the Democratic women working to keep the Senate blue? Pitch in $5 to Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, and my campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39714666/321078321/-82313335?refcode=pm_em_211215_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTgyMjA3Zi1lZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3huDfXKGthPxKUultXf9XZKCZKQ-f3b2ClGFv7aibQ0=)**
Thank you,
Sen. Patty Murray (D-WA)
** **

body:
#

Hello friend,
I’m reaching out personally to ask if you can support my efforts to protect our democracy.
As we speak, Republicans are attacking our constitutional freedoms and stripping away our rights — and weaponizing the nation’s highest court to do their bidding.
They’re chipping away at our voting and reproductive rights, and it’s only a matter of time before they set us back decades by undoing our victories from the civil rights, feminist, and LGBTQ+ movements.
Congress has the power to stop this assault on our democracy, but it will require all of us to come together to get meaningful legislation signed into law.
**[With our mid-month fundraising deadline expiring tonight, will you pitch in a donation to help our campaign reach our goal? As we speak, Republicans are attacking our constitutional freedoms and stripping away our rights — and weaponizing the nation’s highest court to do their bidding. They’re chipping away at our voting and reproductive rights, and it’s only a matter of time before they set us back decades by undoing our victories from the civil rights, feminist, and LGBTQ+ movements. Congress has the power to stop this assault on our democracy, but it will require all of us to come together to get meaningful legislation signed into law. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = If Republicans take back control of Congress next year, they’ll use dark money and corporate interests to further undermine our democracy. body:
America is going in the wrong direction.
[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX2ludHJvZHVjdG9yeWVtYWlsXzEyMTMyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6Mjk0NDIsImVtYWlsaW5nSWQiOm51bGwsInYyRW1haWxpbmdJZCI6MTE4MTUsImZyb20iOiIwOWQ0YTZkMi0wMDA1LTQ3ZDctOGE2OS1mN2VmY2VjOWI2YTQifQ) Peter, I’m tired of watching what the Left is doing to our country. From rising violent crime to rapid inflation to the Left’s “cancelling” of our American way of life, the Left is dragging America down with them. _**That’s why I’ve decided to run for Congress in 2022.**_ My story is like many others all across Pennsylvania. I was raised in a union household **where I learned hard work, courage, and compassion.** I carry these values with me in all aspects of my life, and I plan on bringing them to Congress while in office. **My priorities while in Congress are:** [**BETTER EDUCATION**](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX2ludHJvZHVjdG9yeWVtYWlsXzEyMTMyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6Mjk0NDIsImVtYWlsaW5nSWQiOm51bGwsInYyRW1haWxpbmdJZCI6MTE4MTUsImZyb20iOiIwOWQ0YTZkMi0wMDA1LTQ3ZDctOGE2OS1mN2VmY2VjOWI2YTQifQ) [**BETTER OPPORTUNITIES**](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX2ludHJvZHVjdG9yeWVtYWlsXzEyMTMyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6Mjk0NDIsImVtYWlsaW5nSWQiOm51bGwsInYyRW1haWxpbmdJZCI6MTE4MTUsImZyb20iOiIwOWQ0YTZkMi0wMDA1LTQ3ZDctOGE2OS1mN2VmY2VjOWI2YTQifQ) [**BETTER SECURITY**](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX2ludHJvZHVjdG9yeWVtYWlsXzEyMTMyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6Mjk0NDIsImVtYWlsaW5nSWQiOm51bGwsInYyRW1haWxpbmdJZCI6MTE4MTUsImZyb20iOiIwOWQ0YTZkMi0wMDA1LTQ3ZDctOGE2OS1mN2VmY2VjOWI2YTQifQ) I will FIGHT to ensure that parents and children have school choice, that manufacturing be brought back to American soil, and that big tech companies be held accountable. It’s important to our families and our future generations that we stand up for change. We must focus on **AMERICA FIRST.** Can I count on you, Peter, to join me in this important fight to WIN BACK the House in 2022? [_**DONATE HERE >>**_](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX2ludHJvZHVjdG9yeWVtYWlsXzEyMTMyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6Mjk0NDIsImVtYWlsaW5nSWQiOm51bGwsInYyRW1haWxpbmdJZCI6MTE4MTUsImZyb20iOiIwOWQ0YTZkMi0wMDA1LTQ3ZDctOGE2OS1mN2VmY2VjOWI2YTQifQ) **A little background about me:** I am a first generation American and a lifelong resident of Pennsylvania. I was born and raised in Norristown after my family immigrated to America. I am a businessman, a community leader, and a candidate for Congress in Pennsylvania's Fourth Congressional District. But my most cherished titles are husband and father. **I’m running because I’m tired of watching what the Radical Left is doing to our country.****When I get to DC, I’ll be on the front lines fighting for the America First Agenda.** [_**Please CONTRIBUTE NOW to help me reclaim Congress for Republicans in 2022. >>**_](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX2ludHJvZHVjdG9yeWVtYWlsXzEyMTMyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6Mjk0NDIsImVtYWlsaW5nSWQiOm51bGwsInYyRW1haWxpbmdJZCI6MTE4MTUsImZyb20iOiIwOWQ0YTZkMi0wMDA1LTQ3ZDctOGE2OS1mN2VmY2VjOWI2YTQifQ) [**DONATE TODAY**](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX2ludHJvZHVjdG9yeWVtYWlsXzEyMTMyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6Mjk0NDIsImVtYWlsaW5nSWQiOm51bGwsInYyRW1haWxpbmdJZCI6MTE4MTUsImZyb20iOiIwOWQ0YTZkMi0wMDA1LTQ3ZDctOGE2OS1mN2VmY2VjOWI2YTQifQ) Sincerely,

My story is like many others all across Pennsylvania. I was raised in a union household where I learned hard work, courage, and compassion. I carry these values with me in all aspects of my life, and I plan on bringing them to Congress while in office. My priorities while in Congress are: I will FIGHT to ensure that parents and children have school choice, that manufacturing be brought back to American soil, and that big tech companies be held accountable. It’s important to our families and our future generations that we stand up for change. We must focus on AMERICA FIRST. Can I count on you, Peter, to join me in this important fight to WIN BACK the House in 2022? A little background about me: I am a first generation American and a lifelong resident of Pennsylvania. I was born and raised in Norristown after my family immigrated to America. I am a businessman, a community leader, and a candidate for Congress in Pennsylvania's Fourth Congressional District. But my most cherished titles are husband and father. I’m running because I’m tired of watching what the Radical Left is doing to our country.When I get to DC, I’ll be on the front lines fighting for the America First Agenda. Sincerely, Christian Nascimento | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by The Friends of Christian Nascimento

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: I’ve Had Enough... + Debate TONIGHT!
body:
| Peter -- I used to take freedom for granted. Covid was the great societal stress test of our time, exposing society’s weaknesses and revealing that many of us took certain freedoms for granted. When our freedoms were being stolen before our eyes, **people began to wake up.** They took away your ability to pay your rent and feed your family. They banned so called ‘elective procedures’ forcing myself and many others to lay off employees. They are unnecessarily restricting the use of Covid treatments and pursuing a vaccine only strategy. By doing so they are continuing to cause unnecessary Covid deaths, adhering to political science rather than actual science. Lisa Hansen, an American hero, is going to be jailed for serving people food when Walz said she wasn’t allowed to. They are *still* incarcerating people for no other reason than refusing to comply with the dictates of a petty tyrant. We violated no laws, and simply went about our peaceful daily business. They are stunting your child’s growth and development by defending and over-funding a failing education system. They’re indoctrinating your kids with racist, Marxist CRT. All of this has clearly demonstrated that freedom is not free. Freedom is something that needs to be fought for. **As your next governor, I will be that fighter.** We have a unique opportunity to send an authentic, principled conservative to Saint Paul next year. I decided to run because if we were left with the same old candidates, the same old career politicians, our freedoms will continue to disappear. Some others who are running are interested in having conversations with the radical left. Some were content playing defense for a whole decade in office! They’re okay settling for letting leftist tyrants take a little of your freedom each time, instead of a lot. **I’ve had enough of sending politicians to Saint Paul again and again who reliably fail at fulfilling their promises to defend your freedoms.** We have a choice. We can send a statesman to Saint Paul who is principled enough to simply say no to more taxes, no to useless regulations, and no to growing government every single time. It’s not hard. Just say no. I cannot do this without your help. [We need people to go to caucus for us, to support us as delegates to the GOP State Convention in May](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rHIMENRQT5AKoWG-e4wjsE6PmOi69xTq33Skw-UbFh4z&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_1&n=1), and people who can pitch in financially to help us get our message out to all Minnesotans. I am asking everyone reading this email to stand up and fight. **Take action to defend freedom, because without taking action, your freedoms will continue to be stolen from you.[Please Pitch in $25, $50, $100, $250, or more](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_1&n=2) to help send a dynamic, uncompromising conservative up against Walz next year.** We can’t settle for the same old because we’re running out of time. Will you fight with me? Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor electneil.com PS: Please be sure to tune in to tonight’s debate! It will be broadcast live on AM1280 The Patriot and live streamed online by Alpha News. You won’t want to miss this one!
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_1&n=3). -=-=-

name: Never Again PAC
subject: It's National Bill of Rights Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
On this day 226 years ago, the framers of the Constitution ratified a document to codify the rights of the American people into a series of ten amendments. This timeless document would go on to form a major part of the Constitution, and it's recognized worldwide as a tenet of the modern democracies in protecting the rights of citizens and upholding government as we know it today. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39714878/321079257/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiN2Y5NjJmLWVlNWQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N8ElN6keZiaYLGaEDyT2YnhsQib2S_9b-H95uSzpGIo=&emci=74115320-e15d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1b7f962f-ee5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16335001) Do you know what today is, team? **Today is the National Bill of Rights Day!**

On this day 226 years ago, the framers of the Constitution ratified a document to codify the rights of the American people into a series of ten amendments. This timeless document would go on to form a major part of the Constitution, and it's recognized worldwide as a tenet of the modern democracies in protecting the rights of citizens and upholding government as we know it today.

These freedoms in the Bill of Rights -- along with the following amendments – are what allowed the American people to elect a president on November 8th, 2020, that represented their values and who would work to erase the backwards errors of the last administration.

But what we didn't see is people -- including Republican members of Congress -- organizing behind closed doors and planning to stage a coup at the nation's Capitol on the day of the presidential inauguration. This insurrection in the name of the Big Lie was a clear attempt to destabilize our democracy and a direct attack on the principles outlined in our Constitution.

We at Never Again PAC are working day and night to ensure that those Republicans in Congress who helped instigate the January 6 insurrection are removed from office. **[Will you make a $5 donation today to help us fight for accountability and ensure that members of the Treason Caucus are voted out?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39714879/321079258/3877195?refcode=em21_211215_mm1_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211215_mm1_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiN2Y5NjJmLWVlNWQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N8ElN6keZiaYLGaEDyT2YnhsQib2S_9b-H95uSzpGIo=)**

Thank you,

Never Again PAC

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Make it possible for a conservative student
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8209%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=XX1Zj3aw%2f2qwsWlGJv9cjg&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10749%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qXD4jJscuIpNDNHS%2ficBJw&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10749%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qXD4jJscuIpNDNHS%2ficBJw&sysid=1) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ --and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021 --but we need your help to do it.**** **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10740%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=It63rDlHrLBAdGFWag9R7Q&sysid=1) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10741%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8X2o9zzEQgIgxY91R3sy4w&sysid=1)**[?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10742%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nCZhENpSzcC6S%2b6b4hjvWg&sysid=1) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10743%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S83TGEe7KykCE%2b5AhOE0jg&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Gift!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10744%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7GLjR0SqyfVJLeMTl4gptA&sysid=1)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TT7y0YbyARWWUCShOmqJxQ&sysid=1) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen--by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10856%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TcRLeJelqvWOfBG8haC58A&sysid=1)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10857%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0PN8IJi7Ha3rL0HC%2f%2bdxiA&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10858%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WpDonr5buJR6fDxuNOLOHA&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10859%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lM1ZaRUYFBTD%2fGEFt8Js%2bA&sysid=1)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on--_and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** --[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10850%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zymdnymaK3ih3TPnk1T7Ew&sysid=1)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8209%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=XX1Zj3aw%2f2qwsWlGJv9cjg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8209%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=XX1Zj3aw%2f2qwsWlGJv9cjg&sysid=1)

body:

| Friend,

We are halfway through December, and we are slightly pacing behind our upcoming **End-of-Year Goal**. With this being the final month of the year, the stakes couldn’t be higher.

With the election being less than a year away, Kathy Hochul has already begun courting her donors with an incredibly far-left agenda that they donate hundreds of thousands of dollars towards.

_That is why it is so important we stay on track with our goal._

Rob Astorino understands how important it is that we get ahead of Hochul and her _Albany Allies_ , which is why _he hasn’t stopped fighting for you, since day one._

[**Please contribute ANY AMOUNT in the NEXT HOUR to help us get back on track and CRUSH our End-of-Year Goal! >>**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=21cb86d590&e=3ca66fc65a)

clean_body: You’ve never let us down before. | | | | | Friend, We are halfway through December, and we are slightly pacing behind our upcoming End-of-Year Goal. With this being the final month of the year, the stakes couldn’t be higher. With the election being less than a year away, Kathy Hochul has already begun courting her donors with an incredibly far-left agenda that they donate hundreds of thousands of dollars towards. That is why it is so important we stay on track with our goal. Rob Astorino understands how important it is that we get ahead of Hochul and her Albany Allies , which is why he hasn’t stopped fighting for you, since day one. subject: $7.25 is not enough to live off of
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Look: There is so much work to be done in the Senate for Oklahomans like you and me, but James Lankford has made it clear that we aren’t his priority.

That’s why he’s voted time and again against raising the minimum wage, which has been stuck at $7.25 an hour for _nearly fifteen years._

While the cost of living has continued to rise, in most places the minimum wage doesn’t cover rent, food, or healthcare.

No one working full-time should struggle to pay for basic necessities because entrenched politicians like Lankford are standing in the way of commonsense solutions.

**[Today, I’m asking you to be one of the 800 people to sign a letter to demand action in raising the minimum wage now. Add your name to the petition now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39715098/321080366/1294284639?source=2021MinWage_OMH&referrer=group-oklahomans-for-madison-horn&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madison-up-dec21%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3DMH_EM_JA_1MO_211213_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_JA_1MO_211215_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQzYzRmNy1lZjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pf-YaCORd92aJv1PFM5SwQyslgA-caw4F0ex6BnKCP0=&emci=bd27832c-5658-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f543c4f7-ef5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5119200)**

---

Huge numbers of people in our state don’t earn enough to meet their cost of living and either work extra jobs to make ends meet, or go without.

For too long Oklahomans have had their needs ignored by the people we voted for and count on to represent us. This must change, and I will fight for this change.

**Enough is enough.[Please add your name to our petition and demand better wages for our workers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39715100/321080368/1294284639?source=2021MinWage_OMH&referrer=group-oklahomans-for-madison-horn&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madison-up-dec21%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3DMH_EM_JA_1MO_211213_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_JA_1MO_211215_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQzYzRmNy1lZjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pf-YaCORd92aJv1PFM5SwQyslgA-caw4F0ex6BnKCP0=&emci=bd27832c-5658-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f543c4f7-ef5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5119200)**

— Madison

* * *

| [CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39715101/321080369/230617363?amount=10&recurring=true&contactdata=9MddXKzptr2LW2nua0Mt6THSlcXZP7w%2Fq6YLiXNDgRAQT1MogbVMBseqhGhR98nI&refcode2=f543c4f7-ef5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MH_EM_JA_1MO_211215_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQzYzRmNy1lZjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pf-YaCORd92aJv1PFM5SwQyslgA-caw4F0ex6BnKCP0=)

Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by **[donating now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39715103/321080371/230617363?amount=10&contactdata=9MddXKzptr2LW2nua0Mt6THSlcXZP7w%2Fq6YLiXNDgRAQT1MogbVMBseqhGhR98nI&refcode2=f543c4f7-ef5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MH_EM_JA_1MO_211215_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTQzYzRmNy1lZjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pf-YaCORd92aJv1PFM5SwQyslgA-caw4F0ex6BnKCP0=)**

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zimtkbmsrubcfgq2554fdckhitvagl7d3tdm8skg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg64o36cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8o3ti1hh6ca7vf0ksjfietcdcb7spqshd0bdfag_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg64o36cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlojcb0v4ohckp382dsaf6oaq71i479icsaesqg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg64o36cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Make it possible for a conservative student
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z55407cgar6gkcetkqs3ijvqm3544tirh27b8njg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srkmarr8dj1etgnfcrme6p3ec5je3i72c3l6dq65dr7chgm2obhc4pm6oj465rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb2pjh6spm4ptmc1j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5taj9venmjotvddfq5256g7i0e8ahf3fr6sv69o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2bkk6gfg7s7s3roegq5bsg7qnhbs72oiuu23cfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsjm52afc5o7mj0o5hicmsvms5o3iea9vi8e9m38_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8fgdoaf2vv4g802vpd33uthhgpppt5g253gd57g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)**[?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfmp0hf49v3cpt9ivfl4nv7gp7mj0t3v2h9fugro_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztg0t1moifp8qn1qr24t5j7lcbe6rleohraus57o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkat2ueh85bqbs30rnr2ef95h9edp99r2n8imr28_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrndfjhv8leh2116nkhice5fct5hjn3k5hqegamo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb35qddlelfafp4ljftt5uj4eftlm5d6t85llgog_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq8d422ki0vlrv3q7pof91nqeo8h8a179vdq5aig_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ncolakflslt15vidq591rtpt3vbrgt1chalc2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9bc2f6qanot4dl8iut32tjq7406rc52v25apkv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhkh6qbl97htnsm9gt3vkpg7do043htpmh2at2k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg62o30c1h2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: we do things a little differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1736%2E3611125%2EXD7Ngt ][IMG]

Hello,

A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not
me.

I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we
had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I
watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family
members, friends, and neighbors.

I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking
up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy
donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks.

That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on
grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to
fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our end-of-year
fundraising goal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6278?t=1007&akid=1736%2E3611125%2EXD7Ngt ]Can you make a contribution today to help us reach our end-of-year
fundraising goal? I wouldn’t ask if it didn't make a difference.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6277?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1736%2E3611125%2EXD7Ngt ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6277?t=1010&amount=50&akid=1736%2E3611125%2EXD7Ngt ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6277?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1736%2E3611125%2EXD7Ngt ]Other Amount

Thank you so much for your support. I hope you know how grateful I am to
have this team by my side.

-- Tim

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bad news ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
A brand new super PAC just launched for Dr. Oz — there’s a money storm coming our way.
#
Derek,
Trust me, the *last* thing I want to be doing right now is emailing you about Dr. Oz.
But early yesterday, the news broke that big time GOP operatives just launched a super PAC to support Oz’s Senate campaign from the shadows.
**Make no mistake... Republicans are trying to BUY this Senate seat.** Dr. Oz has a reported net worth of $100 million! He’s already sunk more than $2 million dollars into TV ads. And now, a collection of ultra-rich mega donors can write _unlimited_ checks from the sidelines to a super PAC.
**We’ve got a rich Republican money storm coming our way.** The only way we can stop it is if tens of thousands of grassroots supporters join together now in a way we’ve _never_ seen in Pennsylvania before.
**[Will you help us raise an emergency $50,000 today to fight back? If about 2,000 of yinz can donate before midnight, we’d raise that much and send an unmistakable message that we will not allow Dr. Oz and his rich friends to buy this election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38267?refcode=em20211215-3845&t=1&akid=3845%2E434096%2EqvOuLo)**
**[Fight Back: Chip In Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38267?refcode=em20211215-3845&amount=&t=2&akid=3845%2E434096%2EqvOuLo)**
In every poll that’s come out, our campaign beats any Republican that we go up against. The latest poll shows we beat Dr. Oz despite all of his fame and wealth. But, it’s a close race — _just a two point margin between us and them._
**What should scare all of us is this *huge* surge of money.** If Oz and his powerful friends have unlimited sums of cash to spread lies on the airwaves, they might be able to buy their way to victory.
**The only way I know how to respond is with overwhelming grassroots momentum.** If we can get a couple thousand of our Team Fetterman supporters to chip in right now, we can raise $50,000 today and send a clear message about the kind of grassroots strength they’ll be up against.
**[Please, if you can afford it today, make a contribution to help us raise an emergency $50,000 to fight back against Dr. Oz’s new super PAC.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38267?refcode=em20211215-3845&t=3&akid=3845%2E434096%2EqvOuLo)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38267?refcode=em20211215-3845&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3845%2E434096%2EqvOuLo)**
Derek, it’s not an exaggeration to say this campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. Whether you can give today or not, I’m incredibly grateful that you’re on the team. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211215-3845-footer&t=23&refcode2=3845_434096_qvOuLo&akid=3845%2E434096%2EqvOuLo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3845%2E434096%2EqvOuLo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3845%2E434096%2EqvOuLo)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
Will you join us in pressuring the Senate to pass Build Back Better? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPOerGUCTV0LiQk9X90kxUovXCY8j5E43dpV9a9fP3SjtQ_HWYDSVr3Fb3RnGjRNy14n6qkPIibN0hk0A_OzlxQy5mNs-hZlBlLMbcLJ15vgr5PZQnKf3WPdF81N6G92B306TWtg4BGZDqYKKFBU73TXgGHLwSAaewROfiVmFgPxz6jXkkwyEat-DiJM8rZzJZi-lmWKlzvRazbNGwtH4ZuAP5iotjL4nffRUb4SG0l0T/3hv/vlxE81LRQ9GQtXJdnOg59Q/h0/fzJiG_h6FU3RM07EW7xOabCxCLnVsH5mm_34SUJTBPg)
Peter, The Build Back Better Act is the most consequential bill of Joe Biden's presidency. Passing this bill would mean expanded health care access, universal pre-K, major climate action, and so much more. Unfortunately, Senator Kyrsten Sinema has not yet confirmed that she is a "yes" vote — and we must do everything we possibly can to pressure her to commit to voting in favor of this groundbreaking bill. **[That's why we're excited to partner with More Perfect Union and other organizations to put pressure on the U.S. Senate — including Kyrsten Sinema — to pass the Build Back Better Act. clean_body: Will you join us in pressuring the Senate to pass Build Back Better? | | | Peter, The Build Back Better Act is the most consequential bill of Joe Biden's presidency. Passing this bill would mean expanded health care access, universal pre-K, major climate action, and so much more. Unfortunately, Senator Kyrsten Sinema has not yet confirmed that she is a "yes" vote — and we must do everything we possibly can to pressure her to commit to voting in favor of this groundbreaking bill. The Senate was supposed to pass the Build Back Better Act in mid-December. But because of Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema's obstructing and stalling — the Senate still has not put this critical piece of legislation up for a vote. Arizonans understand just how important this legislation is. Polling shows that Arizona Democrats are far more likely to support a candidate who supports the Build Back Better bill in full. Not to mention, Biden administration policies like the American Rescue Plan have proven wildly popular with the American people, and have provided relief during a global pandemic. We're calling on Kyrsten Sinema to stop playing political games and start delivering for her constituents. She has delayed and gutted Build Back Better enough, and the Senate must vote "YES" — including Sinema herself. — Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: | = Michael is fighting to protect your right to vote. He has been fighting for a sweeping reform package this year to strengthen our democracy, fight corruption, and make our government work for people like you. This bill is critical after Republicans buckled-down on Trump’s Big Lie and introduced anti-voter legislation in states across the country. And one of those Republicans is running to take his seat. This insurrectionist has proudly admitted to crossing the police line in the January 6th Capitol attack. Since then, he’s travelled around amplifying conspiracy theories about election fraud and just this month he spoke at a rally promoting Trump’s baseless claims. Colorado had the second highest voter turnout in the nation thanks to accessible voting practices and Michael’s opponent wants to do away with measures that make voting easy and safe, like vote-by-mail. He doesn’t represent Colorado’s values, and if elected to the Senate he could be an even bigger threat to voting rights here in Colorado and nationwide. We need your help to keep leaders like Michael in the Senate but National Republicans and this far-right opponent are targeting his seat. They want to flip Colorado and the Senate, and continue threatening voting rights. So we need your help. Make a donation today to help reelect Michael to the Senate so he can continue fighting to protect your right to vote. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= It’s going to take a grassroots movement to keep pro-democracy leaders like Michael in the Senate. I really want to avoid sending you a blitz of emails, all in just a few short days, asking for your help to make our end-of-quarter goals. After all, this time of year should be shared with your family, _not_ managing your inbox.

**I want to be respectful of your time, but I also need you to know that, based on our current trajectory, we won't make the mark without the support of grassroots donors like you.**

I know you don't need me to tell you that the stakes are incredibly high for the coming midterm election. Everything is on the line, from a woman’s right to choose to tackling the climate crisis while there’s still time.

**[Team, can you chip in $5, or anything you can, to hit our goal and avoid the end-of-year scramble? clean_body: | = Hi team, This picture is exactly what I do not want for you this month. | = I really want to avoid sending you a blitz of emails, all in just a few short days, asking for your help to make our end-of-quarter goals. After all, this time of year should be shared with your family, not managing your inbox. I want to be respectful of your time, but I also need you to know that, based on our current trajectory, we won't make the mark without the support of grassroots donors like you. I know you don't need me to tell you that the stakes are incredibly high for the coming midterm election. Everything is on the line, from a woman’s right to choose to tackling the climate crisis while there’s still time. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much, Kara Hahn Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. **For every $5 that the campaign raises, we’re able to run at least one ad on Facebook to reach folks across the state.**
The more we’re able to raise, the more people we can reach --- and to be honest, we’re going to need help from Democrats across the country to defend Steve Sisolak.

Digital ads are vitally important for our campaign. They help bring in more people to join our fight AND generate the crucial financial support that we need to keep our momentum going. | | | | | | | | | | | | | For every $5 that the campaign raises, we’re able to run at least one ad on Facebook to reach folks across the state. The more we’re able to raise, the more people we can reach --- and to be honest, we’re going to need help from Democrats across the country to defend Steve Sisolak. Republicans are dead-set on flipping Nevada bright red in 2022, and Steve is their #1 target. Both the Senate GOP campaign arm AND Fox News have already attacked Abby – and even Donald Trump rallied in Iowa with Sen. Grassley, where he gave Grassley his "complete and total endorsement." National Republicans are fighting to protect Grassley. That's why Democrats cannot afford a single misstep in Iowa – and right now, Abby is falling short of her $50,000 mid-month fundraising goal just ahead of a critical end-of-quarter, public FEC deadline. To make up this gap, we need a major influx of grassroots donations before our mid-month deadline at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT, so we pulled the numbers to show you where things stand: | | GRASSROOTS DONOR RECORD Supporter: Peter Donation on File: No donation to defeat Sen. subject: My heart sank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:
_Sponsored message_

|
| | | It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0vh8nmqn7in7jhjlu5slo3l7uf402p3c7ommg70_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6aor2c5h2bs)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z30mg2kpmq6d8egijmbmmef64lprct7v2n0pvj48_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6aor2c5h2bs)
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg8rmbenvnh2vp016cdst3mf9o3oe63veubfss5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6aor2c5h2bs)**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3irvvk7okerbdnkfq0ahsmkg6rgnvqq5hl172vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6aor2c5h2bs)**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zl6hvpe60riqgdnol0ji6c0r5cgi6j6cf86ln4b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6aor2c5h2bs)
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs666msladuu9b73pcl2lfm34vuhhkcfnt2l39p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6aor2c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3ogqg3lse09fo9e6phpq2jqea04299n0n07loto_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6aor2c5h2bs)
---
Dan Crenshaw

---
|

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m proud to call myself a conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I've officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkFFv2yAUhX8NecPC1xA7D35IE1eZ1G1aq1Xak4XhukbC2AOcKv31w166h0kIie_cc8Q9uuas2Au-MzUwyHPIRV7mLD9kfVUh4xXvBWAvqoJwpiYX0F9lNFek0qKPIVPTuBtqkLpjh7wXslcc1F5XXHRcsp7JnnMOO1sPMc6BFEcCj-kEVIvH7N04j3oNSSyiHOmAPqgBLTVOJWbl4tRAr0bjRIOknhSPSxzbMC1eISnOHq8E9itScpyleXMJ_nXd-YjaLGOiOEpjEwwqPdZt2QHy9tI8v5wuzVPbNO3LsX06_vx2utDXL-fme_vcvCb2mT-5iC4mr1OWlg9jFZz-cftIcuus0Un4D4YNEhAelZlNMmcBnW6XJQkgtpnB6NTK-Ven4--v887Xen431pqwL1Pjb-uXt47Tctb0t5qUDwRgcwFsdUKnKyl5JQXtbgX98K5ZJTilO95m_Dd3j8juPQApz38ALLShxQ)

---
Friend,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I want to tell you why I am running for United States Senate.](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkEFv3CAUhH8Ne8PCGNbswYftrtONlLZSokbqycLwHCNh7AB25P76YnebQyWExDdvRrzRFSPFkbODqSiheU5znpc5yU9ZJwQQJljHKXRcFIgRNboAfpHRLIClBR9Dpsbh0FeKtx0nRLcgiOA655wJAupEjvTUdowdbNXHOAVUnBF9SCeAmj1kH8Z50FtIYhHkgHvwQfVgsXEqMStnp3q8GA0jDhJ7VDzMcWjCOHsFqLh6WBA9bkjJYZLmzSX413XnA2gzD4nCII1NMKj02LYlJ5o3t_r55XKrn5q6bl7OzdP55_fLDb8-XusfzXP9mti__NFFcDF5nbJ4ictQynX9qpPcOGt0Ev6DYYeIcg_KTCaZswBON_OcBMr3md7o1Mr1V6vj-7fp4Cs9fRhrTTiWqfG37ct7x2k5a7q1QuUXROnuonSvk7ZaSMmE5LhdC_zbu3qT6CXdcZ3gc-4ekd17oKi8_gHmd6H_)**

[](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkEGP2yAQhX8NuWHhsSHOwYc08SorbdpqV12pJ4vAOEbC2As4q_TXF7tpD5UQEt-b98Q8XZesELzcmBoY5DnkPN_mLN9lXVUhK6uy44AdrwpSMjW6gP4mo7khlRZ9DJkah01fVyLFoFRMcew6satyEHnJmEKmBK_ExtZ9jFMgxZ7AUzoB1ewx-zTOo15CEosoB9qjD6pHS41TiVk5O9XTm9E40iCpJ8XTHIc2jLNXSIqjxxsBsSAlh0maq0vwj-vBB9RmHhLFQRqbYFDpsWzLdpC3p-b17XBqXtqmad_27cv-x9fDib4_H5tv7Wvzntjf_NFFdDF5nbK0O5_1d3GFBEC0zhqdhP9gWCEB7lGZySRzFtDpdp6TAHyd6Y1OrRx_XnT8OE8bX-vp01hrgtimxq_Ll9eO03LWdPeabL8QgNUFsNYJF11JWVaS08u9oL-8axYJDumO9wn_zT0iskcPQLbH368AoJM)
>From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Friend, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams – just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us – not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkE9v4yAQxT8NuWEZMP5z8CFNnKartlul2ko9WQTGNRLGXsCpsp--2JvuYSU0Er-Z9zTzVJ2lLOfZRtc0pYRQwklBUlIlXVlCmpVZxyl0vGQoS-VoPbiLCPoCWBhwwSdyHDZ9XchMiIqcSVXkXDDFWEUYlFXKGeuk7Dam7kOYPGJbRA_xeZCzg-RTWwdqMYksgBhwD87LHgzWVkZmxGxljy9awYi9wA6xwxyG1o-zk4DY3sEF0XxBUgyT0B82wr-qGx9A6XmIFAahTYRexs9ybVpR0h6b0-vu2Dy2TdO-btvH7a_n3RG_Peybn-2peYvs23-0AWyIWisNPtwfn8vDy49T3DxvrdEqNv6DfoWIcgdSTzqKEw9WtfMcG5SvM71WMZX9-1mF30_TxtVq-tTGaJ8XMfGPZeU143ic0d21RsUdonRVUbrGSc-qFCIrBcfnK8N_nG2WFt3FGq4T_Ju7WSS3HCgq9l9pRp_z) **

Friend, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkEGPmzAQhX-NczMyBidw4JAmRKl220pZdauekLGHxZIx1Dassr--A017qGRZ8vfmPXmernKW7UW-MxVnPE15KtJDytIy6YoCWF7kneDQiSIjOVOjC-AXGc0CVFrwMSRqHHZ91QLTpZZ52hZSFKJMWalhz9pMZlrIstvZqo9xCiQ7En7BE0DNHpJ34zzoNQRZBDnQHnxQPVhqnEJm5exUTxejYaRBUk-yyxyHJoyzV0Cys4eF8P2KlBwmad4cwj-uBx9Am3lACoM0FmFQ-Fi3ZSVPm2t9ezld6-emrpuXY_N8_P71dKWvn8_1t-ZWvyL7mz-6CC6i1ylLnz5kvPy4PS2AcuOs0Sj8B8MGCRcelJkMmpMATjfzjAIX20xvNLZy_tnq-OvLtPOVnt6NtSbsD9j42_rlrWNczpruXpHDJ8L55uJ8q5O3upAyx-Jpe8_oh3f1KvET3vE-wb-5R0Ty6IGTw_k3VLSh5g)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxVkFGLozAUhX9N-hbRq9bMgw_d1tKFdhY6zMA-SUyuNRCjk0RL99dvdDsDCyGQ79xzyD2yzOJ0m2cbVUIMSQJJnhRJnLxELWMYZyxrc8A2ZynJYjEYh3bmXs1IuUbrXSSGftOVRRYzAGSIjWRtkosWeFywBnnbCFHIjS4770dH0h2BYzgOxWQxuitjUS4hgXnkPe3QOtGhpsqIwDSfjOjorCQO1HFqSXqcfF-7YbICSXqwOBPYLkjwfuTqZgL853ryHqWa-kCx50oH6ER4LNvGL5DUp-r6tj9V57qq6rddfd69v-5P9OPnofpVX6uPwL7yB-PR-OA1QlO4tJfrbIubC3JttJJL6P_QrZBAblGoUQVz5NDIepqCAPk60ykZWjn8bqT_vIwbW8rxrrRWbluExm_Ll9eOw3JatY-SFD8IwOoCWOuEUDnnGeM5bR4p_WNNtUiwD7d_jPg994yInj0AKQ5_AfW1ohc)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkM1q4zAUhZ9G2cnIsmU7Cy8yiUsG-gMNU5iVUa5uaoEsu5LskD59ZTfTxYAQ6Dv3HHSPqnOWFSLf6JoznqY8FWmZsnSbXKoKWV7lF8HxIqqM5AwG69HNMugZqTTogk9g6DddnYsyAwDJAASUomCiEPwsGBNMqQzExtRdCKMn2Y7wh3g8wuQwuWrrUC0hkQWUPe3QeejQUG0hMiMnCx2dtcKBekkdyR6m0Ld-mBwgyQ4OZ8KLBYHsR6nfbYTfrjvvUempjxR7qU2EHuJj2ZZtedoem9fT_tg8tk3Tnnbt4-7P8_5I334fmpf2tXmL7F_-YAPaEL0WDC23p-dr0cxTE-XWGq2i8B_0KyRcOAQ96mhOPFrVTlMUuFhnOq1iK4e_ZxU-nsaNq9V41cZoX5Sx8ffly2vHcTmjL7ealL8I56uL87VOflaVlHklBT3fMvrpbLNIfB_vcBvxZ-4ekdx74KQ8fAGXE6BN)

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: Insurrectionists shouldn’t serve in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene.

name: Team Kina
subject: We deserve more than thoughts & prayers.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
We need to focus on the root causes of violence. That means investment in prevention. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s19Gtg7wbfuHS-RNkQ0ki82AcgQuqImL3Tuoi_7N-KrasD6NbO7thO9Np3Cf6RoXvsvywksoZBm19Pp_yHeRtQ0oafjo4CS0Jc1VLxAGqaXcT_is8tz_GtBW6vP13EXSxM8xR90N_TdQCEOdxEiIpzFEJFG9-i9y01Um8yopu7TZ1JaoixkQXTuG5ibma8b5yArH0ibI9WOXWJwpQd0YuEyhiqySTNn_8ZYr6rcJl7MEE0ASTCSUb4twE9huRPhmvg/3hv/9y1A7VoiShOi2O549xZ6mQ/h0/iccJ481Z_LZlw1JEza4kHpgSOZAAQX_IDVHpHTy-WV8) Team, This week, [NPR’s All Things Considered](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDCa77cl0PSDG3H5DRHo4OWtwCn67CSk_v9IjtsI17e7d6OFOo3ap86H6PN4mMVTSHsu9n-YAYH3uSXW26r1ZVhMVyss8n1LB4EsoiUt5qp4Uld7LiWAtZcqFcps05u-Fm7_ThSGQeua7Xy6daJfz7XaTOl-KvobOgeiUCDJ6_yejmrPA5HVlzOXJW0w-1RIXBC6StfazFROY5sSsBBMXe1CiPMMh8MIaYLFus5POoDmZc8OID5PXxlnmYyHSvBnxbf3I0DCXFI6SD9wZxg2KDQdc9JMqnI38vYxK9zMLd6FDi0IY2IRp8vttfwoB8QwbrL6mfZTwOxZakT6v10bbx1UuPYLc-B3oukT1lmnEjlp6BJ5FK7T1wWnHzDlTDn71nUQOV7ZhHsycAlfCXurIqryVZINBYW2xJw4ZIvvuhEQe/3hv/9y1A7VoiShOi2O549xZ6mQ/h1/w8tJ7WZ6IiHtkL8Tod7jBBnGnBsbef1l5O8AYsH0vJk) featured Kina in a story on gun violence survivors running for office. As a child, Kina witnessed a shooting in front of her home. She knew the child who was killed, and she knew the shooter. Kina has been personally touched by gun violence, and she is determined to break its grip on her community. But when we talk about gun violence, too often, the focus is on reaction, not prevention. The shooters in our communities are not born wanting to be shooters. Society turns them into these shooters, and our leaders need to be investing in prevention instead of reaction. Kina was the executive director of the largest gun violence prevention organization in IL. She knows gun violence first hand, and she has the experience we need in Congress, NOW. clean_body: We need to focus on the root causes of violence. That means investment in prevention. | | | Team, This week, featured Kina in a story on gun violence survivors running for office. As a child, Kina witnessed a shooting in front of her home. She knew the child who was killed, and she knew the shooter. Kina has been personally touched by gun violence, and she is determined to break its grip on her community. But when we talk about gun violence, too often, the focus is on reaction, not prevention. The shooters in our communities are not born wanting to be shooters. Society turns them into these shooters, and our leaders need to be investing in prevention instead of reaction. Kina was the executive director of the largest gun violence prevention organization in IL. She knows gun violence first hand, and she has the experience we need in Congress, NOW. On her first day in Congress, Kina’s job will be to focus on the root causes of violence. That means pushing for a Congress that is proactive and not just reactive when tragedy strikes. That is the leadership we need, and the change we deserve. Thank you, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Fighting Big Polluter disinformation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We need to keep our ads up and make sure the right people are seeing them.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4092?t=3&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb) Friend, Big news: We're launching a massive new ad campaign to fight Big Polluter disinformation with the simple truth that clean energy is cheap energy. We're making sure that D.C. gets the message: If the Senate wants to protect American families from rising fossil fuel costs, it must pass the Build Back Better Act and invest in clean energy. Because—say it with us now— _clean energy is cheap energy._ But we're a scrappy people-powered organization up against dark money and disinformation experts. If we want a chance at changing the narrative, we need to keep our ads up and make sure the right people are seeing them. [**_Can you please chip in to keep our clean energy ads up?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4092?t=4&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4101?t=5&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
---
| | [$15 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4102?t=6&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4098?t=7&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4099?t=8&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4100?t=9&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4098?t=10&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
---
Here's a fact that Big Polluters don't want you to know:
Fossil fuels are getting more expensive by the day. Americans are paying more at the gas pump than they were a year ago (just this week, oil prices jumped to a seven-year high), and natural gas prices have gone up over 150% in the past year. That's compared to clean energy which is getting cheaper by the day, with wind energy dropping precipitously and solar energy now the cheapest electricity in history.
And that adds up for families and businesses: The clean energy investments in the Build Back Better Act will save utility companies and customers across the country $9 billion each year by 2030.
Of course, you wouldn't know any of this from the million dollar ad campaigns that Big Polluters are plastering all over the TV and web.
Policymakers need to hear the truth, and they need to hear it now: Clean energy is cheap energy. Our ads make it clear—and they make it clear how passing the Build Back Better Act will bring forth our clean energy future—but we need your help to make sure they're being seen by the right people. [**_If you're with us in the fight against Big Polluter disinformation, donate today to help us launch our ads campaign and keep them running until Build Back Better is passed._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4092?t=11&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
To our clean energy future,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action
[DONATE!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4092?t=12&akid=12923%2E53494%2EBMaFOb)
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: The Enemy Within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock you or scare you --_I say it because it’s true._ And I say it with confidence because when I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. **My name is David Horowitz, and 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.** I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in this fight, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $45 or more to my Freedom Center.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68838%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tUK%2fRBWjD0KgUtwK0YUX3A&sysid=1)** _What we’re seeing today didn’t happen overnight. It’s no coincidence. It’s no stroke of luck._ **It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making.** For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, exposing this sinister movement and warning of what was to come. America’s domestic enemies have smeared us every step of the way, and worked around the clock to cut off both political and financial support to silence us for good. We’ve been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center, and so many more because we’re willing to say and do what no one else would to expose the enemy within. That's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now - how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, de-platform, and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68839%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsRLoGFFpcxmTEPW3nhQ%2fw&sysid=1) **“A Great Book” - Dinesh D’Souza** **“The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” - Mark Levin** **“David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $45 or more to the Freedom Center today](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68830%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f9%2bTkk27l8pXb%2fJkbKdu6A&sysid=1)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make it better -- they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat, or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can. Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $45 or more to the Freedom Center today](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68831%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u00EaGfaUU6%2bw642oMGDrA&sysid=1)** , and as a thank you for your generous support, I’ll reserve a complimentary copy of my latest book _The Enemy Within_ for you, explaining this in depth. **\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
From: Randy Bryce via, RasForIowa.com
Date: Wed, Dec 15 1:10 pm
Subject: Why I'm endorsing Ras Smith

My name is Randy Bryce, but you might also know me as "Iron Stache." I'm the iron worker who took on former House Speaker Paul Ryan in Wisconsin in 2018. We came close to flipping that district, and then I launched an organization called IRON PAC to support working class candidates running for office across the country.

**Today, I'm thrilled to announce I'm endorsing Ras Smith for governor in Iowa.**

I just had the opportunity to talk to Ras about his campaign. I'm impressed with how many people he's reaching, the endorsements he's garnered, and his plan for the future of the state of Iowa.

**There's no doubt in my mind that he'll be a fantastic governor, and will help the hard-working people of Iowa. That's why I'm asking:**

[**Ras Smith can win this race, but he needs our help. Will you chip in $3 to join me in supporting his campaign? Thanks so much for your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39716624/321086907/-73891749?refcode=em-121521-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZhYzE5MS1mNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_8ArePhkA2c9EOEjTw0BM2lj9JGLYwoM40MrGtEpfg=)
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39716625/321086908/-73891749?refcode=em-121521-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZhYzE5MS1mNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_8ArePhkA2c9EOEjTw0BM2lj9JGLYwoM40MrGtEpfg=)**
---

clean_body: he'll be a great governor and help the hard-working people of Iowa. | = Did you get a chance to see Randy's endorsement below, friend? = At the end of the year, our fundraising numbers will become public for all to see. I need your support making sure we put up the strongest report possible. I wouldn't ask if it weren't critically important. Thanks in advance for = \- Ras | = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Randy Bryce via, RasForIowa.com Date: Wed, Dec 15 1:10 pm Subject: Why I'm endorsing Ras Smith My name is Randy Bryce, but you might also know me as "Iron Stache." I'm the iron worker who took on former House Speaker Paul Ryan in Wisconsin in 2018. We came close to flipping that district, and then I launched an organization called IRON PAC to support working class candidates running for office across the country. Today, I'm thrilled to announce I'm endorsing Ras Smith for governor in Iowa. I just had the opportunity to talk to Ras about his campaign. I'm impressed with how many people he's reaching, the endorsements he's garnered, and his plan for the future of the state of Iowa. There's no doubt in my mind that he'll be a fantastic governor, and will help the hard-working people of Iowa. That's why I'm asking: = = We need people like Ras Smith in office to help us take back our country from corporate Democrats and far-right Republicans. We need people like Ras who not only understand the struggles working families go through, but live them every day. That's why I'm supporting Ras, and why I'm asking for your support to help him meet his fundraising goal. = Thanks in advance, = Randy Bryce "Iron Stache" = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P.
