**_I have hope for my Liberal friends ...jellyfish have survived for more than 165 million years without a brain, so there is hope for a few of them._**

Just going over the numbers so far and it's looking like it could be one of my worst months in recent memory. I’m not asking for much, but a few dollars would go a long way in gearing up for the 2022 Election cycle.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Unapologetic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
I Have No Problem Saying It [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6686%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2b4NLs1XEivEQMO8D1oX9nQ&sysid=1)
I Have No Problem Saying It

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68845%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lhk1M4iuJR3%2b0udQhobdqw&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

_I have said it before, but**I am unapologetically Pro-Life.**_

In today's age, that seems to be a very unpopular opinion, but I am not afraid to stand up for what I believe in.

Is that not what our country is about? Fighting for those who cannot fight for themselves and standing up for what you believe in. It is what makes America beautiful and the greatest country in the world.

name: Governor Parris Glendening
subject: Why I’m endorsing Wes
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39716984/321088159/1512802716?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215glendening_gpg_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTg4OTAyNy1mOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvQrLNpFyGSaDke5VJFkF4sjfNIqaNeCcI9BBfGsjzE=)
---
Hello friend, **I’m Governor Parris Glendening, and today, I’m excited to endorse Wes Moore for Governor of Maryland.** We all know that elections have consequences. For Maryland, the 2022 gubernatorial election is among the most consequential in my lifetime. We are emerging from a pandemic that exposed inequities that have simmered for generations, and our opportunity to address the climate crisis – an issue near to my heart – is rapidly closing. Our state has great resources and great wealth, but also has large disparities in opportunity and access to progress. So many of the issues I have devoted my life to are on the line. Wes Moore’s campaign for Maryland Governor is a momentous opportunity to bring real executive leadership to meet these challenges. _Wes is meeting this moment and turning it into a movement._ That’s why today, I am proud to officially join his movement. I know executive leadership. I served three terms as county executive in Prince George’s County, and two terms as Governor of Maryland. I know what this job takes. **And when I look at the field of candidates and the challenges we face, I know whose leadership I trust – Wes Moore’s.** I am inspired by his commitment to expand work, wages, and wealth; and the comprehensive policy plans he has detailed to make them a reality for families in Maryland. Wes’ candidacy and his leadership shown through a career in public service have inspired me to do all in my power to help make him the next Governor of Maryland. Be it his service leading soldiers in combat in Afghanistan, his experience building a small business here in Maryland, or his work leading one of the largest nonprofits in the United States and fighting for policy changes — **Wes Moore is uniquely and deeply qualified to be the next governor of Maryland, and I am inspired to do everything in my power to help make Wes Moore our Governor.** **[Join me: make a grassroots contribution of $10 or whatever you can spare to fuel this campaign to victory and create a better, stronger Maryland for us all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39716985/321088160/1512802716?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211215glendening_gpg_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTg4OTAyNy1mOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvQrLNpFyGSaDke5VJFkF4sjfNIqaNeCcI9BBfGsjzE=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: Volunteer for Dr. Ameena this holiday season!
body:
We need you to help knock doors and make phonecalls! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c29460a13ad6/volunteer-for-dr-ameena-this-holiday-season?e=5fba611a2c)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
# Volunteer with Dr. Ameena this holiday season!
It's a great time to be out with family and friends - and that makes it a perfect time to be reaching out to our neighbors in the 1st District.

We have two opportunities for us to do that. First, you can join us for a virtual phone bank! [We'll be making calls to the 1st District tonight](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=8dbc80feed&e=5fba611a2c). We are using Voter Atlas, an easy online platform. And once you are all set up, you'll be able to keep making calls from your home.

[Second, we will be knocking on doors again this Saturday! ](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=5da2b1a975&e=5fba611a2c) We will be meeting at 10 am at 607 E. 75th Street. Come out for some fresh air and get a chance to chat with folks in the community. We will be masked up and wearing plenty of layers!

And while it is unfortunate that we had to postpone our fundraiser with Vic Mensa, please know that we have [rescheduled for February 9th](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=36b8133d61&e=5fba611a2c)! Save the date!

Jessica Olson
Campaign Organizer
708-762-9183
---
| | | | | | | [](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=8185261ac4&e=5fba611a2c)

| | **Kim Schrier** is more than just a terrific member of Congress. She is our neighbor, a Democratic champion from the Seattle suburbs all the way over to Wenatchee. Now that we have got new maps, we have a full picture of Kim's battleground. And this election will not be any easier than it was in 2018 and 2020, when she got just 52% of the vote. Hers is the toughest swing district in Washington, and she is the #1 target of Republican political operatives in DC. Kim is organizing hard, but across the country, Republicans have been perfecting their suite of dirty tricks — anonymous piles of corporate cash, spent on attack ads that rely on racism and lies, and blatant attempts to undermine the fair administration of elections. [**Would you please consider chipping in $6 right now to help Congresswoman Schrier keep up her terrific work in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39717014/321088328/1306044607?refcode=2021-12-10-schrier&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b6437274-f95d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQzNzI3NC1mOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YtVVd3t92QmJv4LUi2T83L8udbODKhau59My_lqWWg=) The pandemic has been tough on us here in Northwest Washington. So too have the challenges of climate change, earning a living, and making health care, housing, and child care more affordable. Kim gets that, and has always worked her heart out for her constituents. She builds consensus. She engages directly with the people she represents. And she remains true to the Democratic values that got her elected in the first place. [Donate to support Kim! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39717015/321088329/1306044607?refcode=2021-12-10-schrier&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b6437274-f95d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQzNzI3NC1mOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YtVVd3t92QmJv4LUi2T83L8udbODKhau59My_lqWWg=) **But, as we have seen in the last few weeks, we must not take anything for granted.** I am sure you watched our party's struggles in recent elections with as much concern as I have. And, of course, the media and our opponents are claiming this could be just the beginning. **I'm still quite optimistic and confident. After all, robust organizing around Democratic values and solutions that help real people remain the best way forward, both for Democrats who want to win elections and for the future of our country.** Kim has proven that before, but needs our strong support given the challenges she is facing. This is Washington state's toughest battleground district. [**Please join me with an $6 donation to our own Kim Schrier today. We need to keep control of Congress to move our agenda forward, and Kim's seat is at the heart of that fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39717016/321088330/1306044607?refcode=2021-12-10-schrier&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b6437274-f95d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjQzNzI3NC1mOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YtVVd3t92QmJv4LUi2T83L8udbODKhau59My_lqWWg=) Kim has proven that before, but needs our strong support given the challenges she is facing. This is Washington state's toughest battleground district. = Rick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. ---|--- | This email was sent by . name: Christian Collins for Congress
subject: Abortion is NOT a Political Issue!
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XdX2UC8gF6Xqs-SbZrTAQiCgu_vmV8vtR3mgojebixt8FxIUGXnFLSDXW0Egs1s7-68aqtzaS_ttU-ZwfIDYA3Y9kO0R8p5Tmec7agswsLNUWoG_OqiKrLaXEw4ho0mNQJmeLmDmJqT33uIImFD_Zg==&c=uPh8Kee_2unm2aYl80Z5bHaOXcAr2uPOh46Km6JLXQVNbUsRvg5HvQ==&ch=RZdM6cuRGs0Jeh6oW7b5qRjNg43BKxjinGA0alIgCfUjX98ri-DW2w==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Abortion is not a political issue, but an issue of basic human dignity. [Every unborn child has the right to life! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XdX2UC8gF6Xqs-SbZrTAQiCgu_vmV8vtR3mgojebixt8FxIUGXnFLSDXW0Egs1s7Qw4h_3fskpokjhiiBBUGmt9pbtn7eHEDrG3u-srh-oVNcXUt2B-tmXWZyERUeK2BlpCEvP-7te2eH8Oytn0DGqWY1aKp87brzq_1WotLpZVcn0KpGCmFurh1GZ6sdWRWyk-OR45nOl_2LJZmaHPBEXDZp_dccFeHaqXzWUgANdppzNtY9zcdkI6OhGfdC4vkDRCRQTmcl1RBEW5A8Bw6p59AKkpyden5MlysKzhRqIxqTGn2ZfVghHaNh3ZD_wV01vzIqmjHY_6aQX5JYOzAoA7lrx1P6vJj-9GQ_hIhCz4=&c=uPh8Kee_2unm2aYl80Z5bHaOXcAr2uPOh46Km6JLXQVNbUsRvg5HvQ==&ch=RZdM6cuRGs0Jeh6oW7b5qRjNg43BKxjinGA0alIgCfUjX98ri-DW2w==)
My view on life is not up for negotiation. I am 100% life and believe that life begins at the moment of conception. [That's why I was recently endorsed by the Texas Right to Life. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XdX2UC8gF6Xqs-SbZrTAQiCgu_vmV8vtR3mgojebixt8FxIUGXnFLSDXW0Egs1s7Qw4h_3fskpokjhiiBBUGmt9pbtn7eHEDrG3u-srh-oVNcXUt2B-tmXWZyERUeK2BlpCEvP-7te2eH8Oytn0DGqWY1aKp87brzq_1WotLpZVcn0KpGCmFurh1GZ6sdWRWyk-OR45nOl_2LJZmaHPBEXDZp_dccFeHaqXzWUgANdppzNtY9zcdkI6OhGfdC4vkDRCRQTmcl1RBEW5A8Bw6p59AKkpyden5MlysKzhRqIxqTGn2ZfVghHaNh3ZD_wV01vzIqmjHY_6aQX5JYOzAoA7lrx1P6vJj-9GQ_hIhCz4=&c=uPh8Kee_2unm2aYl80Z5bHaOXcAr2uPOh46Km6JLXQVNbUsRvg5HvQ==&ch=RZdM6cuRGs0Jeh6oW7b5qRjNg43BKxjinGA0alIgCfUjX98ri-DW2w==)
I am honored and humbled by this endorsement, but this is just the beginning. As your Congressman, I will ALWAYS stand up for innocent lives and fight for those who cannot fight for themselves.
[Can you stand for the right to life and chip in $10, $25, or $50 today? ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XdX2UC8gF6Xqs-SbZrTAQiCgu_vmV8vtR3mgojebixt8FxIUGXnFLSDXW0Egs1s7Qw4h_3fskpokjhiiBBUGmt9pbtn7eHEDrG3u-srh-oVNcXUt2B-tmXWZyERUeK2BlpCEvP-7te2eH8Oytn0DGqWY1aKp87brzq_1WotLpZVcn0KpGCmFurh1GZ6sdWRWyk-OR45nOl_2LJZmaHPBEXDZp_dccFeHaqXzWUgANdppzNtY9zcdkI6OhGfdC4vkDRCRQTmcl1RBEW5A8Bw6p59AKkpyden5MlysKzhRqIxqTGn2ZfVghHaNh3ZD_wV01vzIqmjHY_6aQX5JYOzAoA7lrx1P6vJj-9GQ_hIhCz4=&c=uPh8Kee_2unm2aYl80Z5bHaOXcAr2uPOh46Km6JLXQVNbUsRvg5HvQ==&ch=RZdM6cuRGs0Jeh6oW7b5qRjNg43BKxjinGA0alIgCfUjX98ri-DW2w==)
Join the most Pro-Life campaign for TX-8 - join me today.

Hello,
Fundraising is the worst part of running for elected office. But if we’re going to go up against Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs and actually win, I need grassroots donors like you in this fight with me.
There are just 7 hours until the most important mid-month deadline of our campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. **But with time running out, my team just let me know that we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**
I’m emailing to personally ask: [**Can I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39717583/321090723/-42398318?refcode=em20211215pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2UzMWViOS1mYTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSuZQUfqDV_4SzFLZHFDZkH1VETKqomk7RgGdgj07Hs=)
**The stakes could not be higher. Our campaign in Iowa will likely determine who controls the Senate for the next two years.** That means combatting the assault on democracy and voting rights, addressing the climate crisis, reining in Wall Street, and taking on Big Pharma... it’s all on the line.
The only way we’ll win, though, is if we hit every fundraising goal. **I’m not taking Corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you giving now.**
[**Please, will you make a donation to my campaign now – before our mid-month deadline at midnight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39717589/321090730/-42398318?refcode=em20211215pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2UzMWViOS1mYTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSuZQUfqDV_4SzFLZHFDZkH1VETKqomk7RgGdgj07Hs=)

clean_body: Hello, Fundraising is the worst part of running for elected office. But if we’re going to go up against Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs and actually win, I need grassroots donors like you in this fight with me. There are just 7 hours until the most important mid-month deadline of our campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But with time running out, my team just let me know that we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority. I’m emailing to personally ask: = The stakes could not be higher. Our campaign in Iowa will likely determine who controls the Senate for the next two years. That means combatting the assault on democracy and voting rights, addressing the climate crisis, reining in Wall Street, and taking on Big Pharma... it’s all on the line. The only way we’ll win, though, is if we hit every fundraising goal. I’m not taking Corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you giving now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = When we win next November, it’ll be because of donors like you chipping in what they can, when they can. I’m so grateful for your support, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

clean_body: ⏰ Only 6 hours left until this fundraising deadline! | | | = ACTION ALERT: Only 6 hours until our urgent fundraising deadline! = = = Can I be honest with you, Peter? Our campaign urgently needs your help right now. With the end of the year approaching quickly, we have barely any time left to make up the difference after missing last month’s fundraising goal. I’m rejecting all corporate PAC money, which means every grassroots dollar is crucial. It’s what’s going to fuel this campaign all the way to the finish line. If we can do that, I’ll be able to fight for Virginians in Congress on things like affordable housing, accessible health care, immigrant resources, livable wages, child care, and climate justice. Our final mid-month deadline of the year is TONIGHT at midnight, and we still need to raise another $3,251 by then to keep our campaign moving in an upward direction and catch up before 2022. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ********=****** ****** ****** | | ********=******** | ********=******** ****** ****** | | ********=******** | ********=******** ****** ****** | | ********=******** Thanks for having my back. Victoria = ********************EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress****************** If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** ---|---|---|--- Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable. That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families. Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward. = __= | || || ** Victoria for Congress P.O. Friend, the bipartisan investigation into the Jan. 6 riot is uncovering new evidence against Donald Trump every day, **and I need you to hear the most important details as this case rapidly evolves:**
In his final days in power, Donald Trump repeatedly tried to pressure the Department of Justice into overturning the Georgia election results, and he even asked his advisors about **sending the military to the states he lost** in an attempt to stay in power.
These plans didn't come to fruition. Instead, his son's girlfriend raised $3 MILLION for the Jan. 6 rally, where Trump told a group of agitated protesters that, **"If you don't fight like hell, you're not going to have a country anymore." **
We all know what happened next, friend. I'll never forget the moment that Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol and fought their way through Capitol police officers. **I was in the House gallery, ducking for cover and fearing for my life.**
This is America, friend, and in this country, we abide by peaceful transitions of power – no matter who wins. No one is above the law, which is exactly what I said when I managed Trump's first impeachment trial. **But some far-right Republicans, including Marco Rubio, are trying to let Trump off the hook.**
**Trump loyalists like Rubio want you to forget that Trump nearly destroyed our democracy. They want you to forget that Trump bribed a foreign official, pressuring him to interfere in the 2020 election.** And, they want you to let Trump run for president all over again. **I won't let that happen, friend, but I can't overcome Trumpism alone, so I have to ask you:**
**Do you believe that Donald Trump and his associates should be held accountable for their misdeeds?**

These plans didn't come to fruition. Instead, his son's girlfriend raised $3 MILLION for the Jan. 6 rally, where Trump told a group of agitated protesters that, "If you don't fight like hell, you're not going to have a country anymore." We all know what happened next, friend. I'll never forget the moment that Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol and fought their way through Capitol police officers. I was in the House gallery, ducking for cover and fearing for my life. This is America, friend, and in this country, we abide by peaceful transitions of power – no matter who wins. No one is above the law, which is exactly what I said when I managed Trump's first impeachment trial. But some far-right Republicans, including Marco Rubio, are trying to let Trump off the hook. Trump loyalists like Rubio want you to forget that Trump nearly destroyed our democracy. They want you to forget that Trump bribed a foreign official, pressuring him to interfere in the 2020 election. And, they want you to let Trump run for president all over again. I won't let that happen, friend, but I can't overcome Trumpism alone, so I have to ask you: Do you believe that Donald Trump and his associates should be held accountable for their misdeeds? | | | | Thank you for helping me bring Trump to justice. name: Aadland For Senate
subject: No Water, no Colorado
body:
Solutions for the growing demand on a natural resource
---
| | | | | | Volume 20 | December 15, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Thankfully, we received snowfall throughout most of Colorado this past week.

Yet, despite this welcomed event, drought persists throughout much of the American West, and there is simply not enough water in Colorado to service our growing population and our economy.

More than 40 million people (and increasing) rely on the Colorado River to irrigate their farms and ranches, power electric grids and provide drinking water.

Colorado's water comes from the snow-covered mountain tops during four months of the year. While we cannot control snowfall, we can improve efficiency and reduce waste, and create ways to extend supply.

That's why it is essential that water policy be developed in a way that increases storage, promotes greater efficiency in water usage, especially in our urban centers, and assists projects that increase usable water supplies.

Colorado must increase storage that holds water produced in years of greater precipitation. The Blue Mesa Reservoir in western Colorado is an example of such storage. I support these projects.

Additionally, I will fight to protect Colorado's water against increasing downstream interests as they will certainly attempt to renegotiate the Interstate Compact. Finally, I will promote creative solutions like the ones I observed during my time in Israel.

Israel recycles 80% of its water supply. Highly treated wastewater, which has been filter for a period up to six months, accounts for about half of the water used for agriculture. Drip irrigation, soil moisture monitoring, shading, and special plant selection has maximized use of this "liquid gold." Due to Israel's ingenuity, in an arid nation, agriculture makes up about 2.5% of the country's gross domestic product and almost 4% of its exports. I experienced some of the most amazing produce while living in Israel. Agriculture is equally important to Colorado and water is its lifeblood.

Without water, Colorado's economy and way of life crumbles. Help me protect our natural resource that so many depend upon. Please donate today so I can go to Washington and represent you. Together we will strive for solutions to growing needs.
|

| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This week, I listened to a panel of Democrat Mike Dino, Columnist Eric Sonderman, and former GOP chairman Dick Wadhams discuss the 2022 election at the Foothills Republican Club. I joined Republicans in Broomfield for their annual Lincoln Day Dinner, and then traveled to Alamosa on Sunday for their annual Christmas party.

On Monday, I discussed key issues impacting Coloradans with Julie Hayden and Chuck Bonniwell on Monday, and Mandy Connell today.

As we round out the calendar year, I hope to see many of you at holiday events and charity functions as we prepare for a robust New Year, the year we restore our government back to We the People.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!

---

There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff

Together we will strive for solutions to growing needs. | | | | | | | | Stop the foreign invasion | == | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | This week, I listened to a panel of Democrat Mike Dino, Columnist Eric Sonderman, and former GOP chairman Dick Wadhams discuss the 2022 election at the Foothills Republican Club. I joined Republicans in Broomfield for their annual Lincoln Day Dinner, and then traveled to Alamosa on Sunday for their annual Christmas party. On Monday, I discussed key issues impacting Coloradans with Julie Hayden and Chuck Bonniwell on Monday, and Mandy Connell today. As we round out the calendar year, I hope to see many of you at holiday events and charity functions as we prepare for a robust New Year, the year we restore our government back to We the People. I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail! | | | | Every bit can help | Erik's effort to represent Colorado in the U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today. Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff | | | | == | | | | Upcoming Events | | ---|--- | Wednesday Dec 15: Erik will appear on Mandy Connell's radio show in the 1 o'clock hour. Tune in to 850 KOA on your AM radio at 1:00pm today. Or listen online by clicking the button below Thursday Dec 16: Erik will be the Guest Speaker at Liberty First. Meeting is at 6:00pm at 1850 Dominion Way in Colorado Springs Friday Dec 17: Erik will appear on Peter Boyles' radio show at 7:00am. Tune to 710 KNUS on your AM Radio at 7:00am on Friday | | == | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com powered by

subject: Doing nothing is not an option for me

| | | Axios reports that in a closed-door meeting full of Senators and lobbyists, a Republican donor asked Mitch McConnell what his legislative agenda was for the 2022 midterms.
His answer? _Absolutely nothing._
Unlike Mitch, this campaign actually stands for something.
I’m running for Congress to tackle the big issues like climate change, ending gun violence, reproductive rights, economic justice, workers’ rights, universal healthcare and ending the deep levels of corruption in our government.
**[But first, I need your help to win. subject: Democrats Want Non-Citizens to Vote
body:
[****](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=013c43d62e0146db8cb8d1884ec5eae5&_e=mAWXDAMJH2qz-wHL1x0io5KEWHi-3nx9ruhd8d8gbqISolnvXdyQ0EPrWdNQ32lTD1t3tv_T7EOQ7RuQsl7JgSClgOEKJ3ylIZlU7mv2bMuAsiWPRWM3jGAgqLBkUHZxiPoxipN8dU6Por92-YXjiJDEumHhODN1LQu4qzxnBkUy-cUl5ND3OUqTmpRTSdv6KoFMAJUDXhkV826iTMO2OUM5yJR2RNSNptWKW4n1-gg8zVjzSthZH8pvOG40FXTWbuW4Nmr71LUDkAMsXrwiJGZ9EGfpz8SlHnG4eBG5lIor0KIigGQf-HZwkrN88gkxTYAhWhORedLwrUEjgYTNyO2a9IwcJGGLYCW6v4psyzKl6oQM027zMLR-WnqQto1A3SkDW7mcKmiGuPT210pgSQ%3D%3D)
Peter,
Our Constitution is based on the idea of "We the People." Specifically, the Founding Fathers believed that our government rested on the consent of the American people. Democrats reject this, preferring a "Woketopia" that violates the principals on which our nation was founded.
**The latest case in point:** New York City Democrats are going to allow non-citizens to vote. This will allow upwards of 800,000 non-citizens to vote in New York City. Could you imagine the reaction of people in, say, France if you or I sought to vote in their elections? _**American leftists are in a class by themselves when it comes to legislating insanity.**_
[**FIGHT BACK >>>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=013c43d62e0146db8cb8d1884ec5eae5&_e=mAWXDAMJH2qz-wHL1x0io5KEWHi-3nx9ruhd8d8gbqISolnvXdyQ0EPrWdNQ32lTD1t3tv_T7EOQ7RuQsl7JgSClgOEKJ3ylIZlU7mv2bMuAsiWPRWM3jGAgqLBkUHZxiPoxipN8dU6Por92-YXjiJDEumHhODN1LQu4qzxnBkUy-cUl5ND3OUqTmpRTSdv6c0EY68o2U4A4snJpJgAqdiL23VF5pvwCsDiK6T0zTgEEV5DbbriBAQholPmCzOwO5Y_S-_1FVtgeQ2WusT7Jl9Mc0GNmwX8ltEzK1zBwauzJHRRwKqFaI2JT5Oe8ZeAge-rROQJCDbKmEP--EghEwRhdGqLjO0L5VFlboto0OcqoGDeN4JLFBSmvdtnG1qkxdqDsnyKRPZ6RkxkgnkL4Qw%3D%3D)
Democrats see themselves as global citizens rather than American citizens. But that doesn't make their contempt for our Constitution any less reprehensible.
**Make no mistake about it, these non-citizen voting policies are going to spread and had Florida not passed a constitutional amendment that only American citizens can vote, Democrats would be fighting to implement these same radical policies here.** It's high time Democrats start prioritizing American citizens and putting their needs first.
[**LET 'S FIGHT FOR OUR CONSTITUTION**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=013c43d62e0146db8cb8d1884ec5eae5&_e=mAWXDAMJH2qz-wHL1x0io5KEWHi-3nx9ruhd8d8gbqISolnvXdyQ0EPrWdNQ32lTD1t3tv_T7EOQ7RuQsl7JgSClgOEKJ3ylIZlU7mv2bMuAsiWPRWM3jGAgqLBkUHZxiPoxipN8dU6Por92-YXjiJDEumHhODN1LQu4qzxnBkUy-cUl5ND3OUqTmpRTSdv6nhHQEIXMDOEVPVL6x5djkhQgvcbb5LJKnvMYQMlm9uFfExi3_hbmlmYHvzcT9VzBy0u5KNn1VtrhpPRPgK2iglRQJloJeCvYrRMenKiw1B1Ex-Mtdq82oUSzQXNAtVjCPlynRyZEZ8SBjAI89gA8QI1QG_yDOVqKSXlTRocfxWuyqGy2ulgoo_9oosP8QYGj1lAhrQygtqjegvcueHSTPQ%3D%3D)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2o6aabq6m3alo2nv142s6atugrofj8hnhku5r78_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6eob2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdfe6p7ulpckb7m0v5vtkf7fcnkd22gtdi9p9vl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6eob2clh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3qokl1qf0gq2ukud8ipii19h6f52ld0a448tuj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sdg6eob2clh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

body:
We must secure the Southern Border, NOW!

| [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=7bd7c01828fd4f6695bc216944053821&_e=qKr0n4WdRESeC6Z-3oh6sO3ean5bEAC-4RhrBDSNXS4HZjUdyCsBYXe5qS_RccqII20-PvLXgMuTrKFwcsGa9ZH-Jm7kRSaFY37jDn5FG5oJ7rv2tbbb3q1x79fVKNV1C15reiSVCPMUVcB1I_eaWAr_1wVwsP_bDfn4hev5NvJcaP-vDqXdHeehFIx0ApGx3Ry7JNWxwUC5g2MSgS5XRyFmOskiKGWcFoW2FYQ8yBdoUbxYGaZ-8MBPPW9FcsP9s5L6ptvkW1Ri1axy5C49c3AbrxEOL8qxtKEIhTSadxMJSQdsmzeAVnSB6YYuUS2vg5_bIQoktQfoxITVQUQ49q2k-NQn8yQiEkb08UsAuH3vDi_BVBo4qFOqzpx9cTuH_toJMhUPSkUv45F8nk9G02CFyPDyvErbM5tRglqYiy-IKK04q2beJB7shy6BxLFP6NDiMUMPFAssoYKeqmRKe0PtR4fLt96KP61MM8DwcBU%3D) TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA
* * *
---
Fellow Conservatives,

The issues we are facing at the Southern Border need to be addressed yet the Democrats continue to ignore them! Drugs, including Fentanyl, are flooding across the Southern Border in record numbers and killing Americans. We must secure the border now!
| [**SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=7bd7c01828fd4f6695bc216944053821&_e=qKr0n4WdRESeC6Z-3oh6sO3ean5bEAC-4RhrBDSNXS4HZjUdyCsBYXe5qS_RccqII20-PvLXgMuTrKFwcsGa9ZH-Jm7kRSaFY37jDn5FG5oJ7rv2tbbb3q1x79fVKNV1C15reiSVCPMUVcB1I_eaWAr_1wVwsP_bDfn4hev5NvJcaP-vDqXdHeehFIx0ApGx3Ry7JNWxwUC5g2MSgS5XRyFmOskiKGWcFoW2FYQ8yBdoUbxYGaZ-8MBPPW9FcsP9s5L6ptvkW1Ri1axy5C49c9f5X-ydjaFMXYO5xS0jlLJ5BmRkfBqCbST9wAoc2JyW7pJDeYp7JeKz2ROc6LSgXdlcpRmgiXJD6UcLD9utoADC2X0YGAksLlCy47996XaCGw1BKulxxneSQgjghyExYmE_5IIUI0cqMOF0-MA6DNBz-r_2Im8-1_J8MxgmWPkZoPjwUjgjNNUraWqn6kcrHd9rbLSMHyK1y9pE8CtKMeA%3D)

Crime levels are surging across the nation, in large part due to our wide open Southern Border. Drug overdose deaths, fueled by the large quantities of Fentanyl entering the United States, are hitting record highs.

subject: Tell me what you think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
You’re my eyes and ears on the ground.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39719257/321096875/738757336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2U4MDQ1Yi0wMDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRGLDZ57ZeSAajZOEiOYAQPhwyaVVW4iPQJb9IXm6Ss=&emci=be830e25-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=13e8045b-005e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14488557)
---
Team, Throughout this campaign, it’s been my pleasure and my privilege to meet so many people across the state of Ohio. Every day, it makes me more passionate about getting to represent people who love this state as much as I do. Unfortunately, I can’t check in with all of you every single day. But that doesn’t change the fact that it’s my job to bring your voice into the room where decisions are being made. We all want the best for our state, but now I want to hear from you. Tell me the issues you care about, share a little bit of your life with me. I am not running to represent a few million numbers on a list — I’m running to represent real people. [**Let’s talk about 2022 issues together. We have a lot to get done, and what you think matters to me. This job is about representation, and I am determined to follow through. So let me know the issues you’ll be fighting for in 2022: take my 30-second poll today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39719258/321096876/738757336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2U4MDQ1Yi0wMDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRGLDZ57ZeSAajZOEiOYAQPhwyaVVW4iPQJb9IXm6Ss=&emci=be830e25-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=13e8045b-005e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14488557) **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39719259/321096877/738757336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2U4MDQ1Yi0wMDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRGLDZ57ZeSAajZOEiOYAQPhwyaVVW4iPQJb9IXm6Ss=&emci=be830e25-d75d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=13e8045b-005e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14488557)** I cannot wait to hear your thoughts, and I’m even more excited to turn them into actions. Waiting to hear from you,

\-- Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

subject: this will only take a minute

body:

Folks, sorry for the late email, but this will only take a minute. Our mid-month goal is hours away, and it looks like we’re going to fall short. **This is bad news for our Senate majority -- 2022 is just two weeks away, and missing a single goal puts us on shaky ground.** I’m the GOP’s number one target for next year’s elections. My 2016 race was the closest in the country, and polls are showing me tied with a Trump Republican. **Far-right groups have spent more money on New Hampshire than any other state in the country.** We can fight back against these attacks, win New Hampshire, and protect our majority. But I need your help. **[Rush $5 or whatever you can before midnight -- I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39719473/321098087/-913685435?refcode=e20211215_mwh-mm&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI1YWZmZS0wMjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6c3DwY8OJURy3-okVwr_xVVo5HoCEGKc481p4W5j2A=)** Thank you for your support. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

**Given how close we are to 2022, meeting our fundraising deadlines has more urgency than ever.** While some of our opponents have deep-pockets funding their campaigns, we strongly believe a large bank account is no match for the motivated grassroots movement we’re building here.

Maryland doesn’t need another rich politician to maintain the status quo. We need progressive leadership, and John is leading the way to create a more equitable future where all Marylanders have a chance to thrive, no matter where they grew up or what school they attend.

Together, we can build a more prosperous Maryland built on economic, racial, climate, and educational justice. But in order to send John to Annapolis as Maryland’s next Democratic governor, we have to fund voter outreach efforts now to ensure John’s story is heard online, on the radio, on TV, and in communities across the state. **With our biggest public fundraising deadline just around the corner, the stakes have never been higher.**

clean_body: We need 18 more donors from 20910 to contribute before midnight | = | | | MID-MONTH DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT We need 18 more donors from 20910to contribute $1 or more right away | = Peter — With just hours to go before our mid-month deadline, we’re reaching out one last time to humbly ask if you can = | = | = Given how close we are to 2022, meeting our fundraising deadlines has more urgency than ever. While some of our opponents have deep-pockets funding their campaigns, we strongly believe a large bank account is no match for the motivated grassroots movement we’re building here. Maryland doesn’t need another rich politician to maintain the status quo. We need progressive leadership, and John is leading the way to create a more equitable future where all Marylanders have a chance to thrive, no matter where they grew up or what school they attend. Together, we can build a more prosperous Maryland built on economic, racial, climate, and educational justice. But in order to send John to Annapolis as Maryland’s next Democratic governor, we have to fund voter outreach efforts now to ensure John’s story is heard online, on the radio, on TV, and in communities across the state. With our biggest public fundraising deadline just around the corner, the stakes have never been higher. = | = It’s so important to John and this campaign that grassroots supporters like you power our movement to build a more equitable Maryland, = Thank you for stepping up! | Peter,
Happy Bill of Rights Day!
Today we celebrate the first ten amendments in the U.S. Constitution, guiding principles for all of us.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| In case you missed it: JOIN US ON MONDAY for the #TeamGibbons Christmas Party! The event will take place at the Summer Restaurant House in Lakewood from 5 p.m. to 7 p.m. This is a chance to talk directly with my team and I, ask any questions you have about my campaign and find out why I want to be your next U.S. senator. (There will also be drinks, hors d'oeuvres and good company!)
If you are interested in attending, please [click here to save your spot](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A-DSEWmwfAOs6L9bgasm40T36ZMSJVcuid2WBSKwouBjsK3PS4GC3mEI8DWXSVwKQT_E0tr0gOWTo84ALg5ygCddaiJ4dDhZem6HuA0Ozi9DsA9xQKVPCKj01u9esfO91zLb9rIUrCI=&c=hoCzVQsY8rJIEDuSFqEE4L8vM9KGe-rhDZrYaogeUDH8gfTtbTjqwA==&ch=ubLCFgJnslUcqeKAYSmnV1xBHGlSMsYNnIUnjiRhvPuNtIILyA3euw==) or email us at events@gibonsforohio.com with any questions.

| Through the busyness of this season, I was happy to visit the Sandusky County GOP this past week as well as a meet & greet event outside Cleveland on Tuesday. I had the chance to meet some great folks and discuss inflation and the concerning direction our economy is heading. These grassroots event gave me the opportunity to connect with voters and learn more about Ohioans' biggest concerns as we head into the new year.

clean_body: | | | | It’s time to shake things up. | Friend, During my time in Washington, D.C. fighting alongside President Trump as his Acting Director of National Intelligence. I saw firsthand how D.C. operates and how the swamp works to always be in charge. And it is crucial that Alaskans send Kelly Tshibaka to represent them in the United States Senate. Kelly is smart, conservative, and says what she means. Will you help her? I'm proud to endorse an America First fighter like Kelly Tshibaka. Now please take the next step and join me in endorsing Kelly Tshibaka for United States Senate. As a former Trump Cabinet official, I know what an America First patriot looks like. It's time we take back Washington and put our country first, again. Thank you, Richard Grenell | | | | =

name: Greg Casar
subject: BREAKING: Justice Dems endorse Greg Casar for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress**

Peter, after constant attacks from the likes of Greg Abbott, working Texans need a progressive fighter who can deliver on Medicare for All, good jobs, and protections for reproductive rights. Lives depend on it.

I’ve spent my career fighting on behalf of working Texans – on issues from labor rights to immigration to reproductive justice. That’s why I’m so excited to have the endorsement of the Justice Democrats, an exciting progressive organization that supports progressive candidates up and down the ballot.
If you’re ready to join the Justice Democrats by being a part of this movement,**[chip in $15 or $35 to help us reach more voters. Now is the time to redouble our efforts](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjI0P1H_ozI99RcPm4D6gcircIDMI5ev6UNEdPT2SASBruAVqSCqo5xeG0DFQckUTOkFbMWqC-YjvH2N4kVuVgS5rfBBATaKRx2dTKkvKquo5kUbAx2Ioxtt7xAs-yQ6LrGdKYfgdJA4chCAUOL52bQND-ivnBxf_BJStddS1l2RSW_ajyShROdjqs7l7OdzbH5vXkn7bqg-WAmgkL8Bov5vOkLr2eCUTq6kU2M2FYLMBqA2kCSH677RzZWjglZRRPcd5GznyNrfzpJzLN0gxy4AMb_pB4pSXTlYs4Ajl3nmpS9VSmm4s8DkIruauhrd2PxDyfjrVQCKYsfrnVDmaSKp1TzUau0UDST9p1IQFmXQQ28UupfmeCm5unCJhtnQ_DQ/3hv/__UYfgovR9-4uH6rq1cRGw/h5/BZ0onBWdYgOGljdEtEpuREum0JRCNamW7EO3W8pzcWQ). **

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Raphael Warnock's warning about our democracy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, "We need to acknowledge that the ceiling of our democracy is crashing in on us,” Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock told _The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_. That's why Senator Warnock is continuing his demand that the Senate immediately pass voting rights legislation, even if it means delaying their holiday recess. “It oughta be left to the states," Mitch McConnell replies. Mitch McConnell has repeatedly filibustered voting rights legislation. McConnell and Trump know that if they can successfully suppress the vote in Georgia in 2022—a state Joe Biden won by only 0.3% in 2020—Herschel Walker will defeat Raphael Warnock, and Mitch McConnell will control the Senate once again. Raphael Warnock is 2022's #1 Most Vulnerable Democrat, according to CNN. And CBS News reports that the Senate Republican campaign arm just outraised us for the _seventh straight month_. While we're doing everything we can to protect and reelect Raphael Warnock, today we're still $1,700 short of what we _must_ raise by midnight tonight. Peter, too many Democrats think we can afford to play it safe. They've already forgotten how hard YOU fought with us to win our 50/50 Senate Majority in 2020. But we know that you're still fighting, and now we need you to prove us right by standing with Raphael Warnock, standing with us, and chipping in right now. **[Please take up this fight, Peter: Rush in $1, $10, or even $100 or more right now to help us hit our goal and reelect Senator Raphael Warnock, protect& expand our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority, and FINALLY get this country back on the right track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39720063/321105139/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211215_GEN_FDR_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2NmNjMTM5LTA1NWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qY2R1tea_2T8B0bCZapQWPVCMzZ50O8t836RZCkdrks=)** Thank you standing with us, Peter. Thanks for all you do. \- When Democrats Turn Out | **[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39720064/321105140/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211215_GEN_FDR_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2NmNjMTM5LTA1NWUtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qY2R1tea_2T8B0bCZapQWPVCMzZ50O8t836RZCkdrks=)**

clean_body: A brand-new report from Business Insider shows how certain members of Congress abuse their positions on power on Armed Services committees, tying their finances to prominent defense contractors. | | | Peter, we’ve got bad news about our opponent. A brand-new report from Business Insider shows how certain members of Congress abuse their positions on power on Armed Services committees, tying their finances to prominent defense contractors. And at the top of their list is our opponent, Rep. Jim Cooper. At the end of 2020, Cooper (that’s him on the left) reported having at least $65,000 in defense contractor stocks. That means the $768,000,000,000 Pentagon budget Cooper voted for is not just lining the pockets of weapons manufacturers — it’s lining his pockets, too. Peter, we don’t have to stand for politicians who prioritize their own interests over the needs of the working people in their district. Odessa Kelly is the toughest primary challenge Cooper has ever faced — and with your help, we can ensure this is his last term in office. With Cooper’s vote, the House passed the $768 billion National Defense Authorization Act bill earlier this month. Here’s what Dylan Hedtler-Gaudette, a government affairs manager at the nonpartisan Project on Government Oversight, had to say about this clear conflict of interest: "If you are invested in any of the top defense contractors then you stand to benefit personally from that bill." Peter, we’ve got just months until the primary election, and if we’re going to take on Cooper’s financial war chest, we need to give this race everything we’ve got. Thank you for your support, Team Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

subject: Mitch McConnell wants to defeat Democratic women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
If we’re going to keep our Democratic majority, we’ve got to win these fights.
#
Team,
**With the Senate split 50-50, Mitch McConnell only needs ONE seat to flip the Senate red. And he’s dead-set on defeating three Democratic women senators:** Me, Sen. Maggie Hassan and Sen. Patty Murray.
New polling shows me LOSING to my Trump-endorsed opponent by 2 points in Nevada’s critical Senate race. The Cook Political Report just downgraded my chances of winning to “Toss-Up.” And McConnell’s allies are massively outspending my campaign -- they’ve already spent more than $2 million on vicious attack ads to defeat me.
**I won’t sugarcoat how tough it will be to defend our majority. CNN just announced that “Republicans are _favored_ to take the Senate.” But Maggie, Patty, and I aren’t afraid of a tough fight. We’ve all faced close elections before and won thanks to grassroots supporters like you.**
I know we can do it again and save the Senate, but _only_ with your help. We’re facing a must-hit $25,000 fundraising goal at midnight tonight and we’re falling short with only a few hours to go:
**[Please, will you pitch in $5 to help me, Maggie Hassan, Patty Murray and Jacky Rosen to defend our Democratic Senate majority? Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto (D-NV)

subject: Energized
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
Friend, there's been a lot of bad news coming out of Arizona. POLITICO said the Arizona GOP has officially gone "full fringe." Another report detailed just how far state Republicans have gone "down the rabbit hole" of far-right conspiracies. It's enough to make your head spin.
But I want to be clear: The GOP's extremism doesn't scare me away from running in this race – it energizes me even more. **Every time the stakes get higher, my resolve gets stronger, and I remember even more how urgent it is to replace our failed "leaders" with someone who will fight for Arizona. **
But to win this race, our support network has to be strong. **I need to know I have your support right now, because this is not a fight I can win alone. And right now, we're still $1,823 short of our mid-month goal. **
**Look, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling our battleground governor's race a TOSS-UP – and POLITICO called this the most competitive open-seat race in the country. We CAN win, but only together and only if we hit our goals. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Pramila is fighting to cancel student debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pressure is mounting on the Biden administration to reverse course on their plan to resume federal student loan payments on February 1 — and Pramila is at the forefront of that fight in Congress.
#
Peter,
Pressure is mounting on the Biden administration to reverse course on their plan to resume federal student loan payments on February 1 — and Pramila is at the forefront of that fight in Congress. Just look at what she told Teen Vogue:
> _“[The Progressive Caucus has] been pushing the administration for some time to cancel at least $50,000 in student debt, and the extension of the moratorium is important.**But what we really need to do is student debt cancellation.** We know it will help the economy. We know it will provide hope to young people across this country and it is the right thing to do so for all of those reasons. And it's something that is universally popular, not just with Democrats, but with independents and Republicans.”_
The average student loan borrower saved nearly $400/month during the COVID-19 payment pause. And when student loan payments restart next year, 75% of borrowers say their finances will take a direct hit.
It’s clear: canceling student loan debt is just the right thing to do. [**If you agree, will you contribute any amount toward our mid-month goal of 300 donations to help Pramila keep fighting for student debt relief?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211215?refcode=em20211215-880&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=880_420207_vwiAdk&akid=880%2E420207%2EvwiAdk) _A contribution from you today will send a powerful message to the White House that the time to cancel this burden holding back working people is now:_
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211215?refcode=em20211215-880&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=880_420207_vwiAdk&akid=880%2E420207%2EvwiAdk)**
If the White House’s plan to resume payments proceeds, folks crushed by student loan debt — debt that disproportionately affects women and people of color — will have to start paying again. That will mean picking between paying their loans and putting food on the table.
**After the personal and financial setbacks experienced by so many during this pandemic and rising concerns over a new COVID variant, now’s not the time to place more burdens on people.**
Democrats control the House, the Senate, and the White House. To lift people up — and into the future — we need to use that power to deliver on a transformative economic agenda. One key component to that agenda is forgiving student debt.
[**But Pramila needs your support to keep up this grassroots fight against the lobbyists and corporations who are profiting from student loan debt. Contribute $3 toward our mid-month goal of 300 donations and help us push President Biden to cancel student loan debt. He can — and he must.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211215?refcode=em20211215-880&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=880_420207_vwiAdk&akid=880%2E420207%2EvwiAdk)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211215-880-footer&t=22&refcode2=880_420207_vwiAdk&akid=880%2E420207%2EvwiAdk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter, Pressure is mounting on the Biden administration to reverse course on their plan to resume federal student loan payments on February 1 — and Pramila is at the forefront of that fight in Congress. Just look at what she told Teen Vogue: “[The Progressive Caucus has] been pushing the administration for some time to cancel at least $50,000 in student debt, and the extension of the moratorium is important.But what we really need to do is student debt cancellation. We know it will help the economy. We know it will provide hope to young people across this country and it is the right thing to do so for all of those reasons. And it's something that is universally popular, not just with Democrats, but with independents and Republicans.” The average student loan borrower saved nearly $400/month during the COVID-19 payment pause. name: Elizabeth Warren (via DCCC)
subject: As of 1pm:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | It's Elizabeth Warren.

I'll just be blunt: ****[Our House Democrats are just 11 hours away from their mid-month deadline, and I'm asking if you can help meet their powerfully important goal before time runs out. Can you pitch in $3 to defend our House majority?](https://links.e.dccc.)****

Look: I'm fighting to keep Democrats in control of the House because this is our chance to finally make big, structural change. This is our chance to level the playing field, un-rig the rules that have benefited the wealthy and well-connected and put power in the hands of working people.

**But here 's the thing: Republicans and their special interest backers haven't given up their fight on behalf of the rich and powerful.**

And the hard truth is that the odds are stacked in their favor.

_They 've built a massive war chest.

They need to flip just five seats to take back the House.

And their efforts to gerrymander districts nationwide have given them the upper hand._

**[But we have something the Republicans don't: _You._](https://links.e.dccc.)**

The fight to defend our House majority relies on grassroots supporters like you -- people who chip in $3, $10, or even $25 at a time to elect leaders who will fight for working people instead of just a thin slice at the top.

And this incredible grassroots team has proven time and time again that our House Democrats have the support they need to win even the toughest of battles in the upcoming midterm elections.

**So let 's show the world that we won't give up on this fight.**

**[If you can, please chip in $3 to support our House Democrats and help hold our majority.](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw-)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-~)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2-)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

Elizabeth Warren

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46109814&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MTc2ODkwOAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:

We’ve had a tough yet extraordinary year and Morgan and her team are incredibly grateful for your support of her campaign! As we try to bring change to Ohio and the greater Country, our team wanted to express our deepest gratitude for coming along on this journey with us.

**We know what it takes to win races.** Last year, Future Generations poured our heart and soul into making sure Green New Deal champion **Sen. Ed Markey** won his tough reelection bid. We supported **Rep. Cori Bush** in her historic victory in MO-01, toppling a 50-year father-son political dynasty. We also helped flip **crucial down-ballot seats in Texas** , laying the foundation for future progressive wins in the nation's largest swing state. We are ready to build on that success by reelecting climate champions like **Jamie Raskin and Marie Newman,** and add to their strength by electing people like **Mckayla Wilkes, Maxwell Frost, and Jason Call.** **[Your contribution of $22 today will help us usher these candidates to victory in 2022!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5-3DAMMcuBelWAChxwjvOl9UIHu95LZtWnoIBilgAIDP04VGxpfUxNdSQMcTlchQIQplTAFfTKsoqwrAOO4m5YB9iPUFNvbxotkSc3tD4kUbsF04hJihxeEobwUVfEmXzrRguEg9XdRUEwCZhZozZmIGa7q6gQVMSmEizgqWrC-fb9t8y_rXgas0UgftUiNVkKutikkJbqKUYajmJ6qr0PMwXRYg8tsbZ21DUUdAei4Ovm7qWsolv-bVCbPuVS7wZjjrVgSB9iaDtVOUZQpZrL21P8uAzT0Ht27FRog09dPUd8FGUoPY3AqYf1HT8lzt2Rn2O0NS-EqA2bFK3GWnY/3hv/cxs2DjZ-TvigM0U1bcC89w/h6/33v4VgTmiwWpF4ooTWJCsUBbmKDfFxtkQX34BsUcxyo)** In Solidarity, Roza

clean_body: Things are heating up fast for the Midterms. Here’s a look ahead | | Peter -- December is flying by and we are already just two weeks away from ringing in the new year! As of now, we have 22 candidates on the slate, including our members of Congress up for re-election next year. To effectively support each of them with phonebanking, canvassing, texting, and more, we need to rapidly scale up our volunteer recruitment and invest in the tools they need to do their work to help WIN these races. Your contributions help us pay for organizing tools, as well as the staff needed to recruit and engage volunteers to keep them focused on the task at hand -- getting these candidates elected. December 31st is a major fundraising deadline.We need to raise $10,000 in the next two weeks to start the new year off right, and we are still far short of our goal. Can you rush a $22 contribution right now to help us catch up? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We know what it takes to win races. Last year, Future Generations poured our heart and soul into making sure Green New Deal champion Sen. Ed Markey won his tough reelection bid. We supported Rep. Cori Bush in her historic victory in MO-01, toppling a 50-year father-son political dynasty. We also helped flip crucial down-ballot seats in Texas , laying the foundation for future progressive wins in the nation's largest swing state. We are ready to build on that success by reelecting climate champions like Jamie Raskin and Marie Newman, and add to their strength by electing people like Mckayla Wilkes, Maxwell Frost, and Jason Call. In Solidarity, Roza | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. Join our people-powered movement in the fight for the future. | | Connect with us by clicking on the links below: | | | Paid for by Future Generations PAC. ---|--- Future Generations PAC P.O. Peter,

We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you.

Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest.

**[We have to pick up the pace today, Peter. We cannot afford to fall behind.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=336004f8334042848fd15e3bd8ae0b0b&_e=GFkDix1v_ntmAhIXfhlvIzX2kPDIAxoJ9nX6HyDr042Q0jvVz2E-FNt8Jxqr2uKQ5AdPMDRKmBka6UC6gQbcid8sEiSiTPeETC7xtm3LerC2wEqwI3r8xoqrVAhnrXrjJ3_16Ssu9Ts9ox6ix6hwBz0BboVzr-Nx3S3_Si6nRw_1wuXvMAHhKjz7H7XInmfLkoQTJuItdbzr7lZiXh53OApon9xyWJLprZjbvImBa09fQGSPD9Effr-qBBwaGxD1oZea3mxtid1CFB5E9q9F5DB3FleWm-U4y8H9mwNOoNlLzPZ-JiG-xr8f7LntgpEmGrwlSCIArY8CPmIunMoIyc44qFeHMV6fE2pzhbkD0p-9M3JMOv0dLxyJ2S2DxtC5PK6Ch8QSGKkZ2noQHRHTih7PAB_-KxbmV6lSoEbZUuv8tmWoLKXHFZ6zuu4uj-Bhpxr6P-CuAxwV40iVsnkcXg%3D%3D)**

I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction.
* The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing.
* We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers.
* Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country.
* And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice.

**We've got to get this country back on the right track.**

The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda.

And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice. We've got to get this country back on the right track. The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda. So how about it? Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Peter,

A lot has happened in our race over the last few weeks, so I wanted to take a moment and share with you what you need to know.

Last month, King County Councilmember Reagan Dunn announced he's running against me for Washington's 8th District. Dunn is just the latest conservative to jump into this race and he has the support of the Republican establishment to help him win.

Then, the Washington Supreme Court announced they've accepted the redistricting commission's work and we learned what our district will look like next year. The new map makes our race even more competitive and more than 20% of my constituents will be new to the district.

**Peter -- we can't hold the House majority without winning WA-08 and this is going to be our most difficult race yet.** I need your help right away if we're going to reach new voters, take on our opponents, and protect my seat in the midterm elections.

**Will you chip in $5 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to help protect my seat and our Democratic House majority?:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-december-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39720512/321120116/1568994713?refcode=em21_211215_mm3_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211215_mm3_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTllMTI4OC0wYjVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u84RaCrr7eszwg8kkkypstKZoromvjCHVSzr4MN_Xv8=)**

Kim

clean_body: A lot has happened in our race over the last few weeks, so I wanted to take a moment and share with you what you need to know. Last month, King County Councilmember Reagan Dunn announced he's running against me for Washington's 8th District. Dunn is just the latest conservative to jump into this race and he has the support of the Republican establishment to help him win. Peter, A lot has happened in our race over the last few weeks, so I wanted to take a moment and share with you what you need to know. Last month, King County Councilmember Reagan Dunn announced he's running against me for Washington's 8th District. Dunn is just the latest conservative to jump into this race and he has the support of the Republican establishment to help him win. Then, the Washington Supreme Court announced they've accepted the redistricting commission's work and we learned what our district will look like next year. The new map makes our race even more competitive and more than 20% of my constituents will be new to the district. Peter -- we can't hold the House majority without winning WA-08 and this is going to be our most difficult race yet. I need your help right away if we're going to reach new voters, take on our opponents, and protect my seat in the midterm elections. Will you chip in $5 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to help protect my seat and our Democratic House majority?:= Thank you, Kim National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, Ironworker, and Democrat and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District, where he resides. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington — like Kevin McCarthy — Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. [**Make a contribution today of whatever you can afford and help elect Bruno to Congress.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wdVjEO4QrP5WbNA1-PnVdBnvp_KLEZiSdZOzE0WIPVJX02Vf1-Pr7EM2yju-yLZd-4-VCEBk354enhrZv-X6f8PyBcmHRnoIVc6eZPx1eeYEdo4Sjmd0ihg2h02OGp99gm5VhC0st3XN0ttkg_Gs-dng9opKhrNPHA-YRjxXA9bbZBu7o1yW7pDMLlwohZuh4D7PLPUN0cn4ABuW36CV4iHFrXirXLPwlONidwND8n0zlEdsP_EnsSKSBbkspWGpWGwq6j9K51I75GakeURvEIs2TWIxJVCRW7fHnDbvzu_w/3hv/buDK7cZwScaHU5oGq2pRkQ/h8/WKOdEQ6RhHzcZ6fGlHUfbuOkf6j5SoFBACSZ3tVuiX4)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials — thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Check Out Upcoming Candidate Training Opportunities
body:
Learn more best practices for creating campaign materials and events for your success!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- The past few months we have hosted successful in-person and virtual candidate bootcamps. Thank you to all who participated. We had a fantastic turnout, and are incredibly excited in the interest and commitment of so many to run for local office. As you move forward in the process, please reach out to your **[local county party](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=2)** with questions, guidance, and resources. [****](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3KId7OwvczmxPTyTpaPzbcwjVgqMp23NqQyZ8V0ypRkwPyv25iT3AWEUD3pbBYDZHk63kW72fMzL6HM_Y8VPEI7&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=3) We have more opportunities to learn and gain assistance in creating the pieces and putting together events for a successful campaign. If you missed this Bootcamp, do not worry! We have more virtual options that break down the campaign timeline, strategies, and best practices.

* * *
Zoom-In:
**Signs and Lit** \-- Wednesday, December 15th @ 7pm **Fundraising and Events** \-- Monday, December 20th @ 7pm **Signs and Lit** \-- Thursday, January 6th @ 7pm **Fundraising and Events** \-- Tuesday, January 11th @ 7pm **Successful Forums** \-- Thursday, January 13th @ 7pm
##### _*When you RSVP, you'll receive the zoom link, no later than an hour before the training, and course materials_
| [](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_15?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=4 "DECEMBER 15TH RSVP") [DECEMBER 15TH RSVP](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_15?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=4)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_20_20220113?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=5 "DECEMBER 20TH RSVP") [DECEMBER 20TH RSVP](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_12_20_20220113?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=5)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_06?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=6 "JANUARY 6th RSVP") [JANUARY 6th RSVP](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_06?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=6)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_11?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=7 "JANUARY 11TH RSVP") [JANUARY 11TH RSVP](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_01_11?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=7)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_1_13?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=8 "JANUARY 13TH RSVP") [JANUARY 13TH RSVP](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_1_13?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=8)
---
Again, thank you for stepping up to be a leader in your community!
We look forward to helping you in the future.
-Team WISGOP
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=9 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=9)
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=10).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=11) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=12).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=training_topic_specific_3&n=13), software for leaders.
