name: Dustin Rhodes, Campaign Manager
subject: Making sure you saw this note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Not much time left! Friend, Our mid-month fundraising deadline is TONIGHT! [](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=25d015bc8fde4daebb71632fdfd6638f&_e=7C1ZSFuczYOe9fqSVTTMH1m-VXeAeH5kVTnA20smetyjnOBAkbac3uH8LAiA7rJmH4Cij8m1YH7Evs2hKzfQcL-uJbFc4vp4o0QyTBEHPh4alUYxq2DTG-yUjYwTqgeTLLdnh3sk-jc5KMH8szOnFqXjaPZJ5B9Xiwn8Li5oRRbBPEcsIdoya3uPOPq2P_2uOmFs2A8RPDoNsFZtRcM_arIZBZrDNewIAkgYSAuT1a34_Y1slQsqPuBVIxHJpOH-6A-dNJ0mqubrwtp3MnrY3u6pbmpUVupsrmoSY04Q86H9dETtNKGTEyqriCb1V5EYV1BUUrwVrQAGBS85T0mxvokYrgblhisVKN-BjuIPubFq-K09bIrnEU4PrbF5SLtLhDMQGYwcIS6DTa9hsv7ppanux6DmCfYg2QwF76eJdztwipUh3QJUc5s3_Rte3H6Pjt5vEoPIGcHHUaFMp5e_5Q%3D%3D) Tiffany Shedd is the conservative candidate for Attorney General that has the personal knowledge and life experiences to take on the drug cartels, STOP vaccine mandates in court and promote law and order throughout our great state. We need to spread her conservative message far and wide across Arizona. But that is no small task and certainly an expensive one. That’s where you come in, Friend. Peter,

We talk about the many differences between Christy Smith and Mike Garcia, but today we want to _show you._ Check it out:

While Mike Garcia was meeting with Donald Trump to do his bidding:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39721307/321128403/-941512608?recode=em21_211215_MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGMxY2ZlOS0xMzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYcnO17noHurMDB7xiYb_anM9H04LoZPwqaHnH7_t4E=)
---

Christy Smith was out meeting with voters from her district:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39721308/321128404/-941512608?refcode=em21_211215_MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGMxY2ZlOS0xMzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYcnO17noHurMDB7xiYb_anM9H04LoZPwqaHnH7_t4E=)
---

And while Mike Garcia slept in the middle of doing his job:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39721308/321128404/-941512608?refcode=em21_211215_MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGMxY2ZlOS0xMzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYcnO17noHurMDB7xiYb_anM9H04LoZPwqaHnH7_t4E=)
---

Christy worked with organizations like Santa Clarita Child & Family Center to advocate for people experiencing domestic violence -- an issue Christy is all too familiar with.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39721308/321128404/-941512608?refcode=em21_211215_MM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGMxY2ZlOS0xMzVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYcnO17noHurMDB7xiYb_anM9H04LoZPwqaHnH7_t4E=)
---

**We know we can send Mike Garcia packing in 2022, but we have to get ready now. We have an end-of-year goal of hitting $20,000. We have a big budget meeting at the end of this year, and we'll have to make tough choices if we don't meet this goal.

[But here's the good news, Peter -- we can do something about it. subject: This Weekend, All Roads Lead to Newport Beach
body:
Join the Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade. | |
---
| | | This weekend, Errol Webber hosts TWO cruises during the Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade. And you're cordially invited!
---
| [ ](https://BigTimeAmerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=c4e869d8e6&e=a39a40cba9 "Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade")
---
[Get Tickets](https://BigTimeAmerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=ff50191acb&e=a39a40cba9) for the 113th Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade VIP Yacht Party.
| [ ](https://BigTimeAmerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=9c190d22c3&e=a39a40cba9)
---
| [GET TICKETS!](https://BigTimeAmerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=e52e9f880a&e=a39a40cba9 "GET TICKETS!")
---
| Big Time America invites you to the 113th Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade. And don’t just watch the parade. JOIN the parade! You and your family can experience the entire Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade, light show, and fireworks aboard ‘ _**The Ambassador**_ ,’ Newport Harbor’s hottest new luxury super yacht. Join one of our three yacht cruises over the weekend, Friday - Sunday, December 17-19, from 6-10PM. Enjoy three floors of gourmet fare, premium **OPEN BAR** , live DJ entertainment, a dance floor, and a Sky Deck to take in the exciting sights and sounds of The Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade in Newport Harbor, and along Lido Isle, and Balboa Island! Bring the entire family and make this Christmas a holiday to remember! Presented by Big Time America!
---
| [ ](https://BigTimeAmerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=38ba74a323&e=a39a40cba9)
---

---
| **The Event**
* Full Panoramic Views of the Newport Beach Christmas Boat Parade in Newport Harbor, Lido Isle, and Balboa Island
* Champagne Greeting
* 4hr Premium **OPEN BAR**
* Gourmet Hors D'oeuvres
* Live DJ Entertainment
* Multiple Yacht Lounges
* Fireworks Show 12/19 (Dependent on City of Newport Beach)

---
| [GET TICKETS!](https://BigTimeAmerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=ccaebe7de3&e=a39a40cba9 "GET TICKETS!")
---

---
| **Gourmet Menu**
* Smoked Salmon Rosette with horseradish crème fraiche and caviar
* Assorted Sushi Rolls with wasabi-soy dipping sauce
* Skewer of Baby Mozzarella Caprese with tear drop tomatoes and basil
* Petite Pizza with smoked chicken, basil and shredded mozzarella
* Coconut Crusted Prawns with orange-mustard sauce
* Beef Taquitos with guacamole
* Chicken Satay Skewers with Thai peanut sauce
* Tiramisu, Coffee liqueur soaked cake, mascarpone cheese, vanilla

---
| [ ](https://BigTimeAmerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=bd16922a88&e=a39a40cba9)
---
| **Event Schedule**
* Check-In: 5:00 PM
* Boarding: 5:30 PM
* Gate Closes at 5:55 PM (Do Not Be Late - No Refunds)
* **Cruise: 6:00 PM - 10:00 PM**
* Boat Parade: 6:30 PM - 9:30 PM
* Disembark: 9:45 PM - 10:00 PM

---

It may seem like it’s far off, **but the primary election for Governor of Ohio is just around the corner.**

On **May 3rd** Ohioans will make their choice – to continue down the destructive path of Mike DeWine or elect an Ohio first conservative who will change the future of Ohio for the better.

To win this race, **I need the help of every single supporter.** I know you’re one of my top supporters, Friend. That’s why I’m reaching out to YOU. Here’s what you can do:

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: could you take a minute to read this email before heading to bed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter, it's Abby again. I'm sure you're just as eager to head to bed as I am, but I promise this email is important for defeating Sen. Grassley (R-IA), so I hope you'll take a minute to read it first.
You see, my team just sent me the latest numbers and we're still $1,507 short of our $50,000 mid-month goal. Every fundraising deadline we meet is important, but this is a particularly big one. Here's why:
The mid-month deadline at 11:59 P.M. tonight is our last deadline before the final FEC public reporting deadline of the year. Hitting this mid-month goal is essential to putting us in the strongest possible position to raise what we need for the overall quarter – and, importantly, to show everybody from the political pundits to Sen. Grassley himself that our campaign is strong and has the resources to defeat him.
But right now, the Senate GOP's campaign arm has nearly $30 million in the bank that they can use to keep Iowa red. I refuse to let that happen, because this race is personal to me, Peter. I grew up in a working class, union family. I know exactly what it means for families when Sen. Grassley picks the interests of deep-pocketed billionaires over working families, or when he sides with corporations instead of the union members striking here in Iowa.
Iowans, working families and Americans cannot take another six years of Sen. Grassley. **So please, before my midnight deadline in just a few short hours, can you rush a donation of $5 – or however much you can spare – to defeat Sen. Grassley, fight for working families like my own and protect our Senate majority?** Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39721327/321128472/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk455-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjU1YTM5Yy0xNDVlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4-AsQJFX0J8snY-57ZEDTJ61OLUipH6qbNJj7gU_PU=)**
From the bottom of my heart – thank you for all that you do.
– Abby

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, it's Abby again. I'm sure you're just as eager to head to bed as I am, but I promise this email is important for defeating Sen. Grassley (R-IA), so I hope you'll take a minute to read it first. You see, my team just sent me the latest numbers and we're still $1,507 short of our $50,000 mid-month goal. Every fundraising deadline we meet is important, but this is a particularly big one. Here's why: The mid-month deadline at 11:59 P.M. tonight is our last deadline before the final FEC public reporting deadline of the year. Hitting this mid-month goal is essential to putting us in the strongest possible position to raise what we need for the overall quarter – and, importantly, to show everybody from the political pundits to Sen. Grassley himself that our campaign is strong and has the resources to defeat him. But right now, the Senate GOP's campaign arm has nearly $30 million in the bank that they can use to keep Iowa red. I refuse to let that happen, because this race is personal to me, Peter. I grew up in a working class, union family. I know exactly what it means for families when Sen. Grassley picks the interests of deep-pocketed billionaires over working families, or when he sides with corporations instead of the union members striking here in Iowa. Iowans, working families and Americans cannot take another six years of Sen. Grassley. So please, before my midnight deadline in just a few short hours, can you rush a donation of $5 – or however much you can spare – to defeat Sen. Grassley, fight for working families like my own and protect our Senate majority? Here's the best link to contribute: = From the bottom of my heart – thank you for all that you do. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. As you know, I'm an independent investigative journalist and also known as the "most banned woman in the world." Why? Because as Plato said, "**No one is more hated than he who speaks the truth**."

And yes, the Big Tech Mafia and the entire Communist Left absolutely HATE me.

[**Back my new lawsuit today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bO763h763dolp5G4QnyECU892ISw/d8Vx9CmWsUsty6LCR9RsAA)

Due to some recent court decisions, we have to make a shift in the venue, and we're looking to hire an additional attorney to serve as local counsel.

We expect that to cost an additional $14,000 for the long haul. [**Any amount you can chip in would be greatly appreciated.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bO763h763dolp5G4QnyECU892ISw/d8Vx9CmWsUsty6LCR9RsAA)

Twitter, Facebook, Google and Apple have ramped up their efforts to silence conservatives, and we can expect them to escalate their efforts before and during the 2022 Mid-Term Elections - **which is BLATANT election interference**.

But that's never stopped them before.

[**Help me fight back by supporting my legal work to go on the offensive**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bO763h763dolp5G4QnyECU892ISw/d8Vx9CmWsUsty6LCR9RsAA) and put an end to Cancel Culture!

Big Tech exploited the false narrative surrounding January 6th as an excuse to ban a MASSIVE number of Conservative accounts and a sitting U.S. President on social media.

While that continues, Big Tech is knocking out profiles that report on the trial of Ghislaine Maxwell (Jeffrey Epstein's "madame") while suspending accounts of sitting members of Congress, like Rep. Jim Banks, who "misgendered" Assistant Secretary of Health Rachel Levine, who is transgender.

The inmates are truly running the asylum.

**Big Tech is operating with no concern for any consequence as NO ONE has filed the RIGHT case against them.**

That ends with my lawsuit . . . and [**I need your backing to get it done**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bO763h763dolp5G4QnyECU892ISw/d8Vx9CmWsUsty6LCR9RsAA).

[**Chip in any amount that you can to support my lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bO763h763dolp5G4QnyECU892ISw/d8Vx9CmWsUsty6LCR9RsAA) - and help me take them down!

Thanks for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Charles Booker
subject: When I say I love Kentucky, this is why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Last weekend, Kentucky was devastated by a record-breaking tornado. The
damage was catastrophic — entire towns were erased, thousands of families
saw their homes disappear overnight, and many are still searching for
loved ones.

In spite of this tragedy, we did what Kentucky does best. We showed up and
took care of one other.

My campaign team and I drove down to Bowling Green after the storm to help
deliver aid. In the midst of the debris and destruction, volunteers from
all over Kentucky came to share their love, food, supplies, housing, and
support.

This is who we are. When I say I love Kentucky, this is why.

[1]Picture of someone walking down hall full of supplies

[2]Charles passing out supplies from the trunk of a car

We have seen so many tough times in Kentucky. But even in the storm, we
stand together, lean into our faith, and keep pushing ahead. Strength and
resolve are part of who we are as Kentuckians.

But the fact of the matter is that there are a lot of communities across
Kentucky that are now gone. Many of them may not return or will never be
the same.

It’s an urgent reminder of the deeper work we need to do to prepare for
the next crisis. So many of us were without food and housing before this
tornado. So many of us were hanging on by a thread before this storm.

We must do the deeper work and address the climate crisis, invest in
infrastructure, and end poverty. In a very real way, we must build back
better.

My campaign and I are committed to this mission starting with being in
Western Kentucky and spending as much time as needed to make sure those
who were impacted by this storm receive the care and support they need.

These past days have reaffirmed to me what I want to do with my life.

In all I do, I want to help the people of Kentucky. I just want my life
and the work I do to add value to a place and people that mean everything
to me. I want us to have healing and prosperity. I want us to thrive.

That’s the reason I will always show up. That’s my only agenda.

I love you, Kentucky.

Charles

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1337%2E346206%2Ek1nXLl

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: John Castorani
subject: Make Russia Great Again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Do you think the rise of China and Russia pose an existential threat to the future of the United States?For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=4688cb3e80024d80aa15b45f56d7fde6&_t=hTwZB2s4HswyKNG1u-Kd49KXqvRAP9bQnzxjvkcUNnoq3rXEWngQSlrAqzzLEoheflycNBvGHKa1tNTbjtPVon2amvOeEHVzuD2C5m0j2GVzmDieboHLiGLWuwlrh3Cv85HfzKbxrFDM78pNxSECZyujp1Trd4OZzNjxWjEGO1Q%3D) |
---

Fellow Conservative,

Do you think Democrats believe what members of their own party say or promise to do anymore?

I’m asking because it seems to me that while Vladmir Putin and Chairman Xi Xinping of the Chinese Communist Party plot ways to supplant the United States as the world’s superpower, Biden and House Democrats are sitting on their duffs waiting to be smacked in the face.

While American members of Congress – both Republican and Democrat – are calling each other names and threatening to hold former members in contempt of Congress, **[_Vladimir Putin is amassing more than 170,000 troops on the border of Ukraine preparing for an invasion_](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4688cb3e80024d80aa15b45f56d7fde6&_e=D-DBM0dyQqJDBA8aLfn-pznZKDMCpf5sQzvK5B7_YB6tRRKUUZ3T-DfYNCV5JmGeNC88o5Xm7PHufYET-IqtIrdp8yvUVMseCS6c5_-6QBg2wCfb7mMBhdP-loikpEiWHE8zZyuaZUPmP5Eum5ditLZlVAazUmHk0GlTfNjBgxe8LfFsT2p9ZCPBJJ9PWxejFIOwurhNljEFwQ0XUeyOjYfZS5xXfYq3MdtqJjYZjdbHO6opQOrscxtZtGTBOIjEgpHY6Jvp49Q5BlnzK89AcazWuFQ7rc4yyeW_kyw-z8pedW0TNGkKIWfhHYqB3n4-axsmcq8S2lNz0euvxvwyyIpcNObf55r22ltN9ILO3rjHTJpMiUqT9vDxHZBzw-R7yZyP0OCzN7QPSyQmwrXJ0ZQQFizMwjA38HmfnGirj3m4v6wMyCrjHzW0emYaKfxD0gbcvSB0c2HodSkrX4HV8zayx3jAdyKC6ctKKilnvd2nz-yyYub2ufBqYSuKeKhYTkxkQ6aeWStNCId9rDKCNCKC82K1O4UA5SBuR7c7AtD6QCFm3mgBRyYD7gDtqZMcXmErUkw2xDoYNuhhFWSTKZueRBcSbN1h-u2X_rsWLvo%3D)**.

You may not think this matters to you - but you’d be sorely mistaken if you don’t. As a former member of the intelligence community, I can tell you with authority that the biggest threat to continued American superiority on the world stage are the leaders of Russia and China.

We need to **[_elect members of Congress who actually give a damn_](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4688cb3e80024d80aa15b45f56d7fde6&_e=D-DBM0dyQqJDBA8aLfn-pznZKDMCpf5sQzvK5B7_YB6tRRKUUZ3T-DfYNCV5JmGeNC88o5Xm7PHufYET-IqtIrdp8yvUVMseCS6c5_-6QBg2wCfb7mMBhdP-loikpEiWHE8zZyuaZUPmP5Eum5ditLZlVAazUmHk0GlTfNjBgxe8LfFsT2p9ZCPBJJ9PWxejFIOwurhNljEFwQ0XUeyOjYfZS5xXfYq3MdtqJjYZjdbHO6opQOrscxtZtGTBOIjEgpHY6Jvp49Q5BlnzK89AcazWuFQ7rc4yyeW_kyw-z8pedW0TNGkKIWfhHYqB3n4-axsmcq8S2lNz0euvxvwyyIpcNObf55r22ltN9ILO3rjHTJpMiUqT9vDxHZBzw-R7yZyP0OCzN7QPSyQmwrXJ0QXfM2RZdVrtWh6QTJ2Nu3QyMT86jR27e169gmiLbGRPdDJDVKv9IM3KlX740739vcrHAGw9b_hXwTVapdeaNAQz9Ba2jMHtp-SJfqNIJU0UXxBZs8k8eF29Jfb-jwHYaVYlH_MDR_62-yorisMsdUDPG7QlkZFNV-qbnu2lixz-X8yY8UOWfIRWQS7GKzb0El5za0F3sV73uozHIdnsydA%3D) **about our standing in the world and who can focus on issues beyond our party and our borders.

[**Do China and Russia pose a threat to U.S. sovereignty?
Take the survey -> **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4688cb3e80024d80aa15b45f56d7fde6&_e=D-DBM0dyQqJDBA8aLfn-pznZKDMCpf5sQzvK5B7_YB6tRRKUUZ3T-DfYNCV5JmGeNC88o5Xm7PHufYET-IqtIrdp8yvUVMseCS6c5_-6QBg2wCfb7mMBhdP-loikpEiWHE8zZyuaZUPmP5Eum5ditLZlVAazUmHk0GlTfNjBgxe8LfFsT2p9ZCPBJJ9PWxejFIOwurhNljEFwQ0XUeyOjYfZS5xXfYq3MdtqJjYZjdbHO6opQOrscxtZtGTBOIjEgpHY6Jvp49Q5BlnzK89AcazWuFQ7rc4yyeW_kyw-z8pedW0TNGkKIWfhHYqB3n4-axsmcq8S2lNz0euvxvwyyIpcNObf55r22ltN9ILO3rjHTJpMiUqT9vDxHZBzw-R7yZyP0OCzN7QPSyQmwrXJ0dRCz5eZwgP9EQvSxKas0qcbpfxqsX0zQDRUEqkT-xqsieLKZqdn9KelYr35ge70Xua2D_eVogRhulG2KuYE1Pxjh5NSWq7B6-ZBILRBihATHU2Nbq_-0vsxV925tOgnrxWMgn_Ed6mdtXbbYQs4T2-vwhCLxoA_WfRwP5o4quv6iiHua0ie4HGme57Ao5vAOylNOZnTtfEyv1cnRvglVuM%3D)

Your grandparents and my grandparents would be amazed to see that American corporations are kowtowing to Chinese censorship while happily criticizing America. The greatest generation - the brave men and women who DEFEATED FASCISM - would be ashamed, but not surprised, to see Hollywood rewriting scripts to please the communist regime in the hopes of not being canceled. Did you know Disney’s ESPN mandated that the network’s coverage “**avoid any political discussions about China and Hong Kong** ” and Nike, an American shoe company declared itself “**a brand that is of China and for China” all the while canceling a shoe with the original American Flag**.

Progressive Democrats are the disease. In fact, they may as well be a branch of the Chinese Communist Party.

Much like the Communists, American progressive decry any American attempting to display their patriotism by flying an American flag on their front porch.

American Progressives applaud “woke” athletes when they turn their back to the flag. When Tamyra Mensah-Stock became the first U.S. Black woman to win gold in Olympic wrestling last summer, where was the liberal praise for this proud American? Nowhere to be found. Why? Because she only had wonderful things to say about the country that made her dreams possible.

I know this email is long. But I love America with all of my heart and I know if you’re reading this, you do too. **[Please do me a quick favor and take my brief survey today to let me know if you are in agreement with me that Russia and China are a massive threat to our future security](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4688cb3e80024d80aa15b45f56d7fde6&_e=D-DBM0dyQqJDBA8aLfn-pznZKDMCpf5sQzvK5B7_YB6tRRKUUZ3T-DfYNCV5JmGeNC88o5Xm7PHufYET-IqtIrdp8yvUVMseCS6c5_-6QBg2wCfb7mMBhdP-loikpEiWHE8zZyuaZUPmP5Eum5ditLZlVAazUmHk0GlTfNjBgxe8LfFsT2p9ZCPBJJ9PWxejFIOwurhNljEFwQ0XUeyOjYfZS5xXfYq3MdtqJjYZjdbHO6opQOrscxtZtGTBOIjEgpHY6Jvp49Q5BlnzK89AcazWuFQ7rc4yyeW_kyw-z8pedW0TNGkKIWfhHYqB3n4-axsmcq8S2lNz0euvxvwyyIpcNObf55r22ltN9ILO3rjHTJpMiUqT9vDxHZBzw-R7yZyP0OCzN7QPSyQmwrXJ0Wty8VU2YnwBZ6biklv_FT8VB7Y0YA5IDc00c8IB8V26Err-7eVXTz7nsGAFfiBsMaDGE4UE01jnVstDkGHNwnOK2gZ15rRzAGXD_gYlw2KPW2IDZ05RCOnEgYkDQ4WmcVppnzad_jIsgM4JdGkSn4o4LzqAFfTwlj9wNzZuy_yPq1TBiVXw1qoPe13TZ4LLc3q2lyCXOtwWY1P0RLsDVbc%3D)**.

[**Do China and Russia pose a threat to U.S. sovereignty?
Take the survey -> **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4688cb3e80024d80aa15b45f56d7fde6&_e=D-DBM0dyQqJDBA8aLfn-pznZKDMCpf5sQzvK5B7_YB6tRRKUUZ3T-DfYNCV5JmGeNC88o5Xm7PHufYET-IqtIrdp8yvUVMseCS6c5_-6QBg2wCfb7mMBhdP-loikpEiWHE8zZyuaZUPmP5Eum5ditLZlVAazUmHk0GlTfNjBgxe8LfFsT2p9ZCPBJJ9PWxejFIOwurhNljEFwQ0XUeyOjYfZS5xXfYq3MdtqJjYZjdbHO6opQOrscxtZtGTBOIjEgpHY6Jvp49Q5BlnzK89AcazWuFQ7rc4yyeW_kyw-z8pedW0TNGkKIWfhHYqB3n4-axsmcq8S2lNz0euvxvwyyIpcNObf55r22ltN9ILO3rjHTJpMiUqT9vDxHZBzw-R7yZyP0OCzN7QPSyQmwrXJ0WhSrRkkjD25Bv1dPtJbBcteRX6cSoOhKo8pHoSPEnz3aMAbm-I2uCb70rfYnrIhQKdTJlBFjXTaSTGkfXu2_MrBlROL16qvAqFTvE6I2ApH4RNxuKCFx8L7ZnWtRgeppvCmtZcOLRWWrRVp15L53jdZI14QHGAUJA3pPYWYz_ZMNmzxtaq0VOBJSaqg1s9yprlYHqzQ1REgdQ8MVDZhgmo%3D)

We’re required to report our numbers publicly after the deadline
#

Friends -
The final FEC fundraising deadline of the year is quickly approaching, and we’ve got some work to do before it gets here. But before I ask you to pitch in, will you give me a chance to explain why a $3 donation today is so important?
This FEC deadline is going to set the tone for all of 2022. We are required to report our numbers publicly after the deadline — no matter how we do.
All eyes will be on our numbers. Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies are going to be looking to see if we have what it takes to flip North Carolina. Any signs of weakness or vulnerability could spell trouble for us.
Right now, we’re about halfway through the month but we’re a bit behind the pace we need to reach our deadline goal. So today, we need a surge of support to get us on track, and that’s why your support is so important.
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to make sure we can report a strong number after our FEC fundraising deadline at the end of the month? Fellow American -

I have exciting news about our race! The NRCC has chosen less than 25 targeted races to be eligible for the “Young Guns” program - and I made the list.

body:
I'll take the TRUTH to Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/inmycorner-4657237?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=be5f2326f5&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [Join the Team >>](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=18d97f042a&e=af4b86f5c6 "Join the Team >>")
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot, I’m tired of Democrats, and even weak Republicans like my RINO Primary Opponent making excuses for violent Antifa and Black Lives Matter thugs. [_So I’m standing up for the truth_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=89e77e5d0a&e=af4b86f5c6)[ _._](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f33ef9d439&e=af4b86f5c6) How are Republicans responsible for “institutional racism” when Democrats control ALL of the institutions? _They can’t be._ The truth is, **[Democrats are the Real Racists](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=903cae597f&e=af4b86f5c6)**.

All of the civil unrest, all of the rioting, all of the looting, all of the burning -- it’s all a product the bogus lie told over and over again by the far-left Mainstream Media -- that white Republicans are “racists.” [When I’m in Congress, the media and the lawless political left will be held accountable for what they’re doing, and I need your help today to make that happen.](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=26d6df78a3&e=af4b86f5c6) [**With just 15 days until the end of the Quarter, I’m asking you to contribute to my campaign right away, and send a Black Conservative to Congress to address the lies that are DESTROYING American life as we know it.**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=07da12ffec&e=af4b86f5c6) It’s time to destroy the false narrative peddled by the far-left media. It’s time for someone to stand up and tell the truth. _That person is me, but I’m running out of time._ [**In these critical 15 days, I’m asking you to chip in $50, $75 $100, $250, or anything you can to my campaign right away, and help me finish strong in this heated race to Take Back Congress for Conservatives.**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=afa4f5ad56&e=af4b86f5c6) Thank you in advance for your generosity. Respectfully,
******Chief Jarome Bell**
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District **P.S.** [**I will stand up for YOU during these trying times under Democrat Tyranny, but I need your help today to make that happen!**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f626f7d1b9&e=af4b86f5c6) I only have 15 days to keep blitzing the district.**[Donate to my campaign today and help me defeat Democrat Racism in the U.S. Congress!

Thank you for your continued action and support!](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=97d5637e1f&e=af4b86f5c6)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: Why I'm in this Race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Politics is a dirty game, Peter. But our movement is a beacon of light. | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7eece50a08&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | Peter -

**Wow. Nearly 8 months into this campaign, our grassroots movement continues to amaze me. **

Last night I attended the Stand Up Michigan - Kent County meeting in Grand Rapids and spoke to over 200 patriots about our vision for a Free Michigan. 👇
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=480456a85f&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [HAMMER DOWN BY PITCHING IN $10](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2dd1eaaf72&e=fe4b890356 "HAMMER DOWN BY PITCHING IN $10")
---
| When I co-founded Stand Up Michigan last year to protest this Governor's tyrannical lockdown agenda, I never imagined how big our grassroots citizens movement would grow. **But this experience has taught me that** __**the Power of One Leads to the Power of Many.**__

For those who don't know, _I grew up in a trailer in Coldwater, Michigan._ My family didn't have a lot of money, but we had a lot of love. We hunted, we fished, we lived off the land.

My dad served in the Michigan Army National Guard, working his way up to Colonel. After years of hard work and dedication, I built my own business, creating jobs while treating hundreds of patients. **My family and I have lived the American Dream and built it here in Michigan.**

__That dream has become an authoritarian nightmare these past 1.5 years __\- our freedoms, our faith, our way of life have all been disrupted by power-hungry politicians. **I am running for Governor to restore Michigan's greatness and keep that dream alive for our future generations.**

This fight is personal to me, and it hasn't been easy. But the path to victory and the road to freedom is more clear each passing day.

Our movement is growing. Our momentum is building. Every standing-room only event we attend in all corners of this state lets me know that **WE THE PEOPLE are energized like never before.**

[**I am asking you to contribute $10 right now to help us take our state back Peter.**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=d7848ed391&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [DONATE $10](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7826b2d694&e=fe4b890356 "DONATE $10")
---
| [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=182d319ee5&e=fe4b890356 "DONATE ANY AMOUNT")
---
| There is so much on the line this election, and we simply can't afford to sit on the sidelines. **We must all have skin in the game. **

[Please contribute just a few bucks if you can.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8a7adf6c99&e=fe4b890356) I appreciate you.
---
| **God Bless Michigan,

clean_body: Politics is a dirty game, Peter. But our movement is a beacon of light. | | | | | Peter - Wow. Nearly 8 months into this campaign, our grassroots movement continues to amaze me. Last night I attended the Stand Up Michigan - Kent County meeting in Grand Rapids and spoke to over 200 patriots about our vision for a Free Michigan. 👇 | | "HAMMER DOWN BY PITCHING IN $10" | When I co-founded Stand Up Michigan last year to protest this Governor's tyrannical lockdown agenda, I never imagined how big our grassroots citizens movement would grow. But this experience has taught me that the Power of One Leads to the Power of Many. For those who don't know, I grew up in a trailer in Coldwater, Michigan. My family didn't have a lot of money, but we had a lot of love. We hunted, we fished, we lived off the land. My dad served in the Michigan Army National Guard, working his way up to Colonel. After years of hard work and dedication, I built my own business, creating jobs while treating hundreds of patients. My family and I have lived the American Dream and built it here in Michigan. That dream has become an authoritarian nightmare these past 1.5 years \- our freedoms, our faith, our way of life have all been disrupted by power-hungry politicians. I am running for Governor to restore Michigan's greatness and keep that dream alive for our future generations. This fight is personal to me, and it hasn't been easy. But the path to victory and the road to freedom is more clear each passing day. Our movement is growing. Our momentum is building. Every standing-room only event we attend in all corners of this state lets me know that WE THE PEOPLE are energized like never before. | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" | There is so much on the line this election, and we simply can't afford to sit on the sidelines. We must all have skin in the game. I appreciate you. | God Bless Michigan, Garrett Soldano Republican Candidate for Governor | | | | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN 1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081 | Garrett Soldano for Michigan 1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

subject: ICYMI: CONGRESS OF COUNTIES Registration Now Open!
body:
Congress of Counties returns in 2022! Registration is now open for this two-day Republican training event! Congress... |
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c8aa85c86&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican -

In case you missed it, last week we opened registration for Congress of Counties! We hope to see you February 25-26 at the historic French Lick Resort in French Lick, Indiana for the 2022 Congress of Counties! Registration information is below.

Thanks!
-Your Indiana Republican Party Team

Registration for Congress of Counties 2022 is [now open](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e804987500&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

**This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists is scheduled for February 25-26 at the historic[French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dc384153a9&e=1acd9bb3d6).**
[\--> Register Now!<\-- ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a1a331dead&e=1acd9bb3d6)
You'll want to experience Congress of Counties next year to kick-off 2022’s election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics like:
* Candidate recruitment
* Fundraising
* Communications and social media
* Technology
* And so much more to be announced soon!

The training provided at Congress of Counties is the training you’ll need to WIN elections throughout Indiana in 2022 and beyond, keeping Indiana on the right track.
**_THE FULL SCHEDULE FOR CONGRESS OF COUNTIES WILL BE RELEASED IN THE COMING WEEKS! _**
**Bidenflation has NOT impacted registration for****Congress**** of Counties! [General admission registration remains $100/person.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=21b237a06b&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

We hope to see you next year at Congress of Counties!

Thanks!
-Your Indiana Republican Party Team

name: Emma Bouton, Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: Tonight’s the final mid-month deadline of 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team,

This campaign is about what we can accomplish together: a statewide Green
New Deal, a $19 minimum wage, shelter and affordable housing for every
person, and a platform that won’t leave any Rhode Islander behind.

I’ve crunched the numbers, and I’m a little worried because as of 2PM
today, we’re behind where we need to be to hit our final mid-month goal of
the year.

We’re building a people-powered movement that has the potential to change
the way we do politics in Rhode Island. And we’re grassroots funded, so
even a small dip in fundraising can have a big impact on the campaign.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211215_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=324%2E43343%2EQaj8ZS ]If you’re able, can you power our work by donating $3, $10, or whatever
you can afford before our midnight deadline passes tonight? It’s going to
take all of us pitching in a little bit here and there to defeat the
corrupt establishment and win.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3162?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211215_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=324%2E43343%2EQaj8ZS ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: One month in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Good morning from Wichita Falls, where last night I met with over 350
people, including men and women who have served at Sheppard Air Force
Base, school teachers and counselors who give their best to the children
of this community, and many others who are committing themselves to the
necessary work to win this election.

This morning I got up early and ran down to Lake Wichita. Geese, ducks,
mourning doves, and all other kinds of birds were just waking up as the
sun lit up the few clouds overhead. It’s the best way to start the day as
we jump back in the truck and drive west to Amarillo.

It’s been one month since we launched this campaign for Governor and I’ve
got to tell you that I feel very good about what we’ve been able to do
together so far and optimistic about the road ahead.

We have hundreds more stops to make, thousands more conversations to
start, and millions more votes to turn out by Election Day.
It’s going
to take all of us working together to keep this campaign moving.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50492?refcode=ema20211215-167109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=167109%2E444211%2E_n_AQD ]Would you consider making a donation of any amount today? My team set a
goal to raise $50,000 in grassroots donations by midnight to start the
next month strong — and with your support, I know we can get
there.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50492?refcode=ema20211215-167109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=167109%2E444211%2E_n_AQD ]Contribute Now

The amount of support this campaign has received has exceeded every
expectation we had from the outset. There are over 10,000 volunteers
who’ve signed up through our website and at our events; more than 67,000
individual donors have made a contribution; and in the first 24 hours of
the campaign we raised more than $2 million, more than any gubernatorial
race has ever raised in a similar period of time.

And we’ve been able to meet with people on the road, in every part of
Texas. El Paso, Fort Stockton, San Antonio, Laredo, Hebbronville,
Edinburg, Mission, McAllen, Brownsville, Corpus Christi, Portland,
Houston, Dallas, Midland, Odessa, Austin, Fort Worth, Stamford, De Leon,
Desdemona, Rising Star, Abilene, San Angelo, Seabrook, Sugar Land,
Rosenberg, Galveston, Beaumont, Nacogdoches, Marshall, Longview,
Texarkana, Paris, Gainesville, Wichita Falls, Amarillo, Hale Center, and
Lubbock.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50492?refcode=ema20211215-167109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=167109%2E444211%2E_n_AQD ]Beto at Rosenberg event

Fort Bend County

We are going everywhere. Taking no one for granted. Writing no one off.
And bringing the same message of returning Texas to our big, pressing
priorities: creating better jobs, ensuring we have great public schools,
and expanding Medicaid so that every Texan is well enough to live to their
full potential.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50492?refcode=ema20211215-167109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=167109%2E444211%2E_n_AQD ]Your help has made this possible and I hope that as we come to the end
of the year that you will consider making a donation to keep us on the
road and reaching as many Texas voters as possible. It’s the only way to
win and it’s the best way to ensure I can deliver to the expectations of
my fellow Texans as governor.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50492?refcode=ema20211215-167109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=167109%2E444211%2E_n_AQD ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your help and your faith in this campaign,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=167109%2E444211%2E_n_AQD

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

There are over 10,000 volunteers who’ve signed up through our website and at our events; more than 67,000 individual donors have made a contribution; and in the first 24 hours of the campaign we raised more than $2 million, more than any gubernatorial race has ever raised in a similar period of time. And we’ve been able to meet with people on the road, in every part of Texas. El Paso, Fort Stockton, San Antonio, Laredo, Hebbronville, Edinburg, Mission, McAllen, Brownsville, Corpus Christi, Portland, Houston, Dallas, Midland, Odessa, Austin, Fort Worth, Stamford, De Leon, Desdemona, Rising Star, Abilene, San Angelo, Seabrook, Sugar Land, Rosenberg, Galveston, Beaumont, Nacogdoches, Marshall, Longview, Texarkana, Paris, Gainesville, Wichita Falls, Amarillo, Hale Center, and Lubbock. [ ]Beto at Rosenberg event Fort Bend County We are going everywhere. Taking no one for granted. Writing no one off. And bringing the same message of returning Texas to our big, pressing priorities: creating better jobs, ensuring we have great public schools, and expanding Medicaid so that every Texan is well enough to live to their full potential. [ ]Your help has made this possible and I hope that as we come to the end of the year that you will consider making a donation to keep us on the road and reaching as many Texas voters as possible. It’s the only way to win and it’s the best way to ensure I can deliver to the expectations of my fellow Texans as governor. [ ]Contribute $3 Thank you for your help and your faith in this campaign, Beto

name: John Fetterman
subject: So uh, about that PowerPoint
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m not afraid to take on the insurrectionists.
#
Derek,
Former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows handed over a PowerPoint presentation to the House committee investigating the January 6 attack on the Capitol. The topic? How the Trump administration planned to overturn the 2020 election results — _including by declaring a national emergency._
So yeah. **Republicans planned a coup by PowerPoint.**
Here’s the reality in America in 2021: Maintaining Democratic control of the Senate isn’t just about passing our policies, as vital as that is. _It’s also about protecting our democracy as we know it from the people who want to tear it apart._
Now, here’s my promise to you: Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will hold *everybody* responsible for the January 6 insurrection accountable — and I’ll make sure our elections are safe for good by casting the 51st Democratic vote to scrap the filibuster + pass urgently-needed voting rights protections.
**[I’m not afraid to take on the insurrectionists, the enablers, and anyone who attacks our democracy. Help me bring that energy to the halls of the U.S. Senate, and solidify our Democratic majority by chipping in $5 now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38291?refcode=em20211215-3847&t=1&akid=3847%2E434096%2EhrB6wb)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38291?refcode=em20211215-3847&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3847%2E434096%2EhrB6wb)**
We need Pennsylvania’s next Senator to be a proven fighter against the insurrectionists.
I know this all too well, because I *was* that fighter in the Pennsylvania legislature when Republicans refused to swear in a duly-elected Democratic State Senator last January — they literally voted to remove me from the chamber. And when Donald Trump aimed his bogus demands for a “full election audit” at our Commonwealth, I called out his BS.
**Derek, we cannot allow the party who is still lying about 2020 — and stormed the Capitol in January — to dictate the terms of our democracy.**
But if we’re going to take on Trump allies and special interests and win this election, we can’t let our people-powered fundraising slow down one bit.
**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to support our campaign right now? I know we can flip this seat and ensure our Democratic Senate Majority, but the stakes are too high to take anything for granted.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38291?refcode=em20211215-3847&t=21&akid=3847%2E434096%2EhrB6wb)**
Thank you for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211215-3847-footer&t=22&refcode2=3847_434096_hrB6wb&akid=3847%2E434096%2EhrB6wb)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3847%2E434096%2EhrB6wb)

clean_body: | | Peter, I emailed you. My team emailed you. Now, I’m reaching out one last time. Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59 PM, and I need your help to ensure we can take back the Senate and make America great. When I ran for the Senate, I only had one goal: to fight for everyday patriots like you and start putting the hardworking citizens the radical Democrats left behind FIRST. I’m doing my best to uphold that promise, but I can’t do it alone. Unless we take back the Senate with a strong Republican majority, we won’t be able to finish our mission. Our future is in your hands, Friend, and I don’t want you to have any regrets. Please make a contribution before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can meet our FINAL mid-month goal of 2021 and SAVE AMERICA. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m writing to ask you for a favor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey, it’s Erica. I’m writing
to ask you for a big favor, and it’s important.

Tonight is our mid-month deadline, and how much we raise will ensure we’re
on track for our first FEC end-of-quarter goal since launching our
campaign for Congress on December 31st.

A lot of people will be watching to see if we have the grassroots support
it’ll take to win this competitive race and stop Republican attempts to
steal this seat.

We set a goal of raising an additional $2,500 by 11:59 PM ET tonight — and
if just 105 people make a donation today, we’ll reach our goal before the
deadline.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30238?t=1001&akid=691%2E3698%2ExvjL2i ]Will you be one of the 105 people we need to chip in $5 —
or anything you can — to reach our mid-month fundraising goal?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30238?refcode=em20211215-691&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=691%2E3698%2ExvjL2i ]Donate $5

Please let me explain what we’re up against and why this goal is so
important:

North Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District hasn’t had a Republican
congressperson since 1882 — but Republicans just gerrymandered our
district and turned it into one of the only swing districts in the entire
country. Why? To rob us of representation and make it easier for them to
flip the U.S. House next year.

Now, extremist Republicans are targeting our race. Madison Cawthorn
recently met with Donald Trump to outline his plan for a far-right
takeover of North Carolina, and our district was on his list of top
targets.

Republicans think 2022 will be their year. I won’t let that happen. I’ve
run in a racially gerrymandered district before — and won. I’ve
represented more than half of the counties in NC-02 in the state senate,
and I’ve never lost an election here.

But here’s the harsh truth: We’re going to need significant resources to
defeat the GOP and their war-chest of corporate PAC and special interest
money. It’s going to take a powerful, grassroots-funded movement to win.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30238?refcode=em20211215-691&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=691%2E3698%2ExvjL2i ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $5 or whatever
makes sense for you right now. Every donation will help us reach our
critical mid-month fundraising goal and ensure we can build the strongest
campaign possible to overcome the GOP’s gerrymander and deliver NC-02 for
the people.

Together,

Erica
Erica Smith for Congress

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/30238?refcode=em20211215-691&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=691%2E3698%2ExvjL2i ][IMG]

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211215-691-footer&t=1023&refcode2=691_3698_xvjL2i&akid=691%2E3698%2ExvjL2i

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=691%2E3698%2ExvjL2i

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking for $3 before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Now we have a new mission: re-election. And the same corporate special interests who tried to beat us last time are back.
#

**February 19, 2019.**
I will never forget it. That was the day we launched our campaign for Senate. Honestly, I had absolutely no idea what to expect.
Gabby and I had friends we knew would be willing to help, but I also knew one of the biggest challenges would be raising the kind of money we needed to win.
But because of supporters like you, we ran one of the largest people-powered Senate campaigns ever. And that helped us fend off attacks from corporate special interests and win in 2020.
**Midnight. Tonight.**
Now, we have a new mission: re-election. And the same corporate special interests who tried to beat us last time are back. As you read this, we are actually facing three outside National Republican groups at once who are all spending money on attack ads to beat us.
But I know that if we all do what we can to hold this seat, we’ll do what we did last campaign.
Win.
It’ll only happen if we’re all in this together, and that starts with reaching our goals before tonight’s mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight.
So, I am humbly asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end? I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211215-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1802_6688874_WdAdC0&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211215-2-15&t=20&refcode2=1802_6688874_WdAdC0&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211215-2-15&t=21&refcode2=1802_6688874_WdAdC0&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211215-2-15&t=22&refcode2=1802_6688874_WdAdC0&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211215-2-15&t=23&refcode2=1802_6688874_WdAdC0&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211215-2-15&t=24&refcode2=1802_6688874_WdAdC0&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211215-2-15&t=25&refcode2=1802_6688874_WdAdC0&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0)**
---
****
Thank you,
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=1802%2E6688874%2EWdAdC0).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut.
